 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/launch-app.svg)

### Android Essentials

Explore documentation, training, and Codelab tutorials to grow your Android skills, whether you're brand new to the platform or a seasoned developer looking to use features in the latest release. Learn to extend your app's user experience across a multitude of devices, and how to leverage Google Play to make money with your app.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/launch.svg)](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview)

### [Get started](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview)

Do a quick tutorial or dive deeper into a training course for an overview of key Android development topics.

[Start](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/app-quality.svg)](https://developer.android.com/about/versions)

### [Find Android releases](https://developer.android.com/about/versions)

Explore the current Android 14 preview release, as well as Android 13, Android 12, and legacy Android releases.

[Update](https://developer.android.com/about/versions)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/play.svg)](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/)

### [Monetize](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/)

Make money with subscriptions, financial transactions, and important purchase flows with Google Play.

[Earn](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/earth.svg)](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

### [Better together](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

Build elevated experiences to help your app work better together across multiple devices.

[Extend](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/better-together-hero.svg)](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

### [Support multiple devices](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

Android is built for everyone, everywhere, and to give people more choice in devices, whether it's based on the design, features, or overall value. Extend your user experience by supporting a range of devices and form factors.

[Learn about multidevice support](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/in-app-subscriptions.svg)](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/)

### [Monetize with Google Play](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/)

Monetize and integrate a billing system into your app using Google Play. Google play offers a variety of features and support to help you make money off your app while reaching a global market.

[Google Play Billing](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/android-ai-tools-hero.svg)](https://developer.android.com/ai)

### [AI on Android](https://developer.android.com/ai)

Enable your Android apps to generate text and images, understand content, enrich information, and build engagement with users. Use Google's full suite of AI and ML tools to make your apps more useful and intuitive.

[Explore AI on Android](https://developer.android.com/ai)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/home/productivity.svg)](https://developer.android.com/productivity)

### [Productivity](https://developer.android.com/productivity)

Level up your productivity app with media, adaptive layouts, and more.

[View dev center](https://developer.android.com/productivity)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/game-controller.svg)](https://developer.android.com/games)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/lock.svg)](https://developer.android.com/design-for-safety/privacy-sandbox)

### [Privacy Sandbox on Android](https://developer.android.com/design-for-safety/privacy-sandbox)

The Privacy Sandbox on Android aims to develop new technologies that improve user privacy and enable effective, personalized advertising experiences for mobile apps.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/marvel-strike-force-icon_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/stories/instant-apps/marvel-strike-force)

### [Marvel Strike Force improves their install rate](https://developer.android.com/stories/instant-apps/marvel-strike-force)

Due to a large file size, the number of organic installs was lower than the team had hoped for such a popular franchise. Google Play Instant to the rescue!

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/compose-cluster.svg)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/cuvva-compose)

### [Cuvva adopts Jetpack Compose](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/cuvva-compose)

Learn how the Android engineers at Cuvva re-architected their app to use a unidirectional data flow and Jetpack Compose.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/duolingo-icon_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/duolingo-kotlin)

### [Duolingo reduces its line count by an average of 30%](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/duolingo-kotlin)

After seeing that their codebase's line count was growing 46% every year, Duolingo's Android developers found success in migrating from Java to Kotlin.

### Training courses

Whether a new developer, just new to Android, or an experienced professional, grow your skills with training created by Google's Android development experts. Then get certified as an Android developer to grow your career.

course

### [Android Basics with Compose](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course)

This is the **recommended** course to start learning Android! Build a series of apps using Jetpack Compose, the modern toolkit for creating beautiful user interfaces on Android. You will write these apps in the Kotlin programming language and learn best practices in Material Design, app architecture, data storage, fetching data from the network, testing, and more. No programming experience required.

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

[Get started](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/adopt/for-large-teams)

### [Less code](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#less-code)

Fewer lines of code translates into code that’s easy to read and maintain, less bugs, and more time to focus on building unique app experiences.

[Do more with less](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#less-code)

### [Intuitive](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#intuitive)

Describe your UI using Compose declarative APIs, that are legible and easy to find.

[See how](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#intuitive)

### [Accelerate development](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#accelerate-development)

Iterate quickly with live previews, full tooling support, and easier theming, with small components that are easy to test.

[Build faster](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#accelerate-development)

### [Powerful](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#powerful)

Concise Kotlin DSL APIs, and out-of-the-box Material Design give your teams easier access to the best of Android.

[Get started](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/why-adopt#powerful)

### [Tablet and foldables](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/layouts/adaptive/support-different-display-sizes)

Develop UIs that provide your users a good experience across any display size.

### [Wear OS](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/compose)

Write apps for wearables that help your users live more present, healthy, and productive lives.

### [Android TV](https://developer.android.com/training/tv/playback/compose)

Build apps for TV to connect with your users in their homes.

### [Widgets](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose/glance)

Enable your users to quickly see the most important content from your app on their home screen.

### What developers are saying

See what developers like about using Jetpack Compose.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/max_2880.png)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/06/max-implemented-ui-changes-faster-using-jetpack-compose.html)

### [MAX](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/06/max-implemented-ui-changes-faster-using-jetpack-compose.html)

“**Compose significantly reduced the time** required to implement UI changes, **solving the pain point** of maintaining a large, complex UI codebase and **making it easier to iterate** on the app's design and user experience.”

[Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/06/max-implemented-ui-changes-faster-using-jetpack-compose.html)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/soundcloud_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=djsqFDCUQrk)

### [SoundCloud](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=djsqFDCUQrk)

“We were able to save up to **45% of lines of code** when migrating screens from XML views to Compose. We used Compose to prototype, and it enabled us to **iterate fast** even when we changed our design ideas daily.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=djsqFDCUQrk)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/05/soundcloud-supported-more-screens-with-jetpack-compose.html)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/adidas_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C5V2MTc5Wtw)

### [adidas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C5V2MTc5Wtw)

“I can build the same feature with Compose about **30% faster** than with Views. **Compose's efficiency** not only **accelerated development**, but also helped us **achieve our business goals**.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C5V2MTc5Wtw)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/06/developers-for-adidas-confirmed-build-features-faster-using-jetpack-compose.html)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/google-drive.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_pM2SsV5n0)

### [Google Drive](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_pM2SsV5n0)

“Compose, combined with architecture improvements, cut our development time nearly in half.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_pM2SsV5n0)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/04/google-drive-cut-code-and-development-time-in-half-with-jetpack-compose-and-new-architecture.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/threads-logo_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8PAZw0xhhEQ&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=6)

### [Threads](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8PAZw0xhhEQ&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=6)

“For developers who are building new apps, I would definitely recommend using Compose. Not only is it **enjoyable**... **it sets your team up for success** in the future.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8PAZw0xhhEQ&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=6)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/10/meta-built-threads-in-only-5-months-using-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/reddit-logo_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hb5vWCwPmfE&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=8)

### [Reddit](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hb5vWCwPmfE&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=8)

“Compose has helped us with **engineering retention**. In our developer surveys, our engineers tell us that Compose is one of the **biggest improvements to our dev experience**.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hb5vWCwPmfE&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc9ECua7vzYbowdn-0L8WwHL&index=8)
 [Read more](https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/building-reddit-recap-with-jetpack-compose-on-android-dbe34ae4c957)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/dropbox_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=quY2B_6shy0)

### [Dropbox](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=quY2B_6shy0)

“We rewrote the search experience using Compose in just a matter of weeks. It took **40% less time than anticipated** to build the feature, and took **less than half the time** it took to build it on iOS.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=quY2B_6shy0)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/06/dropbox-rebuilt-search-experience-faster-with-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/lyft_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QO6Cg9MSpE8&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc_L3n1j4ajHjJ6QccFUvW1u&index=30)

### [Lyft](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QO6Cg9MSpE8&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc_L3n1j4ajHjJ6QccFUvW1u&index=30)

"Compose is clearly the future of Android development. It **requires less code**, and it's **easier to understand and maintain.**"

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QO6Cg9MSpE8&list=PLWz5rJ2EKKc_L3n1j4ajHjJ6QccFUvW1u&index=30)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/10/lyft-reduced-their-code-for-ui-components-using-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/airbnb_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=23sNq-N06xU)

### [Airbnb](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=23sNq-N06xU)

“We’ve prioritized building sound technical foundations and empowering our engineers to do excellent work. Jetpack Compose enabled both of these goals and is a **critical part of our technical strategy.**”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=23sNq-N06xU)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/05/airbnb-uses-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/clue_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5XJ_uTGxmBg)

### [Clue](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5XJ_uTGxmBg)

“We noticed a massive improvement in our productivity. Our **development speed increased up to 3X** compared to our legacy codebase.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5XJ_uTGxmBg)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/04/clues-development-speed-improves-after-rebuilding-with-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/x-logo_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7N9rKu7l_5U)

### [X](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7N9rKu7l_5U)

“Compose **increased our productivity** dramatically. It’s much **easier and faster** to write a Composeable function than to create a custom view, and it’s also made it much easier to fulfill our designers’ requirements.”

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7N9rKu7l_5U)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/04/twitter-going-all-in-on-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/zepeto_2880.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUvct-zUfeI)

### [ZEPETO](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUvct-zUfeI)

"We rewrote the Character Shop feature in Compose. It was **much faster** to write it in Compose, and we **reduced the amount of code by over 10%.**"

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUvct-zUfeI)
 [Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/10/zepeto-plans-to-migrate-80-percent-of-apps-ui-to-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/mercari_2880.png)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/03/mercari-reduces-lines-of-code-by-rebuilding-with-jetpack-compose.html)

### [Mercari](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/03/mercari-reduces-lines-of-code-by-rebuilding-with-jetpack-compose.html)

“It’s the same app with **way less code**. The rewritten app has about **355,000 fewer lines of code**, which is about **69% less** than what it had before.”

[Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/03/mercari-reduces-lines-of-code-by-rebuilding-with-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/google-play.svg)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/03/play-time-with-jetpack-compose.html)

### [Play Store](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/03/play-time-with-jetpack-compose.html)

“Compose has been a boon for our team’s developer happiness, and **a big step-up for code quality and health.**”

[Read more](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/03/play-time-with-jetpack-compose.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/block_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/square-compose)

### [Block](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/square-compose)

“By using Compose, **we can focus on things that are unique** to Block and our UI infrastructure, rather than solving the broader issue of building a declarative UI framework.”

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/develop/ui/compose/images/adopt/cuvva_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/cuvva-compose)

# Android XR  |  Multidevice  |  Android Developers

[Skip to main content](https://developer.android.com/xr#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt

*   日本語

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/)
    
*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)
    
*   [Android XR](https://developer.android.com/xr)
    

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

[Develop your app](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr)

### [Android Jetpack XR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/jetpack-xr-sdk)

Most Android apps are compatible with Android XR without any additional development effort. Android XR handles device interaction and lifecycle management, so you can focus on innovation.

[Develop with Jetpack XR SDK](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/jetpack-xr-sdk)

### [Unity](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/unity)

Get full access to Unity's content production features, and easily bring apps from other platforms to Android XR. Ensure smooth development with performance optimization tools, a large asset store, and a strong community.

[Develop with Unity](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/unity)

### [OpenXR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/openxr)

Streamline development with OpenXR's royalty-free open standard. Build anywhere using a common set of APIs to develop XR apps that work across a range of devices.

[Develop with OpenXR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/openxr)

### [WebXR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/develop-with-webxr)

Use the power of web technologies to build XR experiences directly in a browser. WebXR makes extended reality available to anyone with a device and a supported web browser.

[Develop with WebXR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/develop-with-webxr)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/design.svg)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr)

### [Design for Android XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr)

The Android XR design guidelines include ready-to-go design systems, styles, UI scaling, components, spatial panels, 3D models, and environments.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/policy.svg)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started)

### [Follow XR principles](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started)

Start from where you are, make users feel comfortable, explore experiences that feel special in XR, and ensure your app is accessible.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/learn.svg)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations)

### [Learn XR foundations](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations)

Android XR helps you build high-quality XR apps quickly. You can spatialize an existing app's content, layouts, and UI elements using prebuilt components.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/toggle.svg)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations#design-multimodal)

### [Use natural interactions](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations#design-multimodal)

Android XR gives users flexibility and control. Users can interact with your app through hand and eye tracking, voice commands, and Bluetooth devices.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/xr/spatialize-app-environments_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr)

### [Android XR developer preview](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr)

Be one of the first developers to build an Android XR app.

[Develop with Android XR](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/xr/hello-xr-sample_2880.jpg)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/tools-2.svg)

### Build without barriers

Make your vision come to life with spatial frameworks, infinite display space, and multimodal inputs that allow for endless creativity and dynamic functionality.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/distribution.svg)

### Simplify how you create

Easily bring 2D apps to XR or go all in on 3D experiences. Fuel fast development with trusted tools and industry-leading APIs.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/machine-learning.svg)

### Scale for the future with Android

Expand your app's reach with Android XR's open ecosystem of device makers and the Play Store's wide user base.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/bug.svg)](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/support)

### [Bug tracker](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/support)

Report an issue and track bugs

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

*   English

*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   中文 – 简体
*   日本語
*   한국어

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/)
    
*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice)
    
*   [Adaptive apps](https://developer.android.com/adaptive-apps)
    

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/large-screens/adaptive-apps-hero_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/build-adaptive-apps)

[Build adaptive](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/build-adaptive-apps)
 [Get inspired](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/pencils.svg)

### Build for more devices, more users

Simplify development across all types of devices. Reach the fastest growing segment of Android users on more than 300 million large screen Android devices, including premium flagship devices.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/trophy.svg)

### Rank higher on Google Play

Adaptive apps rank higher and are more often selected for [Editors’ Choice on Google Play](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/07/introducing-new-play-store-for-large-screens.html)
. Help users find apps that resize well, aren't letterboxed, and support portrait and landscape orientations.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/graph-line.svg)

### Attract and retain users

Adaptive apps have higher user satisfaction, user engagement, and time-in-app metrics on large screen form factors such as foldables, tablets, and ChromeOS devices.

### Create adaptive layouts

Provide a great user experience on all device form factors, from conventional phones to tablets to cars. Adapt your app's UI to different display sizes and configurations to enhance the user experience, improve accessibility, future-proof your app for new devices, and reduce development and maintenance costs.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/layouts/adaptive)

### Support external input devices

Increase your app's reach and accessibility. Create a truly inclusive user experience by optimizing your app for a wide range of input devices. Ensure effortless interaction with mouse, trackpad, keyboard, stylus, and accessibility tools, empowering every user to easily navigate your app and realize its full potential.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/compose/touch-input)

### Showcase differentiating experiences

Leverage the latest advancements in the Android ecosystem to create unique user experiences. New form factors, such as foldable devices, offer innovative device configurations, like tabletop posture, which enables users to operate their foldable device without holding it in their hands. Differentiate your app from the ordinary with exceptional capabilities.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/learn-about-foldables)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/large-screens/tour-the-gallery_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery)

### [Tour the large screen gallery](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery)

Explore inspiring, optimized designs for large screen devices. Browse UI/UX templates for popular app categories, including media, creativity, games, and more.

[View the gallery](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/large-screens/many-apps_2880.png)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/stories)

### [Check out adaptive app success stories](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/stories)

Optimize your app for screens of all sizes to provide the best experience for your users and deliver positive business results. More and more apps across all categories have been taking advantage of the opportunities presented by multiple form factors. See the experiences developers have built, learn about the implementations they've created, and find out why adaptive app development is important to their businesses.

[View developer stories](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/stories)

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/kotlin-hero.svg)

### Develop Android apps with Kotlin

Write better Android apps faster with Kotlin. Kotlin is a modern statically typed programming language used by over 60% of professional Android developers that helps boost productivity, developer satisfaction, and code safety.

[Get started](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/first)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/code.svg)

### Expressive and concise

Kotlin's modern language features allow you to focus on expressing your ideas and write less boilerplate code.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/learn)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/actionable.svg)

### Safer code

With nullability included in its type system, Kotlin helps you avoid NullPointerExceptions. Android apps that use Kotlin are 20% less likely to crash.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/learn#null-safety)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/jetpack-compose.svg)

### Jetpack Compose

Android's modern UI toolkit is built on Kotlin, allowing you to create UI quickly with powerful and intuitive APIs.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/kmp.svg)

### Kotlin Multiplatform

Share code across Android, iOS, and desktop platforms with Kotlin Multiplatform.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/multiplatform)

* * *

getting started

### [Learning Android & Kotlin from scratch](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course)

View our guides for beginners, teaching you how to build Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

getting started

### [Kotlin for Android Java developers](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/add-kotlin)

If you already know Java, our interop guides and documentation can help you get started.

getting started

### [Advanced Kotlin guides](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/coroutines)

If you’re already familiar with Kotlin, read our advanced documentation to increase your skills.

getting started

### [Bringing Kotlin to your team](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/adopt-for-large-teams)

Learn how writing in Kotlin can boost your team’s productivity, improve app quality, and increase developer satisfaction.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/android-studio.svg)

### Android Studio

Android Studio provides first-class support for Kotlin. It even has built-in tools to help you convert Java-based code to Kotlin. The Show Kotlin Bytecode tool lets you to see the equivalent Java-based code as you learn Kotlin.

[Download](https://developer.android.com/studio)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/android-ktx.svg)

### Android KTX

Android KTX makes Android development with Kotlin more concise, pleasant, and idiomatic by leveraging Kotlin language features.

[Learn more](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/ktx)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/kotlin-friendly-sdk.svg)

### Kotlin-friendly SDK

Starting with Android 9 (API level 28), the Android SDK contains nullability annotations to help avoid NullPointerExceptions. API reference documentation is also available in Kotlin.

[See documentation](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/learning-resources.svg)

### Learning resources

Explore a curated set of resources in various formats to help you jumpstart learning Kotlin.

[See resources](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/getting-started-resources)

  ![Nullable and NonNull types help reduce NullPointerExceptions, lambdas can be used for concise event handling code, template expressions can be used in strings to avoid concatenation and semicolons are optional.](https://developer.android.com/static/images/kotlin/code-samples/code-sample-newsmall.svg)

### [Apps built with Kotlin](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/stories)

Many apps are already built with Kotlin—from the hottest startups to Fortune 500 companies. Learn how Kotlin has helped their teams become more productive and write higher quality apps.

[See developer stories](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/stories)

Developer story

### Zomato uses Kotlin to write safer, more concise code

Kotlin helped Zomato reduce the number of lines of code in their app significantly, and it has also helped them find important defects in their app at compile time.

Watch Zomato's Rahul, Vice President, Product Management, and Prateek Sharma, Android developer, talk about how Zomato started adopting Kotlin and about how they now use it for all new feature releases.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/kotlin/kotlin-logo-color.svg)](https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin)

Featured

### [Kotlin is open source](https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin)

Kotlin is an open source project available at no charge under the Apache 2.0 license. The code for the project is developed openly on GitHub primarily by the team employed at JetBrains, with contributions from Google and others. Our choice of Kotlin reaffirms our commitment to an open developer ecosystem as we evolve and grow the Android platform, and we are excited to see the language evolve.

[See Kotlin on GitHub](https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/kotlin/icons/android-codelabs.svg)](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/codelabs/kotlin-coroutines/#0)

[Explore articles](https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/tagged/kotlin)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/courses.svg)](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=it) Questa pagina è stata tradotta dall'[API Cloud Translation](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=it)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=it)
    
*   [Giochi essenziali](https://developer.android.com/get-started?hl=it)
    

Mantieni tutto organizzato con le raccolte Salva e classifica i contenuti in base alle tue preferenze.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/launch-app.svg?hl=it)

### Nozioni di base su Android

Esplora i tutorial di documentazione, formazione e codelab per sviluppare le tue competenze Android, sia per i neofiti della piattaforma che per gli sviluppatori esperti che vogliono utilizzare le funzionalità dell'ultima release. Scopri come estendere l'esperienza utente della tua app su una moltitudine di dispositivi e come sfruttare Google Play per guadagnare con la tua app.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/launch.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview?hl=it)

### [Per iniziare](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview?hl=it)

Segui un breve tutorial o approfondisci un corso di formazione per avere una panoramica dei principali argomenti sullo sviluppo di Android.

[Inizia](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/app-quality.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/about/versions?hl=it)

### [Trovare le release per Android](https://developer.android.com/about/versions?hl=it)

Esplora la release di anteprima attuale di Android 14, Android 13, Android 12 e le release precedenti di Android.

[Aggiorna](https://developer.android.com/about/versions?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/play.svg?hl=it)](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/?hl=it)

### [Monetizza](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/?hl=it)

Guadagna con abbonamenti, transazioni finanziarie e importanti flussi di acquisto con Google Play.

[Guadagna](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/earth.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

### [insieme è meglio](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

Crea esperienze avanzate per consentire alla tua app di funzionare meglio insieme su più dispositivi.

[Espandi](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/better-together-hero.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

### [Supporto di più dispositivi](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

Android è progettato per tutti, ovunque e per offrire agli utenti una scelta più ampia in merito ai dispositivi, in base al design, alle funzionalità o al valore complessivo. Estendi l'esperienza utente supportando una gamma di dispositivi e fattori di forma.

[Informazioni sul supporto multidispositivo](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/in-app-subscriptions.svg?hl=it)](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/?hl=it)

### [Monetizza con Google Play](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/?hl=it)

Monetizza e integra un sistema di fatturazione nella tua app utilizzando Google Play. Google Play offre una varietà di funzionalità e assistenza per aiutarti a guadagnare con la tua app raggiungendo al contempo un mercato globale.

[Fatturazione Google Play](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/monetize/?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/android-ai-tools-hero.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/ai?hl=it)

### [AI su Android](https://developer.android.com/ai?hl=it)

Consenti alle tue app per Android di generare testo e immagini, comprendere i contenuti, arricchire le informazioni e creare coinvolgimento con gli utenti. Utilizza la suite completa di strumenti IA e ML di Google per rendere le tue app più utili e intuitive.

[Esplora l'IA su Android](https://developer.android.com/ai?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/home/productivity.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/productivity?hl=it)

### [Produttività](https://developer.android.com/productivity?hl=it)

Fai salire di livello la tua app di produttività con contenuti multimediali, layout adattivi e altro ancora.

[Visualizza centro sviluppatori](https://developer.android.com/productivity?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/game-controller.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/games?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/courses.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/media?hl=it)

### [App multimediali](https://developer.android.com/media?hl=it)

La prima tappa per i contenuti sullo sviluppo di app multimediali.

[Visualizza centro sviluppatori](https://developer.android.com/media?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/chat-bubbles-2.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging?hl=it)

### [Social e messaggistica](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging?hl=it)

Crea app che collegano, comunicano e condividono informazioni.

[Visualizza centro sviluppatori](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/plus.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/health-connect?hl=it)

### [Salute e fitness](https://developer.android.com/health-connect?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/app-bundle.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/work?hl=it)

### [App aziendali](https://developer.android.com/work?hl=it)

Sfrutta le API e altri strumenti per creare soluzioni aziendali.

[Visualizza le linee guida](https://developer.android.com/work?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/android.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/about/versions?hl=it)

### [Scopri la release più recente di Android](https://developer.android.com/about/versions?hl=it)

Visualizzare le release più recenti della piattaforma Android, inclusa la release di anteprima corrente.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/android-jetpack.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/versions?hl=it)

### [Esplora le ultime librerie Jetpack](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/versions?hl=it)

Le librerie Jetpack vengono fornite separatamente dal sistema operativo Android, pertanto gli aggiornamenti delle librerie possono avvenire in modo indipendente e con maggiore frequenza.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/android-studio-canary.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/studio/preview?hl=it)

### [Scarica l'anteprima di Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio/preview?hl=it)

Accedi in anteprima alle funzionalità e ai miglioramenti più recenti di Android Studio.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wear-os-development.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/versions/4?hl=it)

### [Ricevi l'anteprima per gli sviluppatori Wear OS](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/versions/4?hl=it)

La prossima versione di Wear OS è ora disponibile per i test, lo sviluppo e i feedback. Prova questa funzionalità con le tue app e facci sapere cosa ne pensi.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/lock.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design-for-safety/privacy-sandbox?hl=it)

### [Privacy Sandbox su Android](https://developer.android.com/design-for-safety/privacy-sandbox?hl=it)

Privacy Sandbox su Android mira a sviluppare nuove tecnologie che migliorino la privacy degli utenti e consentano esperienze pubblicitarie efficaci e personalizzate per le app mobile.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/marvel-strike-force-icon_2880.png?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/stories/instant-apps/marvel-strike-force?hl=it)

### [Marvel Strike Force migliora il tasso di installazione](https://developer.android.com/stories/instant-apps/marvel-strike-force?hl=it)

A causa delle grandi dimensioni dei file, il numero di installazioni organiche è stato inferiore a quanto il team sperava in un franchising così popolare. Google Play Instant in soccorso.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/compose-cluster.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/cuvva-compose?hl=it)

### [Cuvva adotta Jetpack Compose](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/cuvva-compose?hl=it)

Scopri come gli ingegneri Android di Cuvva hanno riprogettato l'architettura della loro app per utilizzare un flusso di dati unidirezionale e Jetpack Compose.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/duolingo-icon_2880.png?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/duolingo-kotlin?hl=it)

### [Duolingo riduce il numero delle linee di una media del 30%](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/duolingo-kotlin?hl=it)

Dopo aver notato che il numero di righe della base di codice aumentava del 46% ogni anno, gli sviluppatori Android di Duolingo sono riusciti a eseguire la migrazione da Java a Kotlin.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/android-jetpack-hero.svg?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/getting-started?hl=tr)

### [Android Jetpack](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/getting-started?hl=tr)

Jetpack, geliştiricilerin en iyi uygulamaları takip etmesine, ortak metin kodlarını azaltmasına, ayrıca Android sürümleri ve cihazlarında tutarlı bir şekilde çalışan kodlar yazmasına yardımcı olan bir kitaplık paketidir. Böylece geliştiriciler asıl önem verdikleri şey olan koda odaklanabilirler.

[Jetpack'i kullanmaya başlama](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/getting-started?hl=tr)
 [Videoyu izleyin](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LmkKFCfmnhQ&%3Bfeature=youtu.be&%3Bhl=tr&hl=tr)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/training/basics/firstapp/images/first_app.svg?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose?hl=tr)

Jetpack Compose

### [Compose ile kullanıcı arayüzü geliştirme](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose?hl=tr)

Android'de kullanıcı arayüzü geliştirmesini basitleştirmenizi ve hızlandırmanızı sağlayan, yerel kullanıcı arayüzü oluşturmaya yönelik modern bir araç seti.

[Başlama](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/compose?hl=tr)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/learn.svg?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course?hl=tr)

### [Temel Bilgiler Eğitimi](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course?hl=tr)

Compose ile Android hakkında temel bilgiler kursunda temel Jetpack kitaplıklarını öğrenin ve uygulamanızda ortak metin kullanımını azaltın

[Kursu başlatopen\_in\_new](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course?hl=tr)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/courses.svg?hl=tr)](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/codelabs/android-room-with-a-view-kotlin/?hl=tr#0)

### [Uygulamalı Eğitim](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/codelabs/android-room-with-a-view-kotlin/?hl=tr#0)

Veri katmanınızı basitleştiren üç Jetpack kitaplığını uygulamalı olarak kullanın: LiveData, ViewModel ve Room

[Eğiticiyi başlatopen\_in\_new](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/codelabs/android-room-with-a-view-kotlin/?hl=tr#0)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/code.svg?hl=tr)](https://github.com/android/nowinandroid)

### [Şimdi Android örnek uygulamasında](https://github.com/android/nowinandroid)

Modern Android mimarisinin gerçek dünyadaki bir uygulamada nasıl uygulandığını keşfedin

[Kodu gösteropen\_in\_new](https://github.com/android/nowinandroid)

### Jetpack kitaplıkları [Tüm kitaplıkları keşfedin](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/explorer?hl=tr)

\* Popüler ve sık kullanılan kitaplıklar önce listelenir.

|     |     |
| --- | --- | 
| [activity \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/activity?hl=tr) | Etkinlik üzerine kurulu birleştirilebilir API'lere erişin. |
| [appcompat \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/appcompat?hl=tr) | Platformun eski API sürümlerinde yeni API'lere (birçoğu Material Design kullanır) erişime izin verir. |
| [appsearch \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/appsearch?hl=tr) | Kullanıcılarınız için özel uygulama içi arama özellikleri oluşturun. |
| [kamera \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/camera?hl=tr) | Mobil kamera uygulamaları oluşturun. |
| [compose \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose?hl=tr) | Şeklini ve veri bağımlılıklarını açıklayan birleştirilebilir işlevlerle kullanıcı arayüzünüzü programatik olarak tanımlayın. |
| [databinding \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/databinding?hl=tr) | Düzenlerinizdeki kullanıcı arayüzü bileşenlerini, bildirim temelli bir biçim kullanarak uygulamanızdaki veri kaynaklarına bağlayın. |
| [fragment \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/fragment?hl=tr) | Uygulamanızı bir Etkinlik içinde barındırılan birden fazla bağımsız ekrana ayırın. |
| [hilt \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/hilt?hl=tr) | Dagger Hilt'in işlevselliğini genişleterek androidx kitaplıklarındaki belirli sınıfların bağımlılık eklenmesini sağlayın. |
| [yaşam döngüsü \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/lifecycle?hl=tr) | Etkinliğin veya parçanın mevcut yaşam döngüsü durumuna göre davranışını ayarlayabilen, yaşam döngüsüne duyarlı bileşenler oluşturun. |
| [Materyal Tasarım Bileşenleri \*](https://m3.material.io/develop/android/jetpack-compose) | Android için modüler ve özelleştirilebilir Material Design kullanıcı arayüzü bileşenleri. |
| [navigation \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/navigation?hl=tr) | Uygulama içi kullanıcı arayüzünüzü oluşturup yapılandırın, derin bağlantıları yönetin ve ekranlar arasında gezinin. |
| [paging \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/paging?hl=tr) | Verileri sayfalara yükleyin ve RecyclerView'da sunun. |
| [oda \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/room?hl=tr) | SQLite veritabanı tarafından desteklenen kalıcı veriler oluşturun, depolayın ve yönetin. |
| [test \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/test?hl=tr) | Android'de test etme |
| [iş \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/work?hl=tr) | Ertelenebilir ve kısıtlamaya dayalı arka plan görevlerini planlayın ve yürütün. |
| [ads](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/ads?hl=tr) | Play Hizmetleri ile veya Play Hizmetleri olmadan reklam kimliği alma |
| [annotation](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/annotation?hl=tr) | Araçların ve diğer geliştiricilerin uygulamanızın kodunu anlamasına yardımcı olan meta verileri kullanıma sunun. |
| [appfunctions](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/appfunctions?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [arch.core](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/arch-core?hl=tr) | LiveData ile kullanılabilen JUnit test kuralları da dahil olmak üzere diğer mimari bağımlılıklar için yardımcı. |
| [asynclayoutinflater](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/asynclayoutinflater?hl=tr) | Kullanıcı arayüzünde takılmayı önlemek için düzenleri eşzamansız olarak genişletin. |
| [autofill](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/autofill?hl=tr) | İpuçlarını genişleterek otomatik doldurma doğruluğunu artırın. |
| [karşılaştırma](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/benchmark?hl=tr) | Kodunuzun performansını Android Studio'da doğru şekilde ölçün. |
| [biometric](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/biometric?hl=tr) | Biyometri veya cihaz kimlik bilgileriyle kimliğinizi doğrulayın ve şifreleme işlemleri gerçekleştirin. |
| [bluetooth](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/bluetooth?hl=tr) | Android platformunun Bluetooth özelliklerini geriye dönük uyumlu API'lerle kullanın. |
| [browser](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/browser?hl=tr) | Web sayfalarını kullanıcının varsayılan tarayıcısında görüntüleme |
| [camera.featurecombinationquery](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/camera-featurecombinationquery?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [camera.media3](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/camera-media3?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [camera.viewfinder](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/camera-viewfinder?hl=tr) | Kamera için bağımsız Composable ve View tabanlı vizör" |
| [car-app](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/car-app?hl=tr) | Android Auto ve Android Automotive OS için şablonlu uygulamalar oluşturun. |
| [cardview](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/cardview?hl=tr) | Yuvarlak köşeli ve gölge efektli Materyal Tasarım kart desenini uygulayın. |
| [collection](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/collection?hl=tr) | Küçük olan mevcut ve yeni koleksiyonların bellek üzerindeki etkisini azaltır. |
| [compose.animation](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-animation?hl=tr) | Kullanıcı deneyimini zenginleştirmek için Jetpack Compose uygulamalarında animasyonlar oluşturun. |
| [compose.compiler](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-compiler?hl=tr) | @Composable işlevlerini dönüştürün ve Kotlin derleyici eklentisiyle optimizasyonları etkinleştirin. |
| [compose.foundation](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-foundation?hl=tr) | Kullanıma hazır yapı taşlarıyla Jetpack Compose uygulamaları yazın ve kendi tasarım sistemi parçalarınızı oluşturmak için temeli genişletin. |
| [compose.material](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-material?hl=tr) | Kullanıma hazır Materyal Tasarım bileşenleriyle Jetpack Compose kullanıcı arayüzleri oluşturun. Bu, www.material.io adresinde açıklanan bileşenleri sağlamak üzere tasarlanmış, Compose'un daha üst düzey giriş noktasıdır. |
| [compose.material3](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-material3?hl=tr) | Materyal Tasarım'ın bir sonraki evrimi olan Materyal Tasarım 3 Bileşenleri ile Jetpack Compose kullanıcı arayüzleri oluşturun. Material 3; güncellenmiş temalar ve bileşenler ile dinamik renk gibi Material You kişiselleştirme özelliklerini içerir. Ayrıca yeni Android 12 görsel stili ve sistem kullanıcı arayüzüyle uyumlu olacak şekilde tasarlanmıştır. |
| [compose.material3.adaptive](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-material3-adaptive?hl=tr) | Pencere boyutu sınıfları veya cihaz duruşları gibi mevcut pencere yapılandırmalarına göre otomatik olarak uyarlanacak uyarlanabilir kullanıcı arayüzleri oluşturmak için Material 3 uyarlanabilir kitaplığını kullanın. Kitaplık, hem varsayılan iskele uygulamaları hem de kendi özel deneyimlerinizi oluşturmak için gerekli yapı taşı composable'ları sağlar. |
| [compose.runtime](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-runtime?hl=tr) | Compose'un programlama modeli ve durum yönetiminin temel yapı taşları ve Compose Compiler Plugin'in hedefleyeceği temel çalışma zamanı. |
| [compose.ui](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/compose-ui?hl=tr) | Düzen, çizim ve giriş dahil olmak üzere cihazla etkileşim kurmak için gereken Compose kullanıcı arayüzünün temel bileşenleri. |
| [eşzamanlı](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/concurrent?hl=tr)<br> (concurrent) | Eş yordamlarla görevleri ana ileti dizisinden taşıyın ve ListenableFuture'dan yararlanın. |
| [constraintlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/constraintlayout?hl=tr) | Göreceli konumlandırma ile widget'ları esnek bir şekilde konumlandırın ve boyutlandırın. |
| [contentpager](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/contentpager?hl=tr) | ContentProvider verilerini arka plan iş parçacığında yükleme ve sayfalandırma. |
| [coordinatorlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/coordinatorlayout?hl=tr) | AppBarLayout ve FloatingActionButton gibi üst düzey uygulama widget'larını konumlandırın. |
| [core](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/core?hl=tr) | Eski cihazları desteklerken en yeni platform özelliklerini ve API'lerini hedefleyin. |
| [core.uwb](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/core-uwb?hl=tr) | Desteklenen cihazlarda ultra geniş bant teknolojisini kullanın. |
| [credentials](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/credentials?hl=tr) | Bu kitaplık, kullanıcının kimlik bilgilerine birleşik erişim sağlar. Şifreler, geçiş anahtarları ve birleştirilmiş kimlik bilgileri bu kapsamda yer alabilir. Bu kitaplık, sorunsuz ve güvenli oturum açma deneyimleri sunmak için kullanılmalıdır. |
| [credentials.providerevents](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/credentials-providerevents?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [credentials.registry](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/credentials-registry?hl=tr) | Bu sorunları çözmek için, uygulamaların gizliliği koruyarak dijital kimlik bilgileri sağlamasına olanak tanıyan yeni bir kayıt mekanizması ekliyoruz. Sağlayıcı uygulaması, tüm aday dijital kimlik bilgilerini Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ne önceden kaydeder. Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, belirli bir dijital kimlik bilgisi için uygulama isteği aldığında kimlik bilgisi eşleştirme ve kullanıcı seçici kullanıcı arayüzünü bir sanal ortamda çalıştırır. |
| [cursoradapter](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/cursoradapter?hl=tr) | Cursor verilerini ListView widget'ına gösterme. |
| [customview](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/customview?hl=tr) | Özel görünümleri uygulayın. |
| [datastore](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/datastore?hl=tr) | Verileri eşzamansız, tutarlı ve işlemsel olarak depolayarak SharedPreferences'ın bazı dezavantajlarını ortadan kaldırır. |
| [documentfile](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/documentfile?hl=tr) | Dosya dokümanını görüntüleme |
| [draganddrop](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/draganddrop?hl=tr) | Başka bir uygulamadan veya bir uygulama içinden sürükleyip bırakılan verileri kabul edin ve tutarlı bir bırakma hedefi olanağı gösterin. |
| [drawerlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/drawerlayout?hl=tr) | Materyal Tasarım çekmece widget'ı uygulayın. |
| [dynamicanimation](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/dynamicanimation?hl=tr) | Fizik tabanlı bir animasyon API'si ile sorunsuz animasyonlar oluşturun. |
| [emoji](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/emoji?hl=tr) | Mevcut ve eski cihazlarda emoji görüntüleme |
| [emoji2](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/emoji2?hl=tr) | Mevcut ve eski cihazlarda emoji görüntüleme |
| [enterprise](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/enterprise?hl=tr) | Kurumsal kullanıma hazır uygulamalar oluşturun. |
| [exifinterface](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/exifinterface?hl=tr) | Resim dosyası EXIF etiketlerini okuma ve yazma |
| [oyunlar](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/games?hl=tr) | Frame Pacing gibi karmaşık oyun görevlerini gerçekleştirmek için Android Game SDK'sını uygulamanızda yerel olarak kullanın. |
| [glance](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/glance?hl=tr) | Jetpack Compose tarzı bir API kullanarak uzak yüzeyler için düzenler oluşturun. |
| [graphics](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/graphics?hl=tr) | Birden fazla Android platform sürümünde grafik özelliklerinden yararlanma |
| [gridlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/gridlayout?hl=tr) | Izgara düzeni uygulayın. |
| [sağlık](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/health?hl=tr) | Platformdan bağımsız bir şekilde yüksek performanslı sağlık uygulamaları oluşturun. |
| [health.connect](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/health-connect?hl=tr) | Geliştiricilerin, kullanıcının sağlık ve fitness kayıtlarını okumasına veya yazmasına olanak tanır. |
| [heifwriter](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/heifwriter?hl=tr) | Android cihazdaki kullanılabilir codec'leri kullanarak bir resmi veya resim koleksiyonunu HEIF biçiminde kodlayın. |
| [ink](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/ink?hl=tr) | Sınıfının en iyisi kalem uygulamaları geliştirin. Yüksek performanslı ve güzel mürekkep deneyimleri için geliştiricilerin giriş engelini azaltın. |
| [input](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/input?hl=tr) | Gelecekteki MotionEvent'leri tahmin ederek giriş etkileşimlerinin gecikmesini azaltma |
| [interpolator](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/interpolator?hl=tr) | Eski platformlarda animasyon interpolatörlerini kullanın. |
| [javascriptengine](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/javascriptengine?hl=tr) | Android uygulamanızın JavaScript'i değerlendirmesini sağlayın. |
| [jetifier](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/jetifier?hl=tr) | Kitaplığın, desteği sonlandırılan destek kitaplığına olan bağımlılıklarını eşdeğer AndroidX bağımlılıklarına taşıyan bağımsız bir araç. |
| [leanback](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/leanback?hl=tr) | Bu yapay nesne yerine TV için Oluştur'u kullanın. |
| [legacy](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/legacy?hl=tr) | Bu yapı ve sınıfları kullanımdan kaldırılmıştır. Android 8'den itibaren geçmiş kontrolü kısıtlamaları bu sınıfı artık kullanışsız hale getiriyor. |
| [lint](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/lint?hl=tr) | Gradle API'lerinin kullanımını doğrulamak için Lint kontrolleri |
| [loader](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/loader?hl=tr) | Yapılandırma değişikliklerinden etkilenmeyen kullanıcı arayüzünüz için verileri yükleyin. |
| [localbroadcastmanager](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/localbroadcastmanager?hl=tr) | Bu yapı ve sınıfları kullanımdan kaldırılmıştır. Bunun yerine LiveData veya reaktif akışları kullanın. |
| [media](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/media?hl=tr) | Medya içeriklerini ve kontrollerini diğer uygulamalarla paylaşma media3'ün yerini aldı. |
| [media3 \*](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/media3?hl=tr) | Medya kullanım alanları için destek kitaplıkları. |
| [mediarouter](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/mediarouter?hl=tr) | Ortak bir kullanıcı arayüzü kullanarak uzaktaki alıcı cihazlarda medya görüntüleme ve oynatmayı etkinleştirin. |
| [multidex](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/multidex?hl=tr) | Android 5 öncesi cihazlara birden fazla dex dosyası içeren uygulamalar dağıtın. |
| [metrikler](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/metrics?hl=tr) | Uygulamanız için çeşitli çalışma zamanı metriklerini izleme ve raporlama |
| [navigation3](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/navigation3?hl=tr) | Navigation 3, Compose ile çalışmak üzere tasarlanmış yeni bir gezinme kitaplığıdır. |
| [navigationevent](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/navigationevent?hl=tr) | Navigation Event kitaplığı, sistemde geri gitme ve \[tahmini geri gitme\](/guide/navigation/custom-back/predictive-back-gesture) işlemlerini yönetmek için KMP öncelikli bir API sağlar. |
| [palette](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/palette?hl=tr) | Resimlerden temsili renk paletleri çıkarın. |
| [pdf](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/pdf?hl=tr) | Uygulamalara PDF görüntüleme özellikleri eklemek için kullanılan bir kitaplık. |
| [percentlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/percentlayout?hl=tr) | Bu yapı ve sınıfları kullanımdan kaldırılmıştır. Bunun yerine ConstraintLayout ve ilişkili düzenleri kullanın. |
| [performans](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/performance?hl=tr) | Performans optimizasyonları için kaynak ek açıklamaları sağlar. |
| [photopicker](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/photopicker?hl=tr) | Bu kitaplık, yerleştirilmiş fotoğraf seçici için Compose ve Android Views'i entegre etmenizi sağlar. |
| [tercih](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/preference?hl=tr) | Cihaz depolama alanıyla etkileşimde bulunmaya veya kullanıcı arayüzünü yönetmeye gerek kalmadan etkileşimli ayarlar ekranları oluşturun. |
| [print](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/print?hl=tr) | Uygulamanızdaki fotoğrafları, dokümanları ve diğer grafikleri ve resimleri yazdırın. |
| [privacysandbox.activity](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-activity?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [privacysandbox.ads](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-ads?hl=tr) | Bu kitaplık, Android'deki Özel Korumalı Alan'ın bir parçası olan gizliliği korumaya yönelik API'lerle entegrasyonu sağlar. |
| [privacysandbox.plugins](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-plugins?hl=tr) | Android Privacy Sandbox Sdk Library Gradle Plugin |
| [privacysandbox.sdkruntime](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-sdkruntime?hl=tr) | Bu kitaplık, SdkRuntime'ı destekleyen tüketiciler için bileşenler sağlar. |
| [privacysandbox.tools](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-tools?hl=tr) | Android'de Özel Korumalı Alan işlevini kullanmaya yönelik bir kitaplık |
| [privacysandbox.ui](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/privacysandbox-ui?hl=tr) | YAPILACAKLAR |
| [profileinstaller](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/profileinstaller?hl=tr) | Kitaplıkların, ART tarafından okunacak derleme izlerini önceden doldurmasını sağlar. |
| [öneri](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/recommendation?hl=tr) | Android TV Launcher ana ekranında içerik tanıtma |
| [recyclerview](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/recyclerview?hl=tr) | Bellek kullanımını en aza indirirken kullanıcı arayüzünüzde büyük veri kümelerini görüntüleyin. |
| [remotecallback](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/remotecallback?hl=tr) | Geliştiricilerin PendingIntent sağlamasını kolaylaştıran bir sarmalayıcı oluşturun. |
| [resourceinspection](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/resourceinspection?hl=tr) | Android Studio'nun Canlı Düzen Denetleyicisi'nde özel görünümlerin özelliklerini gösterin. |
| [savedstate](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/savedstate?hl=tr) | Bir işlem sonlandığında kullanıcı arayüzü durumunu kaydeden ve işlem yeniden başlatıldığında geri yükleyen, takılabilir bileşenler yazın. |
| [security](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/security?hl=tr) | Anahtarları güvenli bir şekilde yönetin, dosyaları ve sharedpreferences'ı şifreleyin. |
| [sharetarget](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/sharetarget?hl=tr) | Kısayolları doğrudan paylaşım hedefi olarak kullanmak için geriye dönük uyumluluk sağlar. |
| [slice](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/slice?hl=tr) | Uygulamanızın dışında şablonlu kullanıcı arayüzü öğeleri gösterin. |
| [slidingpanelayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/slidingpanelayout?hl=tr) | Kayan bölme kullanıcı arayüzü kalıbı uygulayın. |
| [başlangıç](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/startup?hl=tr) | Uygulama başlatılırken bileşenleri başlatmak için basit ve yüksek performanslı bir yöntem uygulayın. |
| [sqlite](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/sqlite?hl=tr) | Yerel SQLite veritabanlarıyla çalışma Mümkünse bunun yerine Room'u kullanın. |
| [swiperefreshlayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/swiperefreshlayout?hl=tr) | Yenilemek için kaydırma kullanıcı arayüzü desenini uygulayın. |
| [test.uiautomator](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/test-uiautomator?hl=tr) | Uygulamalar arası işlevsel kullanıcı arayüzü testi için çerçeve |
| [textclassifier](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/textclassifier?hl=tr) | Metindeki görüşmeleri, bağlantıları, seçimleri ve diğer benzer yapıları tanımlar. |
| [izleme](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/tracing?hl=tr) | İzleme etkinliklerini sistem izleme arabelleğine yazın. |
| [geçiş](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/transition?hl=tr) | Başlangıç ve bitiş düzenleriyle kullanıcı arayüzünde hareketi canlandırın. |
| [tv](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/tv?hl=tr) | Geliştiricilerin TV uygulamaları yazabilmesi için Compose ve Materyal Tasarım işlevlerini sağlar. |
| [tvprovider](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/tvprovider?hl=tr) | Android TV kanalları sunun. |
| [xr.arcore](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-arcore?hl=tr) | Algılama özellikleriyle dijital içeriği gerçek dünyaya taşıyın. |
| [xr.compose](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-compose?hl=tr) | Android XR'ın üç boyutlu özelliklerinden yararlanan üç boyutlu kullanıcı arayüzü düzenlerini bildirimsel olarak oluşturun. |
| [xr.compose.material3](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-compose-material3?hl=tr) | XR'ye uyum sağlayan Material bileşenleri ve düzenleriyle geliştirme |
| [xr.runtime](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-runtime?hl=tr) | Yerel çalışma zamanımızla özel AR veya 3D oturumunuzu başlatın. |
| [xr.scenecore](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-scenecore?hl=tr) | 3D içeriklerle Android XR sahne grafiğini oluşturun ve değiştirin. |
| [vectordrawable](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/vectordrawable?hl=tr) | Vektörel grafikleri oluşturma. |
| [versionedparcelable](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/versionedparcelable?hl=tr) | İşlemler arasında aktarılabilen veya güvenli bir şekilde kalıcı hale getirilebilen kararlı ve kompakt bir ikili serileştirme biçimi sağlar. |
| [viewpager](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/viewpager?hl=tr) | Görüntülemeleri veya parçaları kaydırılabilir bir biçimde gösterme Mümkünse bunun yerine viewpager2'yi kullanın. |
| [viewpager2](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/viewpager2?hl=tr) | Görüntülemeleri veya parçaları kaydırılabilir bir biçimde gösterme |
| [wear](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear?hl=tr) | Wear OS by Google akıllı saatleri için uygulamalar oluşturun. |
| [wear.compose](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear-compose?hl=tr) | Farklı cihaz boyutlarını ve gezinme hareketlerini destekleyen işlevler sağlayarak Wear OS cihazlar için Jetpack Compose uygulamaları yazın. |
| [wear.protolayout](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear-protolayout?hl=tr) | Bu kitaplık, uzak yüzeylerde oluşturulacak/değerlendirilecek bir dizi kullanıcı arayüzü düzeninin ve kullanıcı arayüzü dışı ifadelerin tanımlanmasına olanak tanır. |
| [wear.tiles](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear-tiles?hl=tr) | Wear OS by Google akıllı saatleri için uygulamalar oluşturun. |
| [wear.watchface](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear-watchface?hl=tr) | Wear OS by Google akıllı saatleri için uygulamalar oluşturun. |
| [wear.watchfacepush](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/wear-watchfacepush?hl=tr) | Watch Face Push, bir Wear OS uygulamasının bir kol saatine programatik olarak saat yüzü yüklemesine olanak tanır. |
| [webkit](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/webkit?hl=tr) | Android 5 ve sonraki sürümlerde modern WebView API'leriyle çalışır. |
| [window](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/window?hl=tr) | Katlanabilir cihazlar gibi farklı cihaz form faktörlerini desteklemeye yardımcı olur. |
| [window.extensions.core](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/window-extensions-core?hl=tr) | Pencere Yöneticisi Kitaplığı Uzantıları için Çekirdek API'ler |

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/badge.svg?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/iheartradio?hl=tr)

### [En iyi uygulamaları izleme](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/iheartradio?hl=tr)

Modern tasarım uygulamaları temel alınarak geliştirilen Android Jetpack Kitaplıkları, geriye dönük uyumlulukla birlikte daha az kilitlenme ve daha az bellek sızıntısı sağlar.

[Örnek olayı inceleyin](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/iheartradio?hl=tr)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/drag-drop.svg?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/monzo-camerax?hl=tr)

### [Ortak metin kodunu kaldırın](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/monzo-camerax?hl=tr)

Android Jetpack, arka plan görevleri, gezinme ve yaşam döngüsü yönetimi gibi sıkıcı etkinlikleri yönettiğinden uygulamanızı en iyi yapan özelliklere odaklanabilirsiniz.

[Örnek olayı inceleyin](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/monzo-camerax?hl=tr)

Mantieni tutto organizzato con le raccolte Salva e classifica i contenuti in base alle tue preferenze.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/gpu-hardware_dt.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini-nano?hl=it)

### [On-device con Gemini Nano](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini-nano?hl=it)

Accedi alla potenza dell'IA on-device con Gemini Nano e le API GenAI nell'ambito di ML Kit.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/gemini_dt.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini?hl=it)

### [Sfrutta la potenza dei modelli avanzati di Gemini](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini?hl=it)

Accedi a tutta la potenza dei modelli di punta come Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash e Imagen utilizzando l'IA di Firebase.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/lightbulb-spark_dt.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/ai/overview?hl=it)

### [Scegli la soluzione di IA giusta per la tua app](https://developer.android.com/ai/overview?hl=it)

Trovare la soluzione di IA e ML giusta per la tua app può sembrare difficile. Leggi la nostra panoramica per trovare lo strumento giusto per il tuo caso d'uso.

[Inizia a utilizzare l'AI generativa su Android arrow\_right\_alt](https://developer.android.com/ai/overview?hl=it)

Nuova funzionalità

### [API di IA generativa](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini-nano/ml-kit-genai?hl=it)

Utilizza le API di IA generativa basate su Gemini Nano per aiutare la tua app a svolgere attività comuni.

[Scopri di più](https://developer.android.com/ai/gemini-nano/ml-kit-genai?hl=it)

Nuova funzionalità

### [Play per l'AI on-device](https://developer.android.com/google/play/on-device-ai?hl=it)

Play per l'IA on-device contribuisce a migliorare le prestazioni del modello ML e a semplificare la distribuzione utilizzando gli app bundle e la pubblicazione su Google Play.

[Scopri di più](https://developer.android.com/google/play/on-device-ai?hl=it)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/envision_2880.png?hl=it)

### Envision aiuta a riassumere i documenti

Envision utilizza la funzionalità di riassunto dell'API GenAI per fornire agli utenti riepiloghi concisi e significativi dei documenti.

[Scopri di più](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2025/05/on-device-gen-ai-apis-ml-kit-gemini-nano.html)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/firebase.svg?hl=it)

### App Android innovative che utilizzano l'IA di Firebase

Scopri come gli sviluppatori Android utilizzano l'IA di Firebase per aggiungere funzionalità di IA generativa alle loro app.

[Scopri di più](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/10/gemini-api-showcase-of-innovative-android-apps.html)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/talkback_2880.png?hl=it)

### TalkBack utilizza Gemini Nano per l'accessibilità delle immagini

Gemini Nano con multimodalità consente a TalkBack di fornire descrizioni delle immagini chiare e dettagliate anche se il dispositivo è offline o se la connessione di rete è instabile.

[Scopri di più](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/09/talkback-uses-gemini-nano-to-increase-low-vision-accessibility.html)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/apps/recorder.svg?hl=it)

### Riassumere le registrazioni vocali

L'app Registratore vocale di Google Pixel sfrutta Gemini Nano per fornire inferenza offline e sul dispositivo al fine di generare riassunti delle registrazioni vocali.

[Scopri di più](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/08/recorder-app-on-pixel-sees-boost-in-engagement-with-gemini-nano.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/ml-kit_2880.png?hl=it)](https://developers.google.com/ml-kit?hl=it)

### [Procedure comuni per gli utenti con ML Kit](https://developers.google.com/ml-kit?hl=it)

ML Kit fornisce soluzioni pronte per la produzione per attività comuni e non richiede competenze di ML. I modelli sono integrati e ottimizzati per il mobile. ML Kit è facile da usare e ti consente di concentrarti sullo sviluppo delle funzionalità anziché sull'addestramento e sull'ottimizzazione del modello.

[Scopri di più](https://developers.google.com/ml-kit?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/lite-rt_2880.png?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/ai/custom?hl=it)

### [Modelli personalizzati con LiteRT](https://developer.android.com/ai/custom?hl=it)

Per un maggiore controllo o per eseguire il deployment dei tuoi modelli ML, Android fornisce uno stack ML personalizzato basato su LiteRT e Google Play Services che copre gli elementi essenziali necessari per eseguire il deployment di funzionalità ML ad alte prestazioni.

[Scopri di più](https://developer.android.com/ai/custom?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/media-pipe_2880.png?hl=it)](https://ai.google.dev/edge/mediapipe/solutions/guide?hl=it)

### [Soluzioni MediaPipe](https://ai.google.dev/edge/mediapipe/solutions/guide?hl=it)

MediaPipe offre soluzioni di ML personalizzabili e multipiattaforma open source per i contenuti multimediali dal vivo e in streaming.

[Scopri di più](https://ai.google.dev/edge/mediapipe/solutions/guide?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/google-play.svg?hl=it)](https://forms.gle/udLiRgA6zFzpfxZy9)

### [Caricamento di Play sul dispositivo](https://forms.gle/udLiRgA6zFzpfxZy9)

Esegui il deployment e gestisci in modo efficiente i tuoi modelli ML e di IA generativa personalizzati per le funzionalità di IA on-device con Play for On-device AI. Google Play semplifica l'implementazione del modello, aiutandoti a migliorare l'esperienza utente mantenendo ottimizzate le dimensioni dell'app.

[Partecipare al programma di accesso in anteprima](https://forms.gle/udLiRgA6zFzpfxZy9)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/android-studio-round.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/gemini-in-android?hl=it)

### [Gemini in Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/gemini-in-android?hl=it)

Gemini in Android Studio è il tuo compagno di programmazione per lo sviluppo di Android. Può generare codice, trovare risorse pertinenti, apprendere best practice, risolvere errori e farti risparmiare tempo.

[Scopri di più](https://developer.android.com/gemini-in-android?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/ai/google-ai-studio_2880.png?hl=it)](https://aistudio.google.com/app/prompts/new_chat?hl=it)

### [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/app/prompts/new_chat?hl=it)

Il modo più rapido per iniziare a utilizzare Gemini è con Google AI Studio, uno strumento basato sul web che ti consente di prototipare ed eseguire prompt direttamente nel browser e iniziare a utilizzare l'API Gemini.

[Per iniziare](https://aistudio.google.com/app/prompts/new_chat?hl=it)
