Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/widget-hero_2880.png?hl=id)

### Widget di Android

Tambahkan widget untuk meningkatkan pengalaman pengguna Anda. Widget adalah elemen layar utama yang dapat disesuaikan dan menampilkan tampilan konten atau tindakan aplikasi yang jelas dan dapat ditindaklanjuti.

[Pergi ke fondasi desain](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=id)
 [Mendownload kit Widget Figma](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

Panduan

### [Tata letak](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

Tata letak menentukan cara pengaturan informasi dan elemen interaktif dalam widget Anda. Pelajari lebih lanjut tata letak siap pakai untuk widget teks, daftar & jenis petak.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

Panduan

### [Pengaturan ukuran](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

Pelajari lebih lanjut cara mendesain widget yang dapat diskalakan dengan lancar ke berbagai ukuran. Lihat ukuran widget default dan pelajari cara memanfaatkan sepenuhnya ruang petak yang tersedia.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)

Panduan

### [Gaya](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)

Pelajari cara menyesuaikan gaya widget Anda untuk meningkatkan dampak visual widget dan agar sesuai dengan tema perangkat pengguna.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/discovery-promotion.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

Panduan

### [Penemuan & promosi](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

Pelajari cara mempromosikan widget Anda di alat pilih widget dengan menggunakan ukuran yang sesuai dan menampilkan konten pratinjau yang sesuai.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts-content_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=id)

### [Konten](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=id)

Sebelum menentukan tata letak, pikirkan konten yang ingin Anda tampilkan di widget. Apakah Anda ingin widget Anda kaya gambar atau penuh teks? Temukan contoh tata letak untuk berbagai jenis konten.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts-canonical_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

### [Tata letak widget kanonis](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

Mulai gunakan tata letak responsif kami yang siap pakai untuk semua jenis widget yang paling umum.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing-responsive_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

### [Layout responsif](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

Pastikan widget Anda fleksibel dan pertimbangkan cara mengubah ukuran widget. Bagaimana tampilannya dalam tata letak potret, persegi, atau lanskap?

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing-bounds_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id#fill_the_bounds)

### [Memenuhi batas](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id#fill_the_bounds)

Ruang layar beranda sangat berharga, jadi penting untuk memastikan widget Anda dibuat untuk mengoptimalkan ruang yang telah dialokasikan.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=id#fill_the_bounds)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style-anatomy_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)

### [Anatomi dan spesifikasi](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)

Pahami komponen inti dan spesifikasi desain mendetail untuk memastikan widget Anda memenuhi standar kualitas kami.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id)
 [Download kit figma](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style-tokens_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id#color)

### [Token warna](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id#color)

Agar lebih sesuai dengan layar utama pengguna, izinkan widget Anda menyesuaikan dengan tema perangkat sistem sehingga widget Anda dapat menggunakan fitur seperti tema terang dan gelap serta setelan kontras.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=id#color)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/discovery-promotion-requirements_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

### [Persyaratan pemilih widget](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

Mulai dari ukuran widget yang direkomendasikan hingga pratinjau berkualitas tinggi, tinjau panduan kami untuk membantu widget Anda mendapatkan perhatian dan tampil beda di antara widget lainnya.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=id)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/widgets_tiers_card_2880.png?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=id)

### [Tingkat kualitas widget](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=id)

Kualitas widget memengaruhi cara pengguna berinteraksi dengan atau menemukan widget Anda. Lihat tingkat kualitas untuk membantu widget Anda tampil beda dan menarik perhatian.

[Pelajari lebih lanjut](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=id)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/figma-community_2880.jpg?hl=id)](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

Figma

### [File Android Figma](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

Gunakan komponen desain kami untuk membuat widget yang indah & fungsional. Komponen dan pola ini memastikan pengalaman pengguna yang optimal dengan widget, sekaligus mempertahankan konsistensi & menampilkan merek Anda.

[Gabung dengan komunitas!](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

### Desain untuk Wear OS

Smartwatch memungkinkan pengguna mendapatkan informasi secara sekilas, lalu mengambil tindakan. Interaksi yang sering dilakukan ini dapat membantu pengguna kembali hadir dalam kehidupan sehari-hari.

Ciptakan pengalaman pengguna yang imersif dan menarik di Wear OS untuk meningkatkan penggunaan aplikasi dan loyalitas merek.

# View binding  |  Android Developers

[Langsung ke konten utama](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/view-binding?hl=id#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   Türkçe
*   Русский
*   עברית
*   العربيّة
*   فارسی
*   हिंदी
*   বাংলা
*   ภาษาไทย
*   中文 – 简体
*   中文 – 繁體
*   日本語
*   한국어

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=id)
 Masuk

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=id) Halaman ini diterjemahkan oleh [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=id)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=id)
    

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.

View binding   Bagian dari [Android Jetpack](https://developer.android.com/jetpack?hl=id)
.
===========================================================================================

_View binding_ adalah fitur yang memudahkan penulisan kode yang berinteraksi dengan tampilan. Setelah diaktifkan dalam sebuah modul, view binding akan menghasilkan _class binding_ untuk setiap file tata letak XML yang ada dalam modul tersebut. Instance class binding berisi referensi langsung ke semua tampilan yang memiliki ID dalam tata letak yang sesuai.

Pada umumnya, view binding menggantikan `findViewById`.

Penyiapan
---------

View binding diaktifkan di level modul. Untuk mengaktifkan view binding dalam modul, setel opsi build `viewBinding` ke `true` dalam file `build.gradle` level modul, seperti yang ditunjukkan dalam contoh berikut:

### Groovy

android {
    ...
    buildFeatures {
        viewBinding true
    }
}

### Kotlin

android {
    ...
    buildFeatures {
        viewBinding \= true
    }
}

Jika Anda ingin mengabaikan file tata letak saat membuat class binding, tambahkan atribut `tools:viewBindingIgnore="true"` ke tampilan root file tata letak tersebut:

<LinearLayout
            ...
            tools:viewBindingIgnore="true" >
        ...
    </LinearLayout>

Penggunaan
----------

Jika view binding diaktifkan untuk sebuah modul, class binding akan dihasilkan untuk setiap file tata letak XML yang ada di dalam modul. Setiap class binding berisi referensi ke tampilan root dan semua tampilan yang memiliki ID. Nama class binding dibuat dengan mengonversi nama file XML menjadi Pascal case dan menambahkan kata "Binding" ke bagian akhirnya.

Misalnya, pertimbangkan file tata letak bernama `result_profile.xml` yang berisi hal berikut:

<LinearLayout ... >
        <TextView android:id="@+id/name" />
        <ImageView android:cropToPadding="true" />
        <Button android:id="@+id/button"
            android:background="@drawable/rounded_button" />
    </LinearLayout>

Class binding yang dihasilkan disebut `ResultProfileBinding`. Class ini memiliki dua kolom: `TextView` yang disebut `name` dan `Button` yang disebut `button`. `ImageView` dalam tata letak tidak memiliki ID, sehingga tidak ada referensi ke sana dalam class binding.

Setiap class binding juga mencakup metode `getRoot()`, yang menyediakan referensi langsung untuk tampilan root file tata letak yang terkait. Dalam contoh ini, metode `getRoot()` di class `ResultProfileBinding` menampilkan tampilan root `LinearLayout`.

Bagian berikut menunjukkan penggunaan class binding yang dihasilkan dalam aktivitas dan fragmen.

### Menggunakan view binding dalam aktivitas

Untuk menyiapkan instance class binding agar dapat digunakan dengan aktivitas, lakukan langkah-langkah berikut dalam metode [`onCreate()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/android/app/Activity?hl=id#oncreate)
 aktivitas:

1.  Panggil metode `inflate()` statis yang disertakan dalam class binding yang dihasilkan. Tindakan ini membuat instance dari class binding yang akan digunakan aktivitas.
2.  Dapatkan referensi ke tampilan root dengan memanggil metode `getRoot()` atau menggunakan [sintaksis properti Kotlin](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/properties.html#declaring-properties)
    .
3.  Teruskan tampilan root ke [`setContentView()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/android/app/Activity?hl=id#setcontentview_1)
     untuk menjadikannya sebagai tampilan aktif di layar.

Langkah-langkah ini ditampilkan dalam contoh berikut.

### Kotlin

private lateinit var binding: ResultProfileBinding

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
    binding \= ResultProfileBinding.inflate(layoutInflater)
    val view \= binding.root
    setContentView(view)
}

### Java

private ResultProfileBinding binding;

@Override
protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
    binding \= ResultProfileBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater());
    View view \= binding.getRoot();
    setContentView(view);
}

Sekarang, Anda dapat menggunakan instance class binding untuk merujuk ke tampilan mana pun:

### Kotlin

binding.name.text \= viewModel.name
binding.button.setOnClickListener { viewModel.userClicked() }

### Java

binding.name.setText(viewModel.getName());
binding.button.setOnClickListener(new View.OnClickListener() {
    viewModel.userClicked()
});

### Menggunakan view binding di fragmen

Untuk menyiapkan instance class binding agar dapat digunakan dengan fragmen, lakukan langkah-langkah berikut dalam metode [`onCreateView()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/fragment/app/Fragment?hl=id#oncreateview)
 fragmen:

1.  Panggil metode `inflate()` statis yang disertakan dalam class binding yang dihasilkan. Tindakan ini membuat instance class binding yang akan digunakan fragmen.
2.  Dapatkan referensi ke tampilan root dengan memanggil metode `getRoot()` atau menggunakan [sintaksis properti Kotlin](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/properties.html#declaring-properties)
    .
3.  Tampilkan tampilan root dari metode `onCreateView()` untuk menjadikannya sebagai tampilan aktif di layar.

### Kotlin

private var \_binding: ResultProfileBinding? \= null
// This property is only valid between onCreateView and
// onDestroyView.
private val binding get() \= \_binding!!

override fun onCreateView(
    inflater: LayoutInflater,
    container: ViewGroup?,
    savedInstanceState: Bundle?
): View? {
    \_binding \= ResultProfileBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false)
    val view \= binding.root
    return view
}

override fun onDestroyView() {
    super.onDestroyView()
    \_binding \= null
}

### Java

private ResultProfileBinding binding;

@Override
public View onCreateView (LayoutInflater inflater,
                          ViewGroup container,
                          Bundle savedInstanceState) {
    binding \= ResultProfileBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
    View view \= binding.getRoot();
    return view;
}

@Override
public void onDestroyView() {
    super.onDestroyView();
    binding \= null;
}

Sekarang, Anda dapat menggunakan instance class binding untuk merujuk ke tampilan mana pun:

### Kotlin

binding.name.text \= viewModel.name
binding.button.setOnClickListener { viewModel.userClicked() }

### Java

binding.name.setText(viewModel.getName());
binding.button.setOnClickListener(new View.OnClickListener() {
    viewModel.userClicked()
});

### Memberikan petunjuk untuk berbagai konfigurasi

Saat Anda mendeklarasikan tampilan di beberapa konfigurasi, terkadang akan lebih baik untuk menggunakan jenis tampilan yang berbeda, bergantung pada tata letak tertentu. Cuplikan kode berikut menunjukkan contohnya:

# in res/layout/example.xml
    
    <TextView android:id="@+id/user_bio" />
    
    # in res/layout-land/example.xml
    
    <EditText android:id="@+id/user_bio" />

Dalam hal ini, Anda mungkin mengharapkan class yang dihasilkan mengekspos kolom `userBio` dari jenis `TextView`, karena `TextView` adalah class dasar umum. Karena keterbatasan teknis, generator kode view binding tidak dapat menentukannya dan sebagai gantinya menghasilkan kolom `View`. Tindakan ini memerlukan transmisi kolom nanti dengan `binding.userBio as TextView`.

Untuk mengatasi batasan ini, view binding mendukung atribut `tools:viewBindingType`, sehingga Anda dapat memberi tahu compiler jenis yang akan digunakan dalam kode yang dihasilkan. Pada contoh sebelumnya, Anda dapat menggunakan atribut ini untuk membuat compiler membuat kolom sebagai `TextView`:

# in res/layout/example.xml (unchanged)
    
    <TextView android:id="@+id/user_bio" />
    
    # in res/layout-land/example.xml
    
    <EditText android:id="@+id/user_bio" tools:viewBindingType="TextView" />

Dalam contoh lain, misalkan Anda memiliki dua tata letak, satu tata letak berisi `BottomNavigationView` dan satu lagi berisi `NavigationRailView`. Kedua class memperluas `NavigationBarView`, yang berisi sebagian besar detail implementasi. Jika kode Anda tidak perlu mengetahui subclass mana yang ada di tata letak saat ini, Anda dapat menggunakan `tools:viewBindingType` untuk menetapkan jenis yang dihasilkan ke `NavigationBarView` di kedua tata letak:

# in res/layout/navigation_example.xml
    
    <BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/navigation" tools:viewBindingType="NavigationBarView" />
    
    # in res/layout-w720/navigation_example.xml
    
    <NavigationRailView android:id="@+id/navigation" tools:viewBindingType="NavigationBarView" />

View binding tidak dapat memvalidasi nilai atribut ini saat membuat kode. Untuk menghindari error waktu kompilasi dan runtime, nilai harus memenuhi kondisi berikut:

*   Nilai harus berupa class yang mewarisi dari `android.view.View`.
*   Nilainya harus berupa superclass tag tempatnya ditempatkan. Misalnya, nilai berikut tidak berfungsi:
    
      <TextView tools:viewBindingType="ImageView" /> <!-- ImageView is not related to TextView. -->
          <TextView tools:viewBindingType="Button" /> <!-- Button is not a superclass of TextView. -->
    
*   Jenis akhir harus di-resolve secara konsisten di semua konfigurasi.
    

Perbedaannya dengan findViewById
--------------------------------

View binding memiliki keunggulan penting dibandingkan `findViewById`:

*   **Keamanan null:** karena view binding membuat referensi langsung ke tampilan, tidak ada risiko pengecualian pointer null karena ID tampilan yang tidak valid. Selain itu, jika tampilan hanya ada di beberapa konfigurasi tata letak, kolom yang berisi referensinya di class binding akan ditandai dengan `@Nullable`.
*   **Keamanan jenis:** kolom di setiap class binding memiliki jenis yang cocok dengan tampilan yang direferensikannya dalam file XML. Artinya, tidak ada risiko pengecualian cast class.

Perbedaan ini berarti inkompatibilitas antara tata letak dan kode Anda akan menyebabkan build gagal pada waktu kompilasi, bukan pada waktu proses.

Perbandingannya dengan data binding
-----------------------------------

View binding dan [data binding](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/data-binding?hl=id)
 sama-sama menghasilkan class binding yang dapat Anda gunakan untuk mereferensikan tampilan secara langsung. Namun, view binding ditujukan untuk menangani kasus penggunaan yang lebih sederhana dan memberikan manfaat berikut dibandingkan data binding:

*   **Kompilasi yang lebih cepat:** View binding tidak memerlukan pemrosesan anotasi, sehingga waktu kompilasi menjadi lebih cepat.
*   **Kemudahan penggunaan:** View binding tidak memerlukan file tata letak XML yang diberi tag khusus, sehingga lebih mudah untuk diterapkan di aplikasi Anda. Setelah Anda mengaktifkan view binding dalam modul, view binding akan diterapkan ke semua tata letak modul tersebut secara otomatis.

Di sisi lain, view binding memiliki batasan berikut dibandingkan dengan data binding:

*   View binding tidak mendukung [variabel tata letak atau ekspresi tata letak](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/data-binding/expressions?hl=id)
    , sehingga tidak dapat digunakan untuk mendeklarasikan konten UI dinamis langsung dari file tata letak XML.
*   View binding tidak mendukung [data binding dua arah](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/data-binding/two-way?hl=id)
    .

Karena pertimbangan ini, dalam beberapa kasus, sebaiknya gunakan view binding dan data binding dalam sebuah project. Anda dapat menggunakan data binding dalam tata letak yang memerlukan fitur lanjutan dan menggunakan view binding dalam tata letak yang tidak memerlukan fitur lanjutan.

Referensi lainnya
-----------------

Untuk mempelajari view binding lebih lanjut, lihat referensi tambahan berikut:

### Blog

*   [Menggunakan view binding untuk mengganti findViewById](https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/use-view-binding-to-replace-findviewbyid-c83942471fc)
    

### Video

*   [Android Jetpack: Mengganti findViewById dengan view binding](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W7uujFrljW0&hl=id)
    

Direkomendasikan untuk Anda
---------------------------

*   Catatan: teks link ditampilkan saat JavaScript nonaktif
*   [Melakukan migrasi dari sintetis Kotlin ke view binding Jetpack](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/view-binding/migration?hl=id)
    
*   [Tata letak dan ekspresi binding](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/data-binding/expressions?hl=id)
    
*   [Arsitektur Aplikasi: Lapisan UI - Memulai - Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/data-binding/start?hl=id)
    

Konten dan contoh kode di halaman ini tunduk kepada lisensi yang dijelaskan dalam [Lisensi Konten](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=id)
. Java dan OpenJDK adalah merek dagang atau merek dagang terdaftar dari Oracle dan/atau afiliasinya.

Terakhir diperbarui pada 2024-12-22 UTC.

# TopHatch unveils Concepts' immersive canvas on ChromeOS and Android  |  Developer stories  |  Android Developers

[Skip to main content](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/concepts#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   Deutsch

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

*   [Developer stories](https://developer.android.com/stories)

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/)
    
*   [Essentials](https://developer.android.com/get-started)
    
*   [Developer stories](https://developer.android.com/stories)
    

TopHatch unveils Concepts' immersive canvas on ChromeOS and Android

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.


=============================================================================================================================================================

![Concepts logo](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/concepts-icon.png)

[Concepts](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tophatch.concepts)
, developed by the small, tight-knit team at [TopHatch](https://concepts.app/en/)
, is an advanced design platform that combines the flexibility of a traditional sketchbook with the speed and versatility of a digital drawing tool. Built for a natural interface using touch on mobile from the beginning, Concepts allows professional designers to work with beautiful yet highly responsive tools, flexible environments, and adjustable vectors. It's a playground for creativity. TopHatch's developers knew Concepts' users value two things: a highly responsive and accurate stylus and a big canvas to develop their ideas. With the emergence of versatile devices like the Pixelbook Pen and foldable smartphones, the team saw an opportunity to reach even more creators by building Concepts' UX for larger screens and different form factors. With a few tips and best practices from Google, TopHatch's developers went to work building the Concepts app for immersive experiences on ChromeOS and Android devices.

![Screen interaction with stylus pen](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/concepts-1.png)

What they did
-------------

### High-performance graphics

The team's first priority was to ensure ChromeOS could support Concepts' sharp design and seamless performance on all devices. Concepts runs highly-optimized, low-level GPU code. Because Android has so many different devices on the market, TopHatch was concerned about ensuring fast performance on every driver. After evaluating ChromeOS' capabilities with engineers at Google, TopHatch found that the OS' graphics were consistent and compatible across devices. That meant building the app for maximum performance on every GPU driver was much easier than expected. The team ultimately ended up with five variations of its rendering engine, which allows Concepts to perform beautifully on around 2,500 devices after establishing Android 7 and OpenGL ES 3.1 as minimum requirements. After building Concepts for ChromeOS, TopHatch went a step further and adapted the app for foldable devices. Because ChromeOS already fully supports dynamic screen resizing, the team was able to complete the optimizations in just half a day.

### Low-latency stylus and keyboard support

Smooth and speedy stylus interaction is at the core of the Concepts experience. Digital designers want to feel like ink is flowing from the stylus just like a real pen. To that end, TopHatch's next goal was to make sure the delay from receiving touch input to rendering strokes on screen was as minimal as possible.

TopHatch knew that among all the layers of software between Android and Chrome OS, there was a high potential for lag and "tearing" side effects, where strokes could be partially or incorrectly drawn on screen. The team found its solution through front-buffer rendering. Enabled by the security and simplicity of Chrome OS, front-buffer rendering helped bypass layers of software in the drawing process to allow pixels to be copied the absolute minimum number of times. This significantly reduced the potential for delays when stylus input was detected, ensuring that Concepts would feel as much like drawing with a real pen and paper as possible. TopHatch also decided to implement intuitive keyboard support for Concepts' project navigation and toolbar screens. That way, designers can more easily manage, rename, view, and share their projects when they're not actively drawing in the app.

Results
-------

Designers' early response to Concepts on ChromeOS has been stellar. The average Concepts user is spending 12x more time on Chromebooks and 20x times more time on the Google Pixelbook and Pixel Slate compared to other devices. TopHatch has also seen Chromebook users become paying users at double the rate on Pixelbook and at 4x the rate on Slate compared to other devices. "Building the app for ChromeOS helped us reach a highly engaged audience — and a huge Android market," said David Brittain, co-founder and CEO of TopHatch. "We knew designing for larger screens would unlock access to a growing user base, and we've already received incredible feedback as a result." TopHatch strives to support its users with monthly updates, and it most recently rolled out a highly-requested image import feature where designers can sketch over and mark up their own photos. The team looks forward to working with creators across ChromeOS and Android and enabling powerful and mobile creative lifestyles for designers of every stripe.

Get Started
-----------

Learn how to best [optimize your apps for ChromeOS](https://developer.android.com/topic/arc/optimizing)
.

Content and code samples on this page are subject to the licenses described in the [Content License](https://developer.android.com/license)
. Java and OpenJDK are trademarks or registered trademarks of Oracle and/or its affiliates.

Last updated 2019-05-02 UTC.

Widget'lar

Koleksiyonlar ile düzeninizi koruyun İçeriği tercihlerinize göre kaydedin ve kategorilere ayırın.


===============================================================================================================

Widget'lar, bir uygulamanın içeriğini veya işlemlerini net ve işlem yapılabilir bir şekilde gösteren özelleştirilebilir ana ekran öğeleridir. Bu içerik düzenli olarak yenilenebilir.

Widget'lar, uygulamanızın içeriğiyle doğrudan widget'ta etkileşime geçerek veya uygulama deneyiminizin tamamını açarak kullanıcıların hedeflerini tamamlamalarına yardımcı olur.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/mobile/widgets/GettingStarted_Header.jpg?hl=tr)

Başlayın
--------

Widget'ınızı oluştururken aşağıdaki adımları uygulayın:

1.  Widget'ınızda öne çıkaracağınız tek bir birincil kullanım alanı seçin.
2.  Figma'daki [Widget şablonu örneklerine](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1237551184114564748/android-ui-kit)
     göz atın.
3.  Kullanıcı arayüzünü [boyutlandırma](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=tr)
     yönergelerine uygun şekilde tasarlayın.
4.  Birden fazla ekran boyutu için test edin.
5.  Widget'ınızın [Widget kalite yönergelerine](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=tr)
     uyduğundan emin olun.

### Standart widget düzenleri

İçerikler ve etkileşimli öğeler, widget'ınızda düzene göre düzenlenir. Metin, liste ve ızgara türü widget'lar için önceden oluşturulmuş düzenler hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinin.

[Daha fazla bilgi edinin](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=tr)

### Boyutlandırma

Birden fazla boyuta sorunsuz şekilde ölçeklendirilen widget'lar tasarlama hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinin. Varsayılan widget boyutlarını inceleyin ve verilen ızgara alanını nasıl tam olarak kullanacağınızı öğrenin.

[Daha fazla bilgi edinin](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=tr)

### Stil

Widget'ınızın görsel etkisini artırmak ve kullanıcının cihaz temasına uyacak şekilde widget'ınıza nasıl stil uygulayacağınızı öğrenin.

[Daha fazla bilgi edinin](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=tr)

### Keşif ve tanıtım

Widget seçicide widget'ınızı uygun boyutlandırma ve gösterilen bilgilerle tanıtmayı öğrenin.

[Daha fazla bilgi edinin](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=tr)

Bu sayfadaki içerik ve kod örnekleri, [İçerik Lisansı](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=tr)
 sayfasında açıklanan lisanslara tabidir. Java ve OpenJDK, Oracle ve/veya satış ortaklarının tescilli ticari markasıdır.

Son güncelleme tarihi: 2025-07-26 UTC.

# Algoriddim gives mobile users the full power of djay by optimizing for ChromeOS  |  Developer stories  |  Android Developers

[Skip to main content](https://developer.android.com/stories/apps/djay2#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

*   [Developer stories](https://developer.android.com/stories)

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/)
    
*   [Essentials](https://developer.android.com/get-started)
    
*   [Developer stories](https://developer.android.com/stories)
    

Algoriddim gives mobile users the full power of djay by optimizing for ChromeOS

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.


=========================================================================================================================================================================

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/djay2-icon.png)

[djay](https://www.algoriddim.com/djay-android)
 — one of the most successful music apps on Android developed by Germany-based [Algoriddim](https://www.algoriddim.com/)
 — is rooted in the desktop experience. Back in 2006, the team designed the first iteration of djay for laptops to empower every DJ, from beginners to professionals, with reliable performance and support for external hardware like MIDI controllers and audio interfaces. As smartphones took off soon afterward, Algoriddim reinvented djay for mobile and put the turntables at millions of people’s fingertips for the first time.

Fast-forward to today: more devices like Chromebooks are bridging the gap between desktop and mobile experiences, and high-performance, professional setups are becoming more relevant for DJs on mobile platforms. ChromeOS presented Algoriddim with an opportunity to bring together everything they’d learned about designing for desktop and mobile and deliver an incredible experience on a single platform.

Here’s how they combined the touchscreen functionality of mobile with desktop’s high performance, immersive large-screen display, and support for essential external hardware.

What they did
-------------

Because they’d already designed djay’s layout for large-screen desktops from day one, most of Algoriddim’s optimizations involved taking advantage of the full performance and functionality of ChromeOS. Enabling the audio support that every DJ needs was priority number one:

### Multi-channel audio and MIDI support

Multi-channel audio is critical to allow DJs to seamlessly prep the next track in their headphones before the audience hears it on the main mix. A lot of DJs also hook up external MIDI hardware devices like beatpads and samplers to their laptops, so being able to send and receive MIDI signals with a low-latency response on the app is just as essential.

The original djay for Android app had basic MIDI functionality, but it was far from ideal for professional DJs. ChromeOS presented an opportunity to give DJs full-scale support on mobile. Algoriddim worked closely with Android’s audio team to implement the [Android MIDI API](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/media/midi/package-summary)
 with djay’s internal MIDI stack and use the [Android audio SDK](https://developer.android.com/ndk/guides/audio)
 to optimize the app for multichannel audio, allowing DJs to route separate stereo channels from the app to a pair of speakers and their headphones.

Both optimizations ultimately brought djay’s original, high-end audio functionality full circle by putting desktop-level power into mobile users’ hands.

### Optimizing full-screen layout for tablets

When Algoriddim considered how artists might use the app on devices with larger screens, they saw an opportunity to deliver an experience more unique than on a typical phone or desktop.

Rather than simply scaling the mobile UI, Algoriddim specifically positioned certain app elements and features like FX pads and EQs for tablet and touchscreen laptop users. This was hugely beneficial for performing DJs who frequently need to access multiple controls at the same time to achieve different effects, like seamlessly mixing songs by decreasing the bass of one song while simultaneously increasing the volume and bass on the next — not to mention moving the crossfader and applying multiple FX.

With the added screen real estate, Algoriddim was able to add core functionality to the main UI rather than hide it in auxiliary views that cover the main UI on phones and smaller devices, allowing for a powerful multi-touch experience that doesn’t disrupt a DJ’s workflow.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/distribute/stories/algoriddim.png)

Best of all, the extra screen space allowed the team to empower DJs in an entirely new way by combining a touchscreen interface with keyboard and MIDI control, allowing for innovative workflows during live performance.

Results
-------

By bringing together the best of djay’s desktop and mobile features on large-screen devices, Algoriddim was able to reach millions more artists around the world. With a unique combination of MIDI support, multichannel audio, touchscreen functionality, and keyboard and mouse input, djay gives performing DJs the low-latency, high-performance setup they crave — and first-time DJs everything they need to get started.

Algoriddim has already seen millions of new app downloads, amounting to a 25% increase overall since the app was launched on ChromeOS. The team has continually received positive feedback from DJs around the world, and engagement is noticeably higher on desktop and mobile.

Frederik Seiffert, Algoriddim’s chief technical officer, was thrilled with how seamlessly everything came together: “We’ve always worked to create one ecosystem where every DJ has the tools they need on whatever device they choose, whether they’re a kid aspiring to be the next star or a professional with years of experience. Bringing djay to ChromeOS is a big step toward inspiring and empowering the next generation of DJs and giving them a new path to grow as an artist, which is right in line with our vision for the app.”

Get started
-----------

Check out some best practices to [optimize your apps for ChromeOS](https://developer.android.com/topic/arc/optimizing)
, and learn how to [optimize for large screens](https://developer.android.com/large-screens)
.

Content and code samples on this page are subject to the licenses described in the [Content License](https://developer.android.com/license)
. Java and OpenJDK are trademarks or registered trademarks of Oracle and/or its affiliates.

Last updated 2019-11-26 UTC.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-assets/android-codelabs.svg?hl=fa)

### کد لبه های اندروید

Codelabs یک تجربه کدنویسی هدایت شده، آموزشی و عملی را ارائه می دهد. اکثر کد لبه ها شما را در فرآیند ساخت یک برنامه کوچک یا افزودن یک ویژگی جدید به یک برنامه موجود گام بر می دارند.

 چند پلتفرم کاتلین نوشتن رابط کاربری (عمومی) ML کیفیت برنامه معماری کاتلین در اندروید پوشیدنی ها دستگاه ها قابلیت اتصال موضوعات دیگردوره مسیر

Örnekler

Koleksiyonlar ile düzeninizi koruyun İçeriği tercihlerinize göre kaydedin ve kategorilere ayırın.


=============================================================================================================

Optimize edilmiş kullanıcı deneyimi tasarımlarını keşfederek TV için nasıl ilgi çekici ve benzersiz kullanıcı deneyimleri oluşturabileceğinizi keşfedin. Bu bölümde, TV için en iyi kullanıcı deneyimi tasarımlarından bazılarını ayrıntılı olarak inceleyip bunların etkileşimi ve farklılığı nasıl desteklediğini öğrenin.

İster bir tasarımcı ister geliştirici olun ya da yalnızca kullanıcı deneyimi tasarımını merak ediyor olun, TV için en iyi kullanıcı deneyimi tasarımlarından ilham almak üzere bir göz atın.

[![JetStream](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/samples/images/overview/jet-stream.webp?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/samples/jet-stream?hl=tr)

### Jet Stream

Yayın uygulamasıyla TV'de eğlence deneyiminizi bir üst seviyeye taşıyın. Basit gezinme ve kişiselleştirilmiş öneriler sunan zengin içerik kitaplığına erişin. Sorunsuz bir izleme deneyimi için sorunsuz akış ve güvenilir bağlantının keyfini çıkarın.

[Daha fazla bilgiarrow\_forward](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/samples/jet-stream?hl=tr)

[![JetFit](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/samples/images/overview/jet-fit.webp?hl=tr)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/samples/jet-fit?hl=tr)

### Jet Kesim

Rehberli antrenmanlar ve rutinler sunan, TV'ye göre optimize edilmiş bir uygulamayla forma girin. Farklı zorluk ve süre seviyeleri arasından seçim yapın ve etkileşimli özelliklerle ilerlemenizi takip edin. Şık ve kullanıcı dostu arayüzüyle etkileyici bir antrenman deneyiminin tadını çıkarın.

[Daha fazla bilgiarrow\_forward](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/samples/jet-fit?hl=tr)

Bu sayfadaki içerik ve kod örnekleri, [İçerik Lisansı](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=tr)
 sayfasında açıklanan lisanslara tabidir. Java ve OpenJDK, Oracle ve/veya satış ortaklarının tescilli ticari markasıdır.

Son güncelleme tarihi: 2025-07-27 UTC.

Mantieni tutto organizzato con le raccolte Salva e classifica i contenuti in base alle tue preferenze.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/ui-guidelines.svg?hl=it)

### Progettazione e pianificazione

Prima di iniziare a programmare, fai i compiti per progettare e pianificare un'app eccellente. Crea una fantastica esperienza utente, pianifica con attenzione l'architettura dell'app e segui le misure di sicurezza e privacy consigliate.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/layout.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=it)

### [Progetta una fantastica app](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=it)

Esplora guide ed esempi di progettazione dell'interfaccia utente per creare una fantastica esperienza visiva. Scopri di più su stili e temi di Android, scarica i kit basati su Figma e altro ancora.

[Progettare la tua UI](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/tools-3.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=it)

### [Pianifica un'architettura solida](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=it)

Scopri i pattern consigliati per la creazione di livelli di UI e di dati ben organizzati per la tua prossima app per Android.

[Architettare l'app](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/vitals.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=it)

### [Pensa alla qualità dell'app](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=it)

Crea un'app che segua le best practice per la privacy e la sicurezza. Crea un'app di alta qualità che mantenga gli utenti al sicuro e crei fiducia.

[Ottimizza per la qualità](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/billions-16-9.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=it)

### [Pianifica per il prossimo miliardo di utenti](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=it)

Il ritmo della crescita degli smartphone in tutto il mondo non ha precedenti e miliardi di nuovi utenti provengono da mercati che richiedono decisioni tecniche e di progettazione uniche. Assicurati che la tua app sia pronta.

[Vai a Build for Billions](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=it)

### Guide alla progettazione

Guida

### [Guide alla progettazione per dispositivi mobili](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/foundations/accessibility?hl=it)

Inizia con le guide alla progettazione dell'UI di Android. Segui le indicazioni di stile, scopri di più sui temi e crea una fantastica esperienza con le app per Android.

Guida

### [Guide alla progettazione per schermi grandi](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/large-screens?hl=it)

Tablet, dispositivi pieghevoli e ChromeOS ampliano le possibilità dell'interfaccia utente. Progetta un'esperienza utente che solo gli schermi di grandi dimensioni possono offrire.

Guida

### [Guide di progettazione per Wear OS](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=it)

Wear OS ha un insieme unico di principi di progettazione. Scopri le specifiche per la progettazione di un'app per Wear OS.

Guida

### [Guide alla progettazione XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started?hl=it)

Crea esperienze che spingono i confini e trasformano il modo in cui le persone creano, esplorano e si divertono con i contenuti di intrattenimento, grazie ad Android XR.

Guida

### [Guide alla progettazione di programmi TV](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=it)

Crea un'app Android TV dinamica ed elegante. Progetta tenendo a mente le specifiche e le dimensioni della TV e segui le nostre best practice e i nostri consigli.

### Guide della qualità

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/security-2.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=it)

Guida

### [Sicurezza e privacy](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=it)

Tutela la sicurezza e la privacy dei tuoi utenti. Segui le best practice e le indicazioni di Android per creare un'app basata su affidabilità e integrità.

[Vai alle guide per la sicurezza](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/graph-bar.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=it)

Guida

### [Qualità tecnica](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=it)

La qualità tecnica è alla base di un'app eccellente. Segui le nostre guide tecniche sulla qualità per garantire stabilità, prestazioni elevate e un'esperienza utente ottimale per la tua app.

[Vai alle guide sulla qualità](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=it)

### Buat aplikasi dan game berkualitas tinggi

Ada empat pilar kualitas aplikasi Android. Aplikasi dan game berkualitas tinggi menawarkan nilai kepada pengguna, menyenangkan untuk digunakan, mengoptimalkan perangkat premium, dan dirancang untuk keamanan. Gunakan pedoman ini untuk menciptakan pengalaman luar biasa di Android, dan meningkatkan peluang Anda untuk diunggulkan di Google Play.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/lightbulb.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value?hl=id)

### [Nilai inti](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value?hl=id)

Aplikasi dan game harus memberikan nilai pengguna dengan memberi manfaat atau kesenangan.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/stars.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/quality/user-experience?hl=id)

### [Pengalaman pengguna](https://developer.android.com/quality/user-experience?hl=id)

Aplikasi dan game harus menyenangkan saat digunakan.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/quality/user-experience?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/graph-bar.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=id)

### [Kualitas teknis](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=id)

Aplikasi dan game harus memaksimalkan perangkat premium.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=id)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/security-2.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/quality/privacy-and-security?hl=id)

### [Privasi dan keamanan](https://developer.android.com/quality/privacy-and-security?hl=id)

Pelajari cara mendesain aplikasi dan game untuk keamanan.

[Lihat panduan](https://developer.android.com/quality/privacy-and-security?hl=id)

### Desain untuk berbagai faktor bentuk dan ukuran layar

Jenis perangkat non-ponsel seperti tablet, perangkat foldable, dan smartwatch merupakan segmen perangkat Android yang berkembang paling pesat, dan banyak pengguna Android kini memiliki lebih dari satu perangkat. Ikuti panduan Android untuk memberikan pengalaman pengguna berkualitas tinggi di perangkat ini.

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/icons/core.svg?hl=id)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/core-app-quality?hl=id)

### Design per la TV

Esplora le nostre guide, i nostri pattern e altro ancora per imparare a creare contenuti per Android TV. Inizia subito a progettare per la TV!

[Guida alle fondamenta](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/foundations.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=it)

Guide

### [Competenze essenziali](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=it)

Concetti e principi fondamentali del design di Android, come l'accessibilità e le barre di sistema.

[Vai alle fondazioni](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/styles.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/color-system?hl=it)

Guide

### [Stile](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/color-system?hl=it)

Scopri come creare un fantastico design visivo con colori, caratteri, animazioni e temi per la tua app.

[Vai allo stile](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/color-system?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/layouts.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/layouts?hl=it)

Guide

### [Disposizione](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/layouts?hl=it)

Come dovrebbero essere strutturati i contenuti all'interno di una visualizzazione, dalle nozioni di base su layout e griglia alla visualizzazione di grafica, fino alle moderne funzionalità Android, come edge-to-edge.

[Vai al layout](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/layouts?hl=it)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/components.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components?hl=it)

Guide

### [Componenti](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components?hl=it)

Piccoli componenti di base interattivi dell'interfaccia utente utilizzati ripetutamente. Scopri di più sull'utilizzo dei componenti di Material Design.

[Vai ai componenti](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/explore-kits.svg?hl=it)](https://www.figma.com/@tv)

Figma

### [Community Figma su Android TV](https://www.figma.com/@tv)

Esplora i nostri kit di design Figma e usa stili, temi, motivi, componenti e altro ancora per dare il via alla creazione della tua prossima app per la TV.

[Vai alla community Figma TV](https://www.figma.com/@tv)

[![Pulsanti](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/buttons.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Pulsanti\
\
I pulsanti aiutano gli utenti ad avviare azioni o flusso. Scegli tra diversi tipi di pulsanti per dare enfasi all'attenzione.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/buttons?hl=it)
[![Schede](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/cards.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Schede\
\
Le schede includono contenuti e azioni relativi a un singolo argomento.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/cards?hl=it)
[![Carosello in primo piano](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/featured-carousel.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Carosello in primo piano\
\
Il carosello in primo piano mette in evidenza un insieme di contenuti multimediali in un contenitore a larghezza intera. Guida gli utenti verso i contenuti in primo piano.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/featured-carousel?hl=it)
[![Elenco immersivo](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/immersive-list.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Elenco immersivo\
\
L'elenco immersivo mette in evidenza un elemento selezionato per mostrare contenuti immersivi. Usala per mettere in risalto i tuoi contenuti.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/immersive-list?hl=it)
[![Elenchi](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/lists.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Elenchi\
\
Indici verticali continui di testo o immagini. Utilizza gli elenchi per aiutare gli utenti a effettuare una selezione da una raccolta.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/lists?hl=it)
[![Riquadro di navigazione a scomparsa](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/navigation-drawer.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Riquadro di navigazione a scomparsa\
\
I riquadri di navigazione a scomparsa consentono di accedere alle destinazioni in un'app. I cassetti sono sempre disponibili sul bordo dello schermo](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/navigation-drawer?hl=it)
[![Schede](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/tabs.svg?hl=it)\
\
### Schede\
\
Le schede consentono di passare facilmente da una destinazione principale all'altra in un'app in modo pratico. Le schede rimangono nella parte superiore del display.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/tabs?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/develop.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=it)

### [Guide per gli sviluppatori](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=it)

Consulta le guide e i riferimenti per gli sviluppatori per creare la tua app.

[Consulta le guide per gli sviluppatori](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=it)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/publish.svg?hl=it)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=it)

### [Guide della qualità](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=it)

Prepara i tuoi progetti seguendo le best practice per Android.

[Visualizza la qualità dell'app](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=it)

# ابزارک در اندروید | طراحی UI  |  Widgets  |  Android Developers

[رد شدن و رفتن به محتوای اصلی](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/widget?hl=fa#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   Türkçe
*   Русский
*   עברית
*   العربيّة
*   فارسی
*   हिंदी
*   বাংলা
*   ภาษาไทย
*   中文 – 简体
*   中文 – 繁體
*   日本語
*   한국어

[استودیو Android](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=fa)
 ورود به برنامه

*   [UI Design](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=fa)
    
*   [Widgets](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/widget?hl=fa)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=fa) این صفحه به‌وسیله [‏Cloud Translation API‏](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=fa)
 ترجمه شده است.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=fa)
    
*   [طراحی و برنامه ریزی](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=fa)
    
*   [UI Design](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=fa)
    
*   [Widgets](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/widget?hl=fa)
    

با مجموعه‌ها، منظم بمانید ذخیره و طبقه‌بندی محتوا براساس اولویت‌های شما.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/widget-hero_2880.png?hl=fa)

### ویجت ها در اندروید

برای ارتقاء سطح تجربه کاربری خود، ویجت ها را اضافه کنید. ویجت ها عناصر صفحه اصلی قابل تنظیم هستند که نمای واضح و کاربردی از محتوا یا اقدامات یک برنامه را نمایش می دهند.

[به سراغ مبانی طراحی بروید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=fa)
 [کیت ویجت Figma را دانلود کنید](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [طرح بندی ها](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

چیدمان ها نحوه سازماندهی اطلاعات و عناصر تعاملی را در ویجت شما دیکته می کنند. درباره طرح‌بندی‌های از پیش ساخته شده برای ویجت‌های متن، فهرست و شبکه‌ای بیشتر بیاموزید.

[راهنمایی را ببینید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [سایز بندی](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

درباره طراحی ویجت‌هایی که به طور یکپارچه در اندازه‌های مختلف مقیاس می‌شوند، بیشتر بیاموزید. اندازه‌های پیش‌فرض ویجت را ببینید و نحوه استفاده کامل از فضای شبکه موجود را بیاموزید.

[راهنمایی را ببینید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [سبک](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)

بیاموزید که چگونه به ویجت خود سبک دهید تا تأثیر بصری ویجت خود را افزایش دهید و با موضوع دستگاه کاربر مطابقت داشته باشد.

[راهنمایی را ببینید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/discovery-promotion.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [کشف و تبلیغ](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

یاد بگیرید که با استفاده از اندازه مناسب و نمایش محتوای پیش نمایش مناسب، ویجت خود را در انتخابگر ویجت تبلیغ کنید.

[راهنمایی را ببینید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts-content_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=fa)

### [محتوا](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=fa)

قبل از تصمیم گیری در مورد چیدمان، به محتوایی که می خواهید در ویجت خود نمایش دهید فکر کنید. آیا می خواهید ویجت شما غنی از تصویر باشد یا متن سنگین؟ نمونه‌های طرح‌بندی برای انواع محتوا پیدا کنید.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/layouts-canonical_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

### [طرح بندی ویجت متعارف](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

با طرح‌بندی‌های آماده و پاسخگو ما که متداول‌ترین انواع ویجت‌ها را برآورده می‌کند، راه‌اندازی کنید.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/layouts?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing-responsive_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

### [طرح بندی پاسخگو](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

اطمینان حاصل کنید که ویجت شما انعطاف پذیر است و نحوه تغییر اندازه ویجت را در نظر بگیرید. چگونه ممکن است در طرح بندی پرتره، مربع یا منظره به نظر برسد؟

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/sizing-bounds_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa#fill_the_bounds)

### [پر کردن محدوده](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa#fill_the_bounds)

فضای صفحه اصلی بسیار ارزشمند است، بنابراین مهم است که مطمئن شوید ویجت شما به گونه ای ساخته شده است که از فضای اختصاص داده شده به بهترین شکل استفاده کند.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/sizing?hl=fa#fill_the_bounds)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style-anatomy_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)

### [آناتومی و مشخصات](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)

اجزای اصلی و مشخصات طراحی دقیق را بدانید تا اطمینان حاصل کنید که ویجت شما با نوار کیفیت ما مطابقت دارد.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa)
 [دانلود کیت figma](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/style-tokens_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa#color)

### [نشانه های رنگی](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa#color)

برای تطبیق بهتر با صفحه اصلی کاربر، به ویجت خود اجازه دهید تا با طرح زمینه دستگاه سیستم سازگار شود تا ویجت شما بتواند از ویژگی هایی مانند تم های روشن و تاریک و تنظیمات کنتراست استفاده کند.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/style?hl=fa#color)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/discovery-promotion-requirements_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

### [الزامات انتخابگر ویجت](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

از اندازه‌های ویجت توصیه‌شده تا پیش‌نمایش‌های با کیفیت بالا، راهنمایی‌های ما را مرور کنید تا به ویجت‌تان کمک کنیم تا مورد توجه قرار گیرد و از بین مردم متمایز شود.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/widgets/discovery-promotion?hl=fa)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/widgets_tiers_card_2880.png?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=fa)

### [سطوح کیفی ویجت](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=fa)

کیفیت ویجت بر نحوه تعامل کاربران یا یافتن ویجت شما تأثیر می گذارد. سطوح کیفیت را بررسی کنید تا ویجت خود را برجسته و مورد توجه قرار دهد.

[بیشتر بدانید](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/widget-quality?hl=fa)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/widget/figma-community_2880.jpg?hl=fa)](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

فیگما

### [فایل Figma اندروید](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

از اجزای طراحی ما برای ایجاد ویجت های زیبا و کاربردی استفاده کنید. این مؤلفه‌ها و الگوها تجربه کاربری بهینه با ویجت‌ها را تضمین می‌کنند، در حالی که ثبات را حفظ می‌کنند و برند شما را نشان می‌دهند.

[به جامعه بپیوندید!](https://goo.gle/android-ui-kit)

---

# طراحی و برنامه ریزی  |  Android Developers

[رد شدن و رفتن به محتوای اصلی](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=fa#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   Türkçe
*   Русский
*   עברית
*   العربيّة
*   فارسی
*   हिंदी
*   বাংলা
*   ภาษาไทย
*   中文 – 简体
*   中文 – 繁體
*   日本語
*   한국어

[استودیو Android](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=fa)
 ورود به برنامه

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=fa) این صفحه به‌وسیله [‏Cloud Translation API‏](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=fa)
 ترجمه شده است.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=fa)
    
*   [طراحی و برنامه ریزی](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=fa)
    

با مجموعه‌ها، منظم بمانید ذخیره و طبقه‌بندی محتوا براساس اولویت‌های شما.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/ui-guidelines.svg?hl=fa)

### طراحی و برنامه ریزی

قبل از شروع به کدنویسی، تکالیف خود را انجام دهید تا یک برنامه عالی طراحی و برنامه ریزی کنید. یک تجربه کاربری عالی ایجاد کنید، معماری برنامه خود را با دقت برنامه ریزی کنید و از اقدامات امنیتی و حفظ حریم خصوصی توصیه شده پیروی کنید.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/layout.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=fa)

### [یک اپلیکیشن زیبا طراحی کنید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=fa)

برای ایجاد یک تجربه بصری عالی، راهنماها و نمونه‌های طراحی UI را کاوش کنید. درباره سبک‌ها و تم‌های اندروید، دانلود کیت‌های مبتنی بر Figma و موارد دیگر بیاموزید.

[رابط کاربری خود را طراحی کنید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/tools-3.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=fa)

### [یک معماری قوی برنامه ریزی کنید](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=fa)

الگوهای توصیه شده برای ایجاد لایه های رابط کاربری و لایه های داده به خوبی سازماندهی شده برای برنامه بعدی اندروید خود را بیاموزید.

[برنامه خود را معمار کنید](https://developer.android.com/topic/architecture/intro?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/vitals.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=fa)

### [طراحی برای کیفیت برنامه](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=fa)

برنامه ای ایجاد کنید که از بهترین شیوه های حفظ حریم خصوصی و امنیت پیروی کند. یک برنامه با کیفیت بالا بسازید که کاربران شما را ایمن نگه می دارد و اعتماد ایجاد می کند.

[برای کیفیت بهینه سازی کنید](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/billions-16-9.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=fa)

### [برای میلیارد کاربر بعدی برنامه ریزی کنید](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=fa)

سرعت رشد گوشی‌های هوشمند در سرتاسر جهان بی‌سابقه است و میلیاردها کاربر جدید از بازارهایی می‌آیند که به تصمیم‌های فنی و طراحی منحصربه‌فرد نیاز دارند. مطمئن شوید که برنامه شما آماده است.

[به Build for Billions بروید](https://developer.android.com/build-for-billions?hl=fa)

### راهنمای طراحی

راهنما

### [راهنمای طراحی موبایل](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/foundations/accessibility?hl=fa)

با راهنمای طراحی رابط کاربری اندروید شروع کنید. دستورالعمل‌های سبک را دنبال کنید، درباره تم‌ها بیاموزید و یک تجربه زیبا از برنامه Android ایجاد کنید.

راهنما

### [راهنمای طراحی صفحه نمایش بزرگ](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/large-screens?hl=fa)

تبلت‌ها، تاشوها و دستگاه‌های ChromeOS امکانات رابط کاربری را گسترش می‌دهند. تجربه کاربری را طراحی کنید که فقط صفحه نمایش های بزرگ می توانند ارائه دهند.

راهنما

### [از راهنمای طراحی سیستم عامل استفاده کنید](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=fa)

Wear OS مجموعه ای منحصر به فرد از اصول طراحی دارد. با مشخصات طراحی اپلیکیشن برای Wear OS آشنا شوید.

راهنما

### [راهنمای طراحی XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started?hl=fa)

تجربه‌هایی بسازید که مرزها را جابجا می‌کنند و نحوه خلق، کاوش و لذت بردن از سرگرمی‌ها را تغییر می‌دهند، که توسط Android XR پشتیبانی می‌شود.

راهنما

### [راهنمای طراحی تلویزیون](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=fa)

یک برنامه Android TV پویا و زیبا ایجاد کنید. برای مشخصات و ابعاد تلویزیون طراحی کنید و بهترین شیوه ها و توصیه های ما را دنبال کنید.

### راهنمای کیفیت

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/security-2.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [امنیت و حریم خصوصی](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=fa)

از امنیت و حریم خصوصی کاربران خود محافظت کنید. بهترین روش ها و راهنمایی های Android را برای ساختن یک برنامه با پایه ای از اعتماد و یکپارچگی دنبال کنید.

[به راهنمای امنیتی بروید](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=fa)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/graph-bar.svg?hl=fa)](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=fa)

راهنما

### [کیفیت فنی](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=fa)

کیفیت فنی پایه و اساس یک برنامه عالی است. برای اطمینان از پایداری، عملکرد بالا و تجربه کاربری عالی برای برنامه خود، راهنمای کیفیت فنی ما را دنبال کنید.

[به راهنمای کیفیت بروید](https://developer.android.com/quality/technical?hl=fa)

Delightful

### CameraX

Uygulamanıza kolayca uygulanabilen kamera entegrasyonu ile Jetpack CameraX kitaplıklarını kullanarak keyifli video oluşturma deneyimleri oluşturun.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

CameraX
-------

Uygulamanıza kolayca uygulanabilen kamera entegrasyonu ile Jetpack CameraX kitaplıklarını kullanarak keyifli video oluşturma deneyimleri oluşturun.

[read\_more Belgeleri okuyun](https://developer.android.com/media/camera/camerax/extensions-api?hl=tr)
 [open\_in\_new Blogu okuyun](https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/getting-started-with-camerax-in-jetpack-compose-781c722ca0c4)

kapat

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/excellent/edge-to-edge-inmobile.png?hl=tr)

Delightful

### Kenardan kenara

Uygulamanızın, kendisine sunulan pencere alanından tam olarak yararlanmasına olanak tanıyan daha sorunsuz bir kullanıcı deneyimi sunun.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

Kenardan kenara
---------------

Uygulamanızın, kendisine sunulan pencere alanından tam olarak yararlanmasına olanak tanıyan daha sorunsuz bir kullanıcı deneyimi sunun.

kapat

### Oyunlar

Android oyununuzu oluşturmak ve yayınlamak için ihtiyacınız olan araçları, örnekleri, kitaplıkları ve rehberliği bulun.

Delightful

Oyunlar
-------

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/android-games-hero.svg?hl=tr)

kapat

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/excellent/live-updates-inmobile.png?hl=tr)

Delightful

### Canlı güncellemeler

Kullanıcılarınızın özelleştirilebilir bildirim şablonları aracılığıyla uygulama içi etkinliklerinin ilerleme durumunu kolayca takip etmesine olanak tanıyan Canlı Güncellemeler özelliğiyle güncel kalın.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

Canlı güncellemeler
-------------------

Kullanıcılarınızın özelleştirilebilir bildirim şablonları aracılığıyla uygulama içi etkinliklerinin ilerleme durumunu kolayca takip etmesine olanak tanıyan Canlı Güncellemeler özelliğiyle güncel kalın.

[read\_more Dokümanları okuyun](https://developer.android.com/about/versions/16/features/progress-centric-notifications?hl=tr)

kapat

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/excellent/low-light-boost-inmobile.png?hl=tr)

Delightful

### Düşük Işık Artırıcı

Hem Kamera 2'de hem de gece modu kamera uzantısında kullanılabilen otomatik pozlama modu olan Düşük Işık Güçlendirme özelliğiyle düşük ışıkta çekilen fotoğrafların ve düşük ışıkta QR kodlarının önizlemelerini iyileştirin.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

Düşük Işık Artırıcı
-------------------

Hem Kamera 2'de hem de gece modu kamera uzantısında kullanılabilen otomatik pozlama modu olan Düşük Işık Güçlendirme özelliğiyle düşük ışıkta çekilen fotoğraflar ve düşük ışıkta QR kodu taraması için resim önizlemelerini iyileştirin.

[read\_more Belgeleri okuyun](https://developer.android.com/media/camera/lowlight/hw-low-light-boost?hl=tr)
 [open\_in\_new Blogu okuyun](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/12/instagram-on-android-low-light-photos.html)

kapat

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/playback.svg?hl=tr)

Delightful

### Medya3

Video dönüştürme işlemleri için CameraX'e Media3'ü entegre ederek video düzenleme ve kod dönüştürme işlemlerini etkinleştirin. Media3 ExoPlayer'daki PreloadManager ile sorunsuz ve kesintisiz bir oynatma deneyimi sunun.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

Medya3
------

Video dönüştürme işlemleri için CameraX'e Media3'ü entegre ederek video düzenleme ve kod dönüştürme işlemlerini etkinleştirin. Media3 ExoPlayer'daki PreloadManager ile sorunsuz ve kesintisiz bir oynatma deneyimi sunun.

[read\_more Belgeleri okuyun](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/media3/exoplayer/source/preload/DefaultPreloadManager?hl=tr)
 [open\_in\_new Blogu okuyun](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2025/05/building-delightful-android-camera-media-experiences.html)

kapat

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/excellent/back-to-home-inmobile.png?hl=tr)

Delightful

### Tahmin edilen geri gitme

Kullanıcılarınızın uygulamanızda geri giderken, görevler arasında geçiş yaparken veya ana ekrana geri dönerken faydalı ve keyifli animasyonlar deneyimlemesine izin verin.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Delightful

Tahmin edilen geri gitme
------------------------

Kullanıcılarınızın uygulamanızda geri giderken, görevler arasında geçiş yaparken veya ana ekrana geri dönerken faydalı ve keyifli animasyonlar deneyimlemesine izin verin.

Işığın yoğunluğu hakkında daha fazla bilgi depolamak için resimleri iyileştirin. Böylece daha ayrıntılı parlak alanlar ve gölgeler ile daha yoğun renkler elde edebilirsiniz.

 로그인

*   [Get started](https://developer.android.com/get-started/overview?hl=ko)

컬렉션을 사용해 정리하기 내 환경설정을 기준으로 콘텐츠를 저장하고 분류하세요.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/play-webinar-16-9.svg?hl=ko)

### 교육 과정

신규 개발자와 Android를 막 시작하는 개발자, 숙련된 전문가 모두 Google의 Android 개발 전문가들이 만든 교육으로 역량을 향상할 수 있습니다. 그런 다음 Android 개발자로서 인증을 받아서 커리어를 발전시켜 보세요.

강의

### [Compose 사용 시 알아야 하는 Android 기본사항](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course?hl=ko)

이 과정은 Android 학습을 시작할 때 **권장**되는 과정입니다. Android에서 멋진 사용자 인터페이스(UI)를 만드는 최신 툴킷인 Jetpack Compose를 사용하여 일련의 앱을 빌드합니다. Kotlin 프로그래밍 언어로 앱을 작성하고, Material Design, 앱 아키텍처, 데이터 저장소, 네트워크에서 데이터 가져오기, 테스트 등의 권장사항을 알아봅니다. 프로그래밍 경험이 필요하지 않습니다.  

stop _교육 수준: **초급**_

[강의 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/courses/android-basics-compose/course?hl=ko)

* * *

강의

### [Android 개발자를 위한 Jetpack Compose](https://developer.android.com/courses/jetpack-compose/course?hl=ko)

Android UI를 빌드하기 위한 최신 도구 키트인 Jetpack Compose를 사용해 시작합니다.  
  

stop _교육 수준: **중급**_

[강의 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/courses/jetpack-compose/course?hl=ko)

개발자 과정

### [Android 앱 아키텍처](https://developer.android.com/courses/pathways/android-architecture?hl=ko)

강력한 프로덕션 품질의 앱을 빌드하기 위한 권장사항과 권장 아키텍처에 관해 알아보세요.  
  

stop _교육 수준: **중급**_

[개발자 과정 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/courses/pathways/android-architecture?hl=ko)

개발자 과정

### [접근성](https://developer.android.com/courses/pathways/make-your-android-app-accessible?hl=ko)

접근성 기능이 필요한 사용자를 비롯하여 누구나 Android 앱을 사용할 수 있도록 하는 방법을 알아보세요.  
  

stop _교육 수준: **중급**_

[개발자 과정 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/courses/pathways/make-your-android-app-accessible?hl=ko)

[Android Codelab 더 보기](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/?cat=android&%3Bhl=ko&hl=ko)

* * *

인증

### [Google Play 스토어 등록정보 인증서](https://play.google.com/academy/certificate/?hl=ko)

Google Play 스토어 등록정보 인증은 Google Play Console에서 스토어 등록정보를 작성할 때의 디지털 모바일 마케팅 권장사항에 관한 기본적인 지식을 테스트합니다.  
  

stop _교육 수준: **중급**_

[자세히 알아보기](https://play.google.com/academy/certificate/?hl=ko)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/platform.svg?hl=tr)

Performanslı

### Arka plan çalışması

Engelleyici veya uzun süre çalışan görevleri ana kullanıcı arayüzü iş parçacından alıp arka planda yürüterek duyarlı ve kaynak tasarruflu uygulamalar sunun.

Daha fazla bilgi edinin

Performanslı

Arka plan çalışması
-------------------

Engelleyen veya uzun süre çalışan görevleri ana kullanıcı arayüzü iş parçacığından kaldırıp arka planda çalıştırarak duyarlı ve kaynak tasarruflu uygulamalar sunun.
