[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=id)
 Masuk

*   [Test your app on Android](https://developer.android.com/training/testing?hl=id)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=id) Halaman ini diterjemahkan oleh [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=id)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=id)
    
*   [Mengembangkan aplikasi](https://developer.android.com/develop?hl=id)
    
*   [Test your app on Android](https://developer.android.com/training/testing?hl=id)
    

Dasar-dasar pengujian aplikasi Android

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.


=================================================================================================================================

Halaman ini menguraikan prinsip inti pengujian aplikasi Android, termasuk praktik terbaik utama dan manfaatnya.

Manfaat pengujian
-----------------

Pengujian adalah bagian integral dari proses pengembangan aplikasi. Dengan menjalankan pengujian terhadap aplikasi secara konsisten, Anda dapat memverifikasi ketepatan, perilaku fungsional, dan kegunaan aplikasi sebelum merilisnya ke publik.

Anda dapat menguji aplikasi _secara manual_ dengan membukanya. Anda dapat menggunakan perangkat dan emulator yang berbeda, mengubah bahasa sistem, dan mencoba membuat setiap error pengguna atau menjelajahi setiap alur pengguna.

Namun, pengujian manual tidak dapat diskalakan dengan baik, dan regresi dalam perilaku aplikasi Anda dapat dengan mudah diabaikan. _Pengujian otomatis_ melibatkan penggunaan alat yang melakukan pengujian untuk Anda, yang lebih cepat, lebih berulang, dan umumnya memberi Anda masukan yang lebih bisa ditindaklanjuti tentang aplikasi Anda lebih awal dalam proses pengembangan.

Jenis pengujian di Android
--------------------------

Aplikasi seluler bersifat kompleks dan harus berfungsi dengan baik di banyak lingkungan. Oleh karena itu, ada banyak jenis pengujian.

### Subjek

Misalnya, ada berbagai jenis pengujian, bergantung pada _subjeknya_:

*   **Pengujian fungsional**: apakah aplikasi saya melakukan fungsinya?
*   **Pengujian performa**: apakah ini dilakukan dengan cepat dan efisien?
*   **Pengujian aksesibilitas**: apakah berfungsi dengan baik dengan layanan aksesibilitas?
*   **Pengujian kompatibilitas**: apakah berfungsi dengan baik di setiap perangkat dan level API?

### Cakupan

Pengujian juga bervariasi bergantung pada _ukuran_, atau _tingkat isolasi_:

*   **Pengujian unit** atau **pengujian kecil** hanya memverifikasi sebagian kecil aplikasi, seperti metode atau class.
*   Pengujian **end-to-end** atau **pengujian besar** memverifikasi bagian aplikasi yang lebih besar secara bersamaan, seperti seluruh layar atau alur penggunaan.
*   **Pengujian sedang** berada di antara dan memeriksa **integrasi** antara dua unit atau beberapa.

![Pengujian dapat berupa kecil, sedang, atau besar.](https://developer.android.com/static/training/testing/fundamentals/test-scopes.png?hl=id)

**Gambar 1**: Cakupan pengujian dalam aplikasi standar.

Ada banyak cara untuk mengklasifikasikan pengujian. Namun, perbedaan paling penting untuk developer aplikasi adalah tempat pengujian dijalankan.

Pengujian berinstrumen versus lokal
-----------------------------------

Anda dapat menjalankan pengujian di perangkat Android atau di komputer lain:

*   **Pengujian berinstrumen** berjalan di perangkat Android, baik fisik maupun yang diemulasi. Aplikasi di-build dan diinstal bersama _aplikasi pengujian_ yang memasukkan perintah dan membaca status. Pengujian berinstrumen biasanya adalah pengujian UI, yang meluncurkan aplikasi, lalu berinteraksi dengannya.
*   **Pengujian lokal** dijalankan pada mesin pengembangan atau server, sehingga juga disebut _pengujian sisi host_. Pengujian ini biasanya kecil dan cepat, yang mengisolasi subjek yang sedang diuji dari aplikasi lainnya.

![Pengujian bisa dijalankan sebagai uji instrumentasi pada perangkat, atau pengujian lokal pada mesin pengembangan Anda.](https://developer.android.com/static/training/testing/fundamentals/instru-vs-local.png?hl=id)

**Gambar 2**: Berbagai jenis pengujian bergantung pada tempat pengujian dijalankan.

Tidak semua pengujian unit bersifat lokal, dan tidak semua pengujian menyeluruh berjalan di perangkat. Contoh:

*   **Pengujian lokal besar**: Anda dapat menggunakan simulator Android yang berjalan secara lokal, seperti [Robolectric](https://developer.android.com/training/testing/local-tests/robolectric?hl=id)
    .
*   **Pengujian berinstrumen kecil**: Anda dapat memverifikasi bahwa kode Anda berfungsi dengan baik dengan fitur framework, seperti database SQLite. Anda dapat menjalankan pengujian ini di beberapa perangkat untuk memeriksa integrasi dengan beberapa versi SQLite.

### Contoh

Cuplikan berikut menunjukkan cara berinteraksi dengan UI dalam _pengujian UI berinstrumen_ yang mengklik elemen dan memverifikasi bahwa elemen lain ditampilkan.

### Espresso

// When the Continue button is clicked
    onView(withText("Continue"))
        .perform(click())
    
    // Then the Welcome screen is displayed
    onView(withText("Welcome"))
        .check(matches(isDisplayed()))

### Compose UI

// When the Continue button is clicked
    composeTestRule.onNodeWithText("Continue").performClick()
    
    // Then the Welcome screen is displayed
    composeTestRule.onNodeWithText("Welcome").assertIsDisplayed()

Cuplikan ini menunjukkan bagian dari _pengujian unit_ untuk ViewModel (pengujian lokal, sisi host):

// Given an instance of MyViewModel
    val viewModel = MyViewModel(myFakeDataRepository)
    
    // When data is loaded
    viewModel.loadData()
    
    // Then it should be exposing data
    assertTrue(viewModel.data != null)

Arsitektur yang dapat diuji
---------------------------

Dengan arsitektur aplikasi yang dapat diuji, kode mengikuti struktur yang memungkinkan Anda menguji berbagai bagiannya secara terpisah dengan mudah. Arsitektur yang dapat diuji memiliki keunggulan lain, seperti keterbacaan, pemeliharaan, skalabilitas, dan penggunaan kembali yang lebih baik.

Arsitektur yang _tidak dapat diuji_ menghasilkan hal berikut:

*   Pengujian yang lebih besar, lebih lambat, dan lebih tidak stabil. Class yang tidak dapat diuji unit mungkin harus tercakup dalam pengujian integrasi atau pengujian UI yang lebih besar.
*   Lebih sedikit peluang untuk menguji berbagai skenario. Pengujian yang lebih besar lebih lambat, sehingga menguji semua kemungkinan status aplikasi mungkin tidak realistis.

Untuk mempelajari panduan arsitektur lebih lanjut, lihat [panduan untuk arsitektur aplikasi](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/guide?hl=id)
.

### Pendekatan untuk pemisahan

Jika Anda dapat mengekstrak bagian dari fungsi, class, atau modul dari fungsi lainnya, pengujian akan lebih mudah dan efektif. Praktik ini dikenal sebagai pemisahan, dan merupakan konsep paling penting untuk arsitektur yang dapat diuji.

Teknik pemisahan umum meliputi:

*   Memisahkan aplikasi menjadi _lapisan_ seperti Presentasi, Domain, dan Data. Anda juga dapat membagi aplikasi menjadi _modul_, satu per fitur.
*   Hindari menambahkan logika ke entity yang memiliki dependensi besar, seperti aktivitas dan fragmen. Gunakan class ini sebagai titik entri ke framework dan pindahkan _UI dan logika bisnis_ ke tempat lain, seperti ke Composable, ViewModel, atau lapisan domain.
*   Hindari _dependensi framework_ langsung di class yang berisi logika bisnis. Misalnya, [jangan gunakan Konteks Android di ViewModels](https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/locale-changes-and-the-androidviewmodel-antipattern-84eb677660d9)
    .
*   Buat dependensi mudah _diganti_. Misalnya, gunakan [antarmuka](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Interface_segregation_principle)
    , bukan implementasi konkret. Gunakan [Injeksi dependensi](https://developer.android.com/training/dependency-injection?hl=id)
     meskipun Anda tidak menggunakan framework DI.

Langkah berikutnya
------------------

Setelah mengetahui alasan Anda harus melakukan pengujian dan dua jenis pengujian utama, Anda dapat membaca [Yang harus diuji](https://developer.android.com/training/testing/fundamentals/what-to-test?hl=id)
 atau mempelajari [Strategi pengujian](https://developer.android.com/training/testing/fundamentals/strategies?hl=id)

Atau, jika Anda ingin membuat pengujian pertama dan belajar langsung, lihat [Codelab pengujian](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/advanced-android-kotlin-training-testing-basics?hl=id)
.

Konten dan contoh kode di halaman ini tunduk kepada lisensi yang dijelaskan dalam [Lisensi Konten](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=id)
. Java dan OpenJDK adalah merek dagang atau merek dagang terdaftar dari Oracle dan/atau afiliasinya.

Terakhir diperbarui pada 2025-07-27 UTC.

Restez organisé à l'aide des collections Enregistrez et classez les contenus selon vos préférences.

Mises en page, thématisation et animation
=========================================

Implémentez des mises en page plus avancées et ajoutez du mouvement et du style à votre application. Vous découvrirez les différentes API Animation de Compose, comment implémenter Material Design 3, comment utiliser des mises en page personnalisées pour implémenter des conceptions complexes et comment utiliser des mises en page différées pour créer des interfaces utilisateur performantes.  
Retour

_check\_circle_

Principes de base des mises en page et des modificateurs Compose
----------------------------------------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Découvrez les principes de base des mises en page et des modificateurs : comment ils interagissent, les API prêtes à l'emploi et la stylisation des interfaces utilisateur.

_check\_circle_

Mises en page minimalistes
--------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Découvrez comment créer des listes déroulantes dans Compose et pourquoi il est plus simple d'utiliser RecyclerView. Découvrez pourquoi il est interdit d'imbriquer des listes déroulantes, comment procéder autrement, pourquoi les éléments ne doivent jamais avoir une taille de 0 pixel, pourquoi il est essentiel de fournir des clés uniques et comment fonctionnent les animations d'éléments. Enfin, découvrez comment afficher des grilles, utiliser des gestionnaires de mise en page personnalisés et optimiser les performances pour accélérer le défilement.

_check\_circle_

Système Material Design
-----------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Familiarisez-vous avec la couleur, la thématisation et les composants dynamiques de Material You dans Compose.

_check\_circle_

Appliquer un thème à votre application avec Material Design 3
-------------------------------------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_emoji\_objects_ Atelier de programmation

Dans cet atelier de programmation, vous allez apprendre à utiliser les API de thématisation Jetpack Compose pour personnaliser le style de votre application. Nous verrons comment personnaliser les couleurs, les formes et la typographie pour qu'elles soient utilisées de manière cohérente dans l'ensemble de l'application et qu'elles prennent en charge le thème clair et le thème sombre ainsi que la thématisation dynamique.

[Commencer l'atelier de programmation](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/jetpack-compose-theming?hl=fr)

_check\_circle_

Appliquer un style au texte
---------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Apprenez à utiliser les API Material pour configurer la typographie, y compris avec des polices téléchargeables et variables.

_check\_circle_

Cinq animations permettant de démarquer votre application
---------------------------------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Découvrez cinq animations rapides afin de donner vie à votre application en quelques minutes.

_check\_circle_

Présentation du dessin dans Compose
-----------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo

Découvrez comment dessiner des éléments personnalisés dans Compose.

_check\_circle_

Animer des éléments
-------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_emoji\_objects_ Atelier de programmation

Découvrez comment utiliser des API Compose Animation. Nous commençons par animer la valeur la plus simple et nous familiarisons avec d'autres API grâce à quelques schémas d'animation courants. Nous étudions aussi des thèmes plus avancés, tels que la personnalisation des animations et les animations basées sur des gestes tactiles.

[Commencer l'atelier de programmation](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/jetpack-compose-animation?hl=fr)

_check\_circle_

Mises en page et éléments graphiques personnalisés
--------------------------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo _Activité facultative_

Compose propose diverses solutions prêtes à l'emploi pour créer des écrans rapidement et facilement à partir de zéro. Mais que se passe-t-il si vous devez aller plus loin et choisir un environnement entièrement personnalisé ? Découvrez d'autres concepts de mise en page avancés pour créer votre propre mise en page personnalisée et faire passer vos implémentations au niveau supérieur.

Passer

_check\_circle_

Contraintes et ordre des modificateurs
--------------------------------------

_keyboard\_arrow\_down_ _keyboard\_arrow\_up_

_ondemand\_video_ Vidéo _Activité facultative_

Dans Compose, les modificateurs peuvent être enchaînés et l'ordre dans lequel ils le sont est important. En quoi est-ce important ? Découvrez pourquoi les modificateurs doivent être enchaînés et comment cela influence la taille des composables.

Passer

Quiz
----

Testez vos connaissances et obtenez le badge Mises en page et animation.

[Répondre au questionnaire](https://developer.android.com/courses/quizzes/jetpack-compose-for-android-developers-2/jetpack-compose-for-android-developers-2?hl=fr)

# Seperti apa pengalaman pengguna yang hebat  |  App quality  |  Android Developers

[Langsung ke konten utama](https://developer.android.com/quality/user-experience?hl=id#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=id)
 Masuk

*   [App quality](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=id)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=id) Halaman ini diterjemahkan oleh [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=id)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=id)
    
*   [Desain & Rencana](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=id)
    
*   [App quality](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=id)
    
*   [Pengalaman pengguna](https://developer.android.com/quality/user-experience?hl=id)
    

Seperti apa pengalaman pengguna yang hebat

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.


=====================================================================================================================================

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/hero-images/ux_highlighted.svg?hl=id)

Aplikasi dan game berkualitas tinggi bersifat intuitif dan menyenangkan untuk digunakan, membangkitkan perasaan positif melalui desain yang dipertimbangkan dan dibedakan. Mereka juga berinvestasi dalam identitas dan brand yang kuat dan unik, serta tampil beda dari rekan mereka.

Untuk membuat aplikasi atau game berkualitas tinggi, ikuti panduan ini.

Kegunaan
--------

Android menawarkan komponen standar untuk tata letak aplikasi, pola interaksi, dan kontrol pengguna. Gunakan komponen ini untuk memberikan pengalaman pengguna yang konsisten dan intuitif. Contoh:

*   Gunakan [tata letak dari tepi ke tepi](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/layout/edge-to-edge?hl=id)
     untuk [pengalaman yang imersif.](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/layout-and-content/immersive-content?hl=id)
    
*   Mendukung multitasking dengan [picture-in-picture](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/picture-in-picture?hl=id)
    , dengan [transisi yang disempurnakan](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/home-screen/picture-in-picture?hl=id)
    , jika aplikasi Anda telah menyematkan video.
*   Aktifkan berbagi konten dengan [Android Sharesheet](https://developer.android.com/training/sharing/send?hl=id)
    , yang memiliki dukungan bawaan untuk target berbagi
*   Dukung [pencadangan dan pemulihan](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/data/backup?hl=id)
     sehingga data dan setelan pengguna tetap dipertahankan jika pengguna menambahkan perangkat baru, mengganti perangkat yang ada, atau menginstal ulang aplikasi. Fitur ini juga dapat membantu retensi.

**Catatan**: Pastikan untuk mengikuti [panduan desain UX](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=id)
 yang direkomendasikan untuk semua faktor bentuk yang Anda dukung: [Perangkat Seluler, Perangkat Layar Besar dan Perangkat Foldable, Wear OS, dan Android TV](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile?hl=id)

Jika diperlukan, berikan cara yang menarik bagi pengguna untuk mempelajari cara mengoptimalkan aplikasi atau game Anda, atau fitur baru yang mungkin Anda tambahkan. Desain orientasi untuk target audiens Anda; misalnya, pertimbangkan apakah Anda perlu melayani pengguna baru dan ahli. Izinkan pengguna mengonfigurasi aspek penting pengalaman pengguna, seperti [notifikasi](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/notifications?hl=id)
, [privasi](https://developer.android.com/privacy/best-practices?hl=id)
, dan [keamanan](https://developer.android.com/topic/security/best-practices?hl=id)
.

Aksesibilitas, pelokalan, dan deep link
---------------------------------------

Dengan miliaran calon pengguna, aplikasi atau game Anda mungkin perlu mendukung beragam pengguna dan lingkungan.

[Lokalkan](https://play.google.com/console/about/translationservices/?hl=id)
 aplikasi atau game dengan pasar tempat Anda didistribusikan, dengan memberikan terjemahan berkualitas tinggi, konten yang relevan secara budaya dan geografis, serta pengukuran, metrik, dan mata uang yang sesuai.

Ikuti panduan Android untuk [aksesibilitas](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/ui/accessibility?hl=id)
, dan [buat aplikasi untuk miliaran pengguna](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/build-for-billions?hl=id)
 jika relevan.

Jika aplikasi Anda menerima traffic dari web atau sumber eksternal lainnya dengan [deep link](https://developer.android.com/training/app-links?hl=id)
, pastikan link tersebut langsung mengarah ke konten yang relevan.

Daya tarik visual dan keahlian
------------------------------

Desain aplikasi atau game Anda memberikan peluang untuk menyenangkan pengguna dan membedakan penawaran Anda, terutama dalam kategori kompetitif. Kembangkan gaya seni orisinal dan lakukan pendekatan yang konsisten dan koheren di semua platform produk Anda. Gunakan gambar, [warna](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/styles/color?hl=id)
, dan ruang putih untuk mengekspresikan hierarki, status, dan identitas merek. Transisi dan animasi, bersama gambar, dapat membantu menyampaikan pesan utama atau ide yang kompleks, dan membuat pengalaman pengguna lebih dinamis. Ikuti praktik terbaik yang relevan di [hub desain UI Android](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=id)
.

Game bergantung pada emosi dan narasi untuk menarik minat pengguna. Untuk memberikan pengalaman yang lebih imersif, integrasikan aspek visual seperti animasi dan gaya seni dengan audio, alur cerita, dan kontrol game Anda.

Monetisasi
----------

Ada banyak cara untuk memonetisasi aplikasi Anda. Pengalaman monetisasi yang luar biasa dimulai dengan menetapkan ekspektasi pengguna. Sebelum pengguna menginstal aplikasi atau game, beri tahu cara dan waktu Anda menagihnya.

Pastikan setiap momen yang Anda pilih untuk monetisasi diintegrasikan dengan benar ke pengalaman pengguna. Misalnya, jangan mengejutkan pengguna dengan permintaan pembayaran segera setelah aplikasi dimuat, atau mengalihkan perhatian mereka dengan iklan di tengah level game.

Jika aplikasi atau game Anda memiliki penghalang konten berbayar, pertimbangkan untuk menawarkan uji coba gratis untuk konten berbayar sehingga pengguna dapat membuat keputusan yang tepat terkait langganan mereka. Jika pengguna harus membayar untuk membuat progres di aplikasi atau game Anda, pastikan Anda menetapkan harapan ini sebelum penginstalan.

Waktu, frekuensi, dan penempatan iklan adalah faktor penting dalam memberikan pengalaman pengguna yang berkualitas tinggi. Untuk memastikan iklan Anda memenuhi waktu pengguna, pertahankan presentasi mereka secara proporsional dengan konten Anda yang lain dalam hal durasi, frekuensi, dan ukuran. Gunakan ukuran dan penempatan yang cermat untuk meminimalkan risiko ketukan yang tidak disengaja.

Tanggung jawab atas semua konten di aplikasi Anda, termasuk iklan, meskipun Anda menggunakan SDK pihak ketiga untuk menayangkannya. Berhati-hatilah dengan konten iklan yang disajikan oleh aplikasi Anda kepada pengguna dan pastikan konten tersebut sesuai untuk audiens.

Panduan Google Play
-------------------

Jika Anda mendistribusikan aplikasi di Google Play, ikuti panduan pengalaman pengguna tambahan ini.

### Monetisasi

Google Play memungkinkan Anda menghasilkan pendapatan dari pengguna dalam berbagai cara, termasuk [langganan dan pembelian dalam aplikasi](https://play.google.com/console/about/guides/play-commerce/?hl=id)
.

### Penemuan dan unggulan

Google Play mempertimbangkan semua aspek pengalaman pengguna saat mengevaluasi judul yang akan dipromosikan dan tempatnya. [Pelajari lebih lanjut](http://g.co/play/featuring)

Konten dan contoh kode di halaman ini tunduk kepada lisensi yang dijelaskan dalam [Lisensi Konten](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=id)
. Java dan OpenJDK adalah merek dagang atau merek dagang terdaftar dari Oracle dan/atau afiliasinya.

Terakhir diperbarui pada 2025-07-26 UTC.

---

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=vi) Trang này được dịch bởi [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=vi)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=vi)

*   [Health & fitness dev center](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness?hl=vi)
    

Sử dụng bộ sưu tập để sắp xếp ngăn nắp các trang Lưu và phân loại nội dung dựa trên lựa chọn ưu tiên của bạn.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/hero-2_2880.png?hl=vi)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/dev-center/icons/health-and-fitness.svg?hl=vi)Trung tâm dành cho nhà phát triển

### Sức khoẻ và hoạt động thể dục trên Android

Sử dụng Health Connect để chia sẻ các tính năng đặc biệt của ứng dụng sức khoẻ và thể dục với các ứng dụng sức khoẻ khác trên thiết bị, đồng thời sử dụng dữ liệu chuyên biệt từ các ứng dụng khác để giúp người dùng đạt được mục tiêu của họ. Nâng ứng dụng lên tầm cao mới bằng cách sử dụng Dịch vụ sức khoẻ để truy cập vào dữ liệu cảm biến trên thiết bị cho tất cả thiết bị Wear OS 3 trở lên.

[Bắt đầu sử dụng Tài liệu](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides?hl=vi)
 [Kết nối với các chuyên gia](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness?hl=vi#connect-with-us)

### Quy trình công việc cốt lõi

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/vitals.svg?hl=vi)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/05/evolving-health-on-android-migrating-from-google-fit-apis-to-android-health.html)

Kế hoạch

### [Chuyển sang Android Health](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/05/evolving-health-on-android-migrating-from-google-fit-apis-to-android-health.html)

Tìm hiểu cách di chuyển ứng dụng sức khoẻ và thể dục hiện có từ API Google Fit sang API Health Connect trên Android.

[Tìm hiểu thêm](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/05/evolving-health-on-android-migrating-from-google-fit-apis-to-android-health.html)
 [Đọc hướng dẫn di chuyển](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/migrate/migration-guide?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/health-connect-logo.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect?hl=vi)

Kế hoạch

### [Health Connect](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect?hl=vi)

Tìm hiểu cách tương tác với Health Connect để chia sẻ dữ liệu sức khoẻ một cách an toàn với các ứng dụng khác trên thiết bị hoặc lấy thông tin chi tiết chuyên sâu hơn về sức khoẻ.

[Đọc tài liệu](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/health-services-logo.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/health-services?hl=vi)

Kế hoạch

### [Dịch vụ sức khoẻ trên Wear OS](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/health-services?hl=vi)

Tìm hiểu cách bổ sung dữ liệu cảm biến chất lượng cao cho ứng dụng Wear OS mà vẫn tiết kiệm điện năng.

[Đọc hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/health-services?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wearable-app.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/health-fitness?hl=vi)

Thiết kế

### [Tìm cảm hứng cho thiết bị đeo](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/health-fitness?hl=vi)

Khám phá các thiết kế dành cho sức khoẻ và thể hình trong Thư viện Wear OS.

[Chuyển đến thư viện](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/health-fitness?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/user-friendly-integration.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect-guidelines/ux-guidelines/basic-guidance?hl=vi)

Thiết kế

### [Tạo một mô hình tích hợp thân thiện với người dùng](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect-guidelines/ux-guidelines/basic-guidance?hl=vi)

Giao diện người dùng của ứng dụng phải nêu rõ lợi ích của Health Connect và giải thích các khái niệm chính nhằm nâng cao kiến thức của người dùng.

[Xem các nguyên tắc](https://developer.android.com/guide/health-and-fitness/health-connect-guidelines/ux-guidelines/basic-guidance?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/health-connect-codelab.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/health-connect?hl=vi#0)

Phát triển

### [Lớp học lập trình: Làm quen với Health Connect](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/health-connect?hl=vi#0)

Giúp người dùng lưu trữ dữ liệu về sức khoẻ và thể hình trên thiết bị cũng như có toàn quyền kiểm soát các chế độ cài đặt quyền riêng tư của họ, với các chế độ kiểm soát chi tiết để xem ứng dụng nào đang yêu cầu quyền truy cập vào dữ liệu tại bất kỳ thời điểm nào.

[Xem lớp học lập trình](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/health-connect?hl=vi#0)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wear-os-development.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=vi)

Phát triển

### [Nguyên tắc phát triển Wear OS](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=vi)

Tìm hiểu cách tối ưu hoá cho thiết bị đeo cổ tay và cung cấp thông tin cập nhật nhanh.

[Xem hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/health-premium-experience.svg?hl=vi)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuCY5Kpu5xA&%3Blist=PLWz5rJ2EKKc92MGTd1CgUtXZfhA74nUpb&%3Bindex=29&%3Bpp=iAQB&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

Nâng cao

### [Tạo ra trải nghiệm thể dục cao cấp](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuCY5Kpu5xA&%3Blist=PLWz5rJ2EKKc92MGTd1CgUtXZfhA74nUpb&%3Bindex=29&%3Bpp=iAQB&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

Kết hợp Dịch vụ sức khoẻ và Health Connect.

[Xem video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuCY5Kpu5xA&%3Blist=PLWz5rJ2EKKc92MGTd1CgUtXZfhA74nUpb&%3Bindex=29&%3Bpp=iAQB&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/send-data.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/data/data-layer?hl=vi)

Nâng cao

### [Gửi dữ liệu cảm biến tới thiết bị di động](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/data/data-layer?hl=vi)

Dùng Data Layer API (API Lớp dữ liệu) để gửi dữ liệu cảm biến đến thiết bị di động, sau đó lưu trữ dữ liệu trong Health Connect.

[Xem hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/data/data-layer?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/nearby.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/bluetooth/ble-overview?hl=vi)

### [Tìm và kết nối với thiết bị BLE](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/bluetooth/ble-overview?hl=vi)

Với Bluetooth năng lượng thấp (BLE), các ứng dụng có thể giao tiếp với các thiết bị BLE có yêu cầu nghiêm ngặt hơn về nguồn điện, chẳng hạn như cảm biến độ gần, thiết bị đo nhịp tim và thiết bị thể dục.

[Xem hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/bluetooth/ble-overview?hl=vi)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/pathway-2.svg?hl=vi)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/companion-device-pairing?hl=vi)

### [Tuỳ chỉnh hộp thoại yêu cầu ghép nối](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/companion-device-pairing?hl=vi)

Sử dụng Trình quản lý thiết bị đồng hành (CDM) để quét tìm các thiết bị ở gần có thể ghép nối với ứng dụng của bạn.

[Xem hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/connectivity/companion-device-pairing?hl=vi)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/developer-stories/peloton_2880.jpg?hl=vi)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mSejMEIbAzU&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

Nhiều thiết bị

### [Khả năng hỗ trợ nhiều thiết bị của Peloton giúp mức độ tương tác của người dùng tăng lên](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mSejMEIbAzU&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/developer-stories/withings_2880.png?hl=vi)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/03/withings-reduces-data-sync-code-with--health-and-fitness-api-health-connect.html)

Health Connect

### [Withings giảm một nửa mã đồng bộ hoá dữ liệu nhờ Health Connect](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/03/withings-reduces-data-sync-code-with--health-and-fitness-api-health-connect.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/developer-stories/strava_2880.jpg?hl=vi)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ENeSNZ3s0Jw&%3Bt=1s&%3Bhl=vi&hl=vi)

Wear OS

Health Connect

### [signos tích hợp với các ứng dụng sức khoẻ và thể dục khác thông qua Health Connect](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2023/01/signos-streamlines-integrations-with-health-fitness-apps-through-health-connect-api.html)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/developer-stories/outdooractive_2880.png?hl=vi)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2022/09/outdooractive-boosts-user-experience-on-wearable-devices-using-compose-for-wear-os.html)

Wear OS

Health Connect

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/social-and-messaging/samples/social-messaging-hero_dt.svg?hl=ko)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/dev-center/icons/media.svg?hl=ko)Developer Center

### Android 소셜 및 메시지 앱

Android의 고유한 기능을 사용하여 앱의 소셜 및 메시지 기능을 강화합니다. 미디어 탐색, 재생, 캡처, 수정, 공유에 관한 최신 정보를 확인하여 앱을 차별화하세요.

[문서 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides?hl=ko)
 [앱 수준 향상](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/basic-better-best?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/message-notifications.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/communication?hl=ko)

개발

### [커뮤니케이션 및 메시지](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/communication?hl=ko)

안정적인 메시지 전송을 보장하고, 메시지 중심의 알림 및 UI 기능을 활용하며, 이모티콘, 스티커, GIF 등을 지원하세요.

[소통을 위한 빌드](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/communication?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/edit.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-creation?hl=ko)

개발

### [미디어 캡처 및 만들기](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-creation?hl=ko)

야간 모드 및 HDR과 같은 기능을 활용하여 최고 화질의 미디어를 캡처하세요. 로컬 미디어를 둘러봅니다. 맞춤 효과, 자르기, 동영상 프레임의 일부 자르기 등 미디어를 수정, 변환, 트랜스코딩합니다.

[크리에이터를 위한 빌드](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-creation?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/playback.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-playback?hl=ko)

개발

### [미디어 디스플레이 및 재생](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-playback?hl=ko)

이미지를 표시하고 오디오 및 동영상을 재생하며 HDR, 라이브 스트리밍, PIP 모드 등의 기능을 지원합니다. 모든 기기 및 액세서리에서 재생 중심의 UI 기능과 미디어 컨트롤을 지원합니다.

[게임을 위한 빌드](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/media-playback?hl=ko)

가이드

### [표현형 텍스트](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/communication/text?hl=ko)

그림 이모티콘, 스티커, 첨부파일 등을 지원할 수 있습니다.

가이드

### [메시지](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/communication/notifications-conversations?hl=ko)

배지, 대화, 대화창과 같은 핵심 메시지 UX 기능을 사용합니다. 메일이 안정적으로 전송되는지 확인합니다.

가이드

### [CameraX로 이미지 캡처](https://developer.android.com/media/camera/camerax?hl=ko)

이미지 분석 및 효과를 포함하여 이미지와 동영상을 캡처합니다.

가이드

### [미디어 재생 및 편집](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3?hl=ko)

Media3는 미디어 재생 및 편집을 위한 간단하고 맞춤설정이 가능하며 안정적이고 성능이 우수한 Android API를 제공합니다.

가이드

### [앱 위젯](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/appwidgets/overview?hl=ko)

소셜 및 메시지 데이터를 '한눈에' 볼 수 있는 홈 화면에 앱을 표시하세요.

가이드

### [콘텐츠 공유](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/receive-rich-content?hl=ko)

드래그 앤 드롭, 이미지 키보드, 다양한 잘라내기 및 붙여넣기 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/academy-for-app-success-16-9.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/basic-better-best?hl=ko)

성장

### [기본 앱에서 '우수'로](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/basic-better-best?hl=ko)

프리미엄 플랫폼 및 하드웨어 기능 지원을 비롯하여 앱의 매력을 높이고 경쟁사 앱과 차별화하는 방법을 알아보세요.

[앱 성장시키기](https://developer.android.com/social-and-messaging/guides/basic-better-best?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/dual-screen-devices.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/social?hl=ko)

성장

### [대형 화면에 소셜 환경 제공](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/social?hl=ko)

대형 화면 갤러리에서 태블릿과 폴더블을 위한 소셜 미디어 디자인을 살펴보세요.

[대형 화면 갤러리](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/social?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wearable-app.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/messaging?hl=ko)

성장

### [스마트시계에서 소통하기](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/messaging?hl=ko)

Wear OS 갤러리에서 스마트시계용 메시지 디자인을 살펴보고 안정적이고 유용하며 안전한 커뮤니케이션을 지원합니다.

[Wear OS 갤러리](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/messaging?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/samples.svg?hl=ko)](https://github.com/android/socialite)

샘플

### [소셜 샘플 검토](https://github.com/android/socialite)

샘플 앱에서 메시지, 카메라, 미디어 사용 사례를 다루는 권장사항을 확인해 보세요.

[GitHub으로 이동](https://github.com/android/socialite)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/media/media-hero.svg?hl=ko)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/dev-center/icons/media.svg?hl=ko)개발자 센터

### Android 카메라 및 미디어 앱

카메라 및 미디어 앱 개발에 관한 콘텐츠를 확인할 수 있는 첫 번째 장소입니다. Jetpack Media3로 재생 및 편집 앱을 빌드하는 방법에 관한 리소스를 살펴보세요. Android의 멀티스크린 생태계 전반에서 사용자에게 매력적인 미디어 환경을 제공하는 방법을 알아보세요.

[문서 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/media/guides?hl=ko)
 [Codelab 시작하기](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/exoplayer-intro?hl=ko)

가이드

### [Jetpack Media3](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3?hl=ko)

핵심 미디어 환경을 위한 간단하고 맞춤설정이 가능하며 안정적이며 성능이 우수한 Android API입니다.

가이드

### [Jetpack Compose 및 WindowManager](https://developer.android.com/large-screens?hl=ko)

폴더블 및 플립블과 같은 유연한 디스플레이에 적응형 UI 지원을 활용합니다.

가이드

### [웨어러블 기기용 카드](https://developer.android.com/wear?hl=ko)

사용자가 미디어에 빠르게 액세스할 수 있도록 합니다.

가이드

### [다음 볼만한 동영상 채널](https://developer.android.com/tv?hl=ko)

사용자가 관심을 갖는 TV 콘텐츠를 추천합니다.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/dual-screen-devices.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=ko)

### [대형 화면 갤러리](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=ko)

대형 화면 갤러리에서 태블릿 및 폴더블용 미디어 디자인을 살펴보세요.

[대형 화면 갤러리로 이동](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wearable-app.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/media?hl=ko)

### [Wear OS 갤러리](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/media?hl=ko)

Wear OS 갤러리에서 스마트시계용 미디어 디자인을 살펴보세요

[Wear OS 갤러리로 이동](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/media?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/tv.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv?hl=ko)

### [TV 갤러리](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv?hl=ko)

TV 갤러리에서 TV용 미디어 디자인을 살펴보세요.

[TV 갤러리로 이동](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv?hl=ko)

### 핵심 워크플로

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/playback.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=ko)

개발

### [재생](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=ko)

Media3의 기본 플레이어 구현인 ExoPlayer를 사용하거나 SimpleBasePlayer 클래스를 구현하여 자체 플레이어를 빌드합니다. 그런 다음 MediaSession 또는 MediaLibraryService를 구현하여 재생 기능을 확장합니다.

[재생을 위한 빌드](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/edit.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=ko)

개발

### [수정](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=ko)

Media3은 형식 간 변환 (트랜스코딩), 긴 동영상에서 클립 자르기, 동영상 프레임의 일부 자르기, 맞춤 효과 적용 및 기타 편집 작업 등의 변경사항 적용과 같은 미디어 편집용 API인 Transformer를 도입합니다.

[편집 앱 빌드](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/enhance-media-16-9.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=ko)

Enhance

### [프리미엄 미디어 환경 추가](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=ko)

HDR, PIP 모드, 서라운드 오디오와 같은 기능으로 사용자 만족도를 높이세요. 앱을 돋보이게 하도록 설계된 플랫폼과 Jetpack API에 관해 알아보세요.

[프리미엄 기능 살펴보기](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/grow-your-app-16-9.svg?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=ko)

성장

### [앱을 우수에서 우수로 발전시키세요](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=ko)

앱을 기본 미디어 기능에서 멀티스크린 통합, 참여도 향상, 수익 창출 등으로 전환하는 방법을 알아보세요.

[앱 성장시키기](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=ko)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/sample-app-16-9.svg?hl=ko)](https://github.com/android/uamp)

샘플

### [샘플 앱 검토](https://github.com/android/uamp)

MediaSession을 구현하고 서라운드 오디오로 앱을 돋보이게 하는 방법을 포함하여 오디오 및 동영상 재생 사용 사례에 관한 샘플 앱에서 실제로 적용된 권장사항을 확인하세요.

[GitHub으로 이동](https://github.com/android/uamp)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/media/overview/migrate-to-media3_2880.png?hl=ko)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=ko)

### [Media3으로 이전](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=ko)

독립형 ExoPlayer 라이브러리, MediaCompat 또는 Jetpack Media2와 같은 이전 API를 사용하나요? 이전 가이드를 따르고 이전 스크립트를 사용하여 Media3을 쉽게 이전하세요.

**Jetpack Media3으로 이전하는 이유**

*   ExoPlayer, MediaSession 및 MediaController API를 업데이트했습니다.
*   새 Transformer API로 수정
*   MediaCompat API와 하위 호환

[Media3 이전 가이드 참조](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=ko)

### Google의 최신 소식 확인하기

I/O 연결

에서 참석 여부 확인

I/O 연결

[rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-india-2025](https://rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-india-2025/)
에서 참석 여부 확인

Jetpack Media3 Issue Tracker를 사용하여 개선에 동참해 주세요.

Oturum açma iş akışı ekleme

Koleksiyonlar ile düzeninizi koruyun İçeriği tercihlerinize göre kaydedin ve kategorilere ayırın.


================================================================================================================================

Kullanıcı verilerini korumak ve uygulama özelliklerine ve verilerine erişimi kontrol etmek için Android uygulamanıza bir oturum açma iş akışı ekleyerek uygulamanızın, verilerinizin ve kullanıcılarınızın güvenliğini sağlamaya yardımcı olun.

![Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi kimlik doğrulama akışını gösteren animasyon](https://developer.android.com/static/training/sign-in/images/credman_shrine.gif?hl=tr "Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi kimlik doğrulama akışı")

*   **Kullanıcı verilerini koruyun**. Kimlik doğrulama, uygulamanızın kullanıcı verilerini yetkisiz erişime karşı korur. Kullanıcıların oturum açmasını zorunlu kılarak, kullanıcılarınızın yalnızca hak ettikleri bilgilere erişmelerine yardımcı olabilirsiniz.
*   **Sahtekarlığı önlemeye yardımcı olun**. Kimlik doğrulamasıyla birlikte kimlik doğrulama, saldırganın sahte hesaplar oluşturmasını veya mevcut hesaplara yetkisiz erişim elde etmesini zorlaştırır.
*   **Kullanıcı deneyimini iyileştirin**. Sadeleştirilmiş bir kimlik doğrulama iş akışı, kullanıcılarınızın veri ve hizmetlerine erişmek için kaydolma ve oturum açma karmaşıklığını azaltır.
*   **Yönetmeliklere uyun**. Oturum açma iş akışı, verileri korumak için kimlik doğrulama gerektiren düzenlemelere uygundur.

Kimlik doğrulama
----------------

Uygulamanıza kimlik doğrulama eklemek için çoğu Android projesinin [Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/passkeys?hl=tr)
 kullanması gerekir. Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi; geçiş anahtarları, şifreler ve Google ile oturum açma gibi birleşik çözümler dahil olmak üzere başlıca kimlik doğrulama yöntemlerinin çoğunu uygulamanıza entegre etmenize olanak tanıyan modern bir Jetpack kitaplığıdır. Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'nin, One Tap gibi eski kimlik doğrulama API'lerine göre avantajları şunlardır:

*   **Daha basit entegrasyon**: Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, çoğu önemli kimlik doğrulama seçeneğini tek bir birleştirilmiş API ile uygulamanıza olanak tanır.
*   **Daha iyi kullanıcı deneyimi**: Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'nin birleştirilmiş oturum açma arayüzü, kullanıcılarınıza net, tanıdık ve tutarlı bir deneyim sunar, kullanıcı kaybını azaltır ve kayıt ile oturum açma hızlarını iyileştirir.
*   **Google'a bir kez dokunarak oturum açma ve kaydolma**: Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, kullanıcılarınızın uygulamanızın içeriğiyle uyumlu bir iletişim kutusuyla bir Google Hesabı oluşturmalarını veya oturum açmalarını isteyecek şekilde yapılandırılabilir. Böylece, kayıt ekranı tarafından hiçbir zaman bağlam dışına çıkarılmazlar. Azaltılmış kayıt veya giriş zorlukları, kullanıcılarınızın uygulamanıza kaydolup oturum açarken başarı oranlarını artırır.
*   **Gelişmiş güvenlik**: Şifrelerden şifresiz kimlik doğrulamaya geçiş yapmak saldırı vektörlerini azaltmaya yardımcı olur, kullanıcıların ilk katılım sürecini basitleştirir ve uygulamanızın güvenliğini artırır. Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, [şifre anahtarları](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/patterns/passkeys?hl=tr)
     kullanarak şifresiz kimlik doğrulama desteğini etkinleştirir.
*   **Daha fazla esneklik**: Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, mevcut kimlik doğrulama sağlayıcılarıyla entegre olabilir veya kendi kimlik doğrulama sürecinizi geliştirebilirsiniz.

Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi, modern kimlik doğrulama yöntemleri için otomatik olarak birleştirilmiş bir alt sayfa görüntüler ve [Android'deki Şifreler için Smart Lock](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/smart-lock-migration?hl=tr)
 ve [One Tap](https://developers.google.com/identity/one-tap/android/overview?hl=tr)
 gibi mevcut kimlik doğrulama uygulamalarının yerini alır.

Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi ile Android uygulamanızda kimlik doğrulama oluşturma hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinin:

*   [Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi ile kullanıcınızda oturum açma](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/passkeys?hl=tr)
    
*   [Geçiş anahtarıyla kullanıcı kimlik doğrulaması kullanıcı deneyimi rehberi](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/mobile/guides/patterns/passkeys?hl=tr)
    
*   [Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ni Google ile oturum açma özelliğini entegre etme](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/credential-manager?hl=tr)
    
*   [Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ni WebView ile entegre etme](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/credential-manager-webview?hl=tr)
    
*   [Android öğrenme rotasındaki geçiş anahtarları](https://developer.android.com/courses/pathways/passkeys?hl=tr)
    

Mevcut kimlik doğrulama akışlarınızı Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ne nasıl taşıyacağınızı öğrenin:

*   [Eski Google ile oturum açma düğme akışlarından yükseltme](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/credential-manager?hl=tr#siwg-button)
    
*   [Şifreler için Smart Lock'tan Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ne geçiş](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/smart-lock-migration?hl=tr)
    
*   [FIDO2'den Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ne geçme](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/fido2-migration?hl=tr)
    

Geçiş anahtarlarını ve Credential Manager API'si ile kullanılabilirliği iyileştirmek için mevcut kimlik ve kimlik doğrulama API'lerinizi nasıl basitleştireceğinizi öğrenin:

*   [Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi'ni, kimlik bilgisi sağlayıcı çözümünüzle entegre etme](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/credential-provider?hl=tr)
    
*   [Ayrıcalıklı uygulamalar için diğer taraflar adına Kimlik Bilgisi Yöneticisi çağrıları yapma](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/privileged-apps?hl=tr)
    

Otomatik doldurma
-----------------

Şifre yöneticileri gibi bazı uygulamalar, diğer uygulamalardaki görünümleri kullanıcı tarafından sağlanan verilerle doldurur. Diğer uygulamaların görünümünü dolduran uygulamalara otomatik doldurma hizmetleri denir. Otomatik doldurma çerçevesi, bir uygulama ile otomatik doldurma hizmeti arasındaki iletişimi yönetir ve alanları doldurmaya ve kullanıcı girişi hatalarını en aza indirerek zamandan tasarruf ederek kullanıcı deneyiminin iyileştirilmesine yardımcı olur. Otomatik doldurma şifre yöneticilerini desteklediğinden kullanıcılar geçiş anahtarları veya makine tarafından oluşturulan, güvenli bir şekilde ve daha az sorunsuz bir şekilde saklanıp alınabilen benzersiz, makine tarafından oluşturulmuş şifreler gibi daha güçlü kimlik bilgileri seçmeye teşvik edilebilir.

Android'in otomatik doldurma çerçevesi hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinin:

*   [Otomatik doldurma hakkında](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/text/autofill?hl=tr)
    
*   [Uygulamanızı otomatik doldurma için optimize etme](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/text/autofill-optimize?hl=tr)
    
*   [Otomatik doldurma hizmetleri oluşturma](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/text/autofill-services?hl=tr)
    
*   [Otomatik doldurma özelliğini klavyelerle entegre etme](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/text/ime-autofill?hl=tr)
    

Biyometri
---------

Güvenliği daha da artırmak için biyometrik kimlik doğrulamayı uygulamanıza entegre edin. Biyometrik kimlik doğrulama, özellikle çok öğeli kimlik doğrulama şemalarında, kimlik bilginin gerçek ve doğrulanabilir şekilde hedeflenen kullanıcıya ait olmasını sağlayarak sahtekarlık riskini azaltır. Biyometrik kimlik doğrulama, kullanıcı deneyimini aşağıdaki şekillerde iyileştirebilir:

*   Daha hızlı giriş yapılmasını sağlar
*   Daha sorunsuz kimlik bilgisi doğrulaması için fırsatlar sunar
*   Şifre kullanımını azaltır
*   Düzenlemelere uygunluk konusunda yardımcı olabilir.

[Biyometrik kimlik doğrulamasının nasıl uygulanacağı](https://developer.android.com/training/sign-in/biometric-auth?hl=tr)
 hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinin.

Bu sayfadaki içerik ve kod örnekleri, [İçerik Lisansı](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=tr)
 sayfasında açıklanan lisanslara tabidir. Java ve OpenJDK, Oracle ve/veya satış ortaklarının tescilli ticari markasıdır.

Son güncelleme tarihi: 2024-01-02 UTC.

---

Questa pagina è stata utile?

Principi di navigazione

bookmark\_borderbookmark Mantieni tutto organizzato con le raccolte Salva e classifica i contenuti in base alle tue preferenze.


==========================================================================================================================================================

*   Su questa pagina
*   [Destinazione iniziale fissa](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#fixed_start_destination)
    
*   [Lo stato di navigazione è rappresentato come uno stack di destinazioni](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#navigation_state_is_represented_as_a_stack_of_destinations)
    
*   [Su e Indietro sono identici nell'attività dell'app](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#up_and_back_are_identical_within_your_apps_task)
    
*   [Il pulsante Su non chiude mai l'app](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#the_up_button_never_exits_your_app)
    
*   [I link diretti simulano la navigazione manuale](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#deep-link)
    

La navigazione tra app e schermate è una parte fondamentale dell'esperienza utente. I seguenti principi costituiscono una base di riferimento per un'esperienza utente coerente e intuitiva in tutte le app. Il [componente Navigazione](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation?hl=it)
 è progettato per implementare questi principi per impostazione predefinita, garantendo che gli utenti possano applicare le stesse euristiche e gli stessi pattern nella navigazione mentre si spostano tra le app.

Destinazione iniziale fissa
---------------------------

Ogni app che crei ha una destinazione iniziale fissa. Questa è la prima schermata visualizzata dall'utente quando avvia la tua app da Avvio app. Questa destinazione è anche l'ultima schermata visualizzata dall'utente quando torna ad Avvio app dopo aver premuto il pulsante Indietro. Diamo un'occhiata all'[app Girasole](https://github.com/android/sunflower/tree/main/app)
 come esempio.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation-principles-start-destination.png?hl=it)

**Figura 1.** La schermata elenco è la destinazione iniziale dell'app Sunflower.

Quando avvia l'app Sunflower da Avvio app, la prima schermata che un utente vede è la **schermata elenco**, ovvero l'elenco di piante del proprio giardino. Questa è anche l'ultima schermata visualizzata prima di uscire dall'app. Se preme il pulsante Indietro dalla schermata dell'elenco, gli utenti tornano ad Avvio app.

Lo stato di navigazione è rappresentato come uno stack di destinazioni
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Al primo avvio dell'app, viene creata una [nuova attività](https://developer.android.com/guide/components/activities/tasks-and-back-stack?hl=it)
 per l'utente e l'app visualizza la destinazione iniziale. Questa diventa la destinazione di base di quello che è noto come _stack back_ ed è la base per lo stato di navigazione della tua app. In cima alla pila viene visualizzata la schermata corrente, mentre le destinazioni precedenti rappresentano la cronologia dei luoghi che hai visitato. Lo stack posteriore ha sempre la destinazione iniziale dell'app in fondo allo stack.

Le operazioni che modificano lo stack posteriore vengono sempre eseguite in cima allo stack, spingendo una nuova destinazione in cima allo stack o esaltando la destinazione più in alto dallo stack. Se si naviga verso una destinazione, questa viene caricata in cima allo stack.

Il [componente Navigazione](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation?hl=it)
 gestisce per te tutto l'ordinamento back stack, ma puoi anche scegliere di gestire autonomamente lo stack back.

Su e Indietro sono identici nell'attività dell'app
--------------------------------------------------

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation-up-back.png?hl=it)

**Figura 2.** I pulsanti Su e Indietro

Il pulsante Indietro viene visualizzato nella barra di navigazione del sistema nella parte inferiore dello schermo e viene utilizzato per navigare in ordine cronologico inverso nella cronologia delle schermate con cui l'utente ha lavorato di recente. Quando premi il pulsante Indietro, la destinazione corrente viene estratta dalla parte superiore dello stack posteriore, quindi puoi passare alla destinazione precedente.

Il pulsante Su viene visualizzato nella [barra dell'app](https://developer.android.com/training/appbar?hl=it)
 nella parte superiore dello schermo. Nell'attività dell'app, i pulsanti Su e Indietro si comportano in modo identico.

Il pulsante Su non chiude mai l'app
-----------------------------------

Se un utente si trova nella destinazione iniziale dell'app, il pulsante Su non viene visualizzato, perché il pulsante Su non esce mai dall'app. Tuttavia, il pulsante Indietro viene mostrato ed esce dall'app.

Quando l'app viene avviata utilizzando un [link diretto](https://developer.android.com/training/app-links/deep-linking?hl=it)
 nell'attività di un'altra app, la Freccia su riporta gli utenti all'attività dell'app e tramite uno [stack back simulato](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-principles?hl=it#deep-link)
 e non all'app che ha attivato il link diretto. Il pulsante Indietro, invece, ti riporta all'altra app.

I link diretti simulano la navigazione manuale
----------------------------------------------

Che si tratti di [link diretti](https://developer.android.com/training/app-links/deep-linking?hl=it)
 o di navigazione manuale verso una destinazione specifica, puoi utilizzare il pulsante Su per spostarti tra le destinazioni e tornare a quella di partenza.

Quando inserisci un link diretto a una destinazione all'interno dell'attività dell'app, qualsiasi backstack esistente per l'attività dell'app viene rimosso e sostituito con il back stack con link diretti.

Usando di nuovo l'app Sunflower, supponiamo che l'utente abbia avviato in precedenza l'app dalla schermata Avvio app e sia passato alla schermata dei dettagli di una mela. La schermata Recenti indica che esiste un'attività in cui la schermata più in alto è quella dei dettagli dell'Apple.

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation-principles-deep-linking.png?hl=it)

**Figura 3.** L'utente naviga nell'app Sunflower e nello stack posteriore risultante.

A questo punto, l'utente può toccare il pulsante Home per mettere l'app in background. Supponiamo poi che l'app abbia una funzionalità di link diretto, che consente agli utenti di lanciare l'app direttamente in base al nome della schermata dei dettagli di uno specifico impianto. L'apertura dell'app tramite questo link diretto sostituisce completamente l'attuale stack di backup Girasole mostrato nella Figura 3 con uno nuovo, come mostrato nella Figura 4:

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation-principles-deep-linking-2.png?hl=it)

**Figura 4.** Se segui un link diretto, lo stack esistente esistente per l'app Sunflower viene sostituito.

Nota che lo stack posteriore Girasole è sostituito da uno _stack back sintetico_ con la schermata dei dettagli dell'avocado in alto. Anche la schermata _My Garden_, che è la destinazione di partenza, è stata aggiunta allo stack posteriore. Lo stack originale Girasole è stato eliminato, inclusa la consapevolezza dell'app che l'utente si trovava nella schermata dei dettagli di Apple in precedenza. Tutto questo è importante perché lo stack di base sintetico deve essere realistico. Deve corrispondere a uno stack di backup che avrebbe potuto essere ottenuto esplorando l'app in modo organico.

Per soddisfare questa esigenza, lo stack di backup sintetico che viene creato è semplificato in base a `NavGraph`. Per un elemento `NavGraph` semplice senza nidificazione, sarà composto dalla destinazione iniziale e dalla destinazione del link diretto. Per [grafici di navigazione nidificati](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-nested-graphs?hl=it)
 più complessi, lo stack di ritorno sintetico conterrà anche le destinazioni iniziali di tutti i grafici nidificati che sono i predecessori della destinazione del link diretto.

Il componente Navigazione [supporta i link diretti](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/architecture/navigation/navigation-deep-link?hl=it)
 e ricrea uno stack di ritorno realistico quando effettui il collegamento a qualsiasi destinazione nel grafico di navigazione.

Questa pagina è stata utile?

I campioni di contenuti e codice in questa pagina sono soggetti alle licenze descritte nella [Licenza per i contenuti](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=it)
. Java e OpenJDK sono marchi o marchi registrati di Oracle e/o delle sue società consociate.

Ultimo aggiornamento 2025-07-27 UTC.

Developer guide

bookmark\_borderbookmark Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.


==================================================================================================================================

*   On this page
*   [Prerequisites](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#prerequisites)
    
*   [Work profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#work-profiles)
    *   [Key features of a work profile](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#key-features-of-a-work-profile)
        
    *   [Work profile benefits on Android 5.0+](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#work-profile-benefits-on-android-5.0+)
        
    *   [Considerations for work profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#considerations-for-work-profiles)
        
    *   [Prevent intents from failing between profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#prevent-intents-from-failing-between-profiles)
        
    *   [Share files across profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#share-files-across-profiles)
        
*   [Implement managed configurations](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#managed-configurations)
    *   [Best practices for implementing managed configurations](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#best-practices-for-implementing-managed-configurations)
        
*   [Dedicated devices](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#dedicated-device)
    
*   [Set up single sign-on with Chrome Custom Tabs](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#sso)
    *   [Requirements](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#requirements)
        
    *   [How do I implement SSO with Custom Tabs?](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#how-to-implement)
        
*   [Test your app](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#testing)
    *   [Use Test DPC to test your Android app](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#use-test-dpc-to-test-your-android-app)
        
    *   [Provision a work profile](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#provision-a-work-profile)
        
    *   [Provision a fully managed device](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#provision-a-fully-managed-device)
        
    *   [End-to-end testing](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#end-to-end-testing)
        

Android's enterprise features provide organizations with a secure, flexible, and unified Android mobility platform—combining devices, applications, and management. Android apps are compatible with Android's enterprise features by default. However, there are additional features you can use to make your app work best on managed Android devices:

*   [Work profile compatibility](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#work-profiles)
    —Modify your Android app so it functions best on a managed device.
*   [Managed configurations](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#managed-configurations)
    —Modify your app to allow IT admins the option to specify custom settings for your apps.
*   [Dedicated devices](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#dedicated-device)
    —Optimize your app so that it can be deployed on an Android device as a kiosk.
*   [Single Sign-On (SSO)](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#sso)
    —Simplify the sign-on process for users signing in to different apps on their managed Android device.

### Prerequisites

1.  You’ve created an Android app.
2.  You’re ready to modify your app so that it works best for organizations.
3.  Minimum version: Android 5.0 Lollipop recommended version: Android 6.0 Marshmallow and later.

Note: Android's enterprise features are built into most Android 5.0 devices; however, Android 6.0 and later offers additional features, especially with regard to dedicated devices.

Work profiles
-------------

You can manage a user’s business data and applications through a work profile. A work profile is a managed corporate profile associated with the primary user account on an Android device. A work profile securely isolates work apps and data from personal apps and data. This work profile is in a separate container from the personal profile, which your user controls. These separate profiles allow organizations to manage the business data they care about, but leave everything else on a user’s device under the user’s control. For a deep dive into best practices, see the [Work profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-profiles)
 guide. For an overview of those best practices, see below.

### Key features of a work profile

*   Separate and secure profile
*   Managed Google Play for application distribution
*   Separate badged work applications
*   Profile-only management capabilities controlled by an admin

### Work profile benefits on Android 5.0+

*   Full device encryption
*   One Android application package (APK) for both profiles when there’s a personal profile and a work profile present on the device
*   [Device policy controller](https://support.google.com/work/android/answer/6192678)
     (DPC) is limited to the work profile
*   Device administration via the [DevicePolicyManager](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/app/admin/DevicePolicyManager)
     class

### Considerations for work profiles

*   The Android system prevents intents [from crossing profiles](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/app/admin/DevicePolicyManager#clearCrossProfileIntentFilters(android.content.ComponentName))
     and IT admins can [enable or disable system apps](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/app/admin/DevicePolicyManager#enableSystemApp(android.content.ComponentName,%20java.lang.String))
    .
*   A file path (Uniform Resource Identifier \[URI\]) that’s valid on one profile may not be valid on the other.

### Prevent intents from failing between profiles

It’s difficult to know which intents can cross between profiles, and which ones are blocked. The only way to know for sure is by testing. Before your app starts an activity, you should verify that the request is resolved by calling [`Intent.resolveActivity()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/Intent#resolveActivity(android.content.pm.PackageManager))
.

*   If it returns `null`, the request doesn’t resolve.
*   If it returns something, it shows that the intent resolves, and it’s safe to send the intent.

**Note**: For detailed testing instructions, see [Prevent Failed Intents](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-profiles#prevent_failed_intents)
.

### Share files across profiles

Some developers use URIs to mark file paths in Android. However, because there are separate file systems when a work profile is present, we recommend:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Use:**  <br>Content URIs | *   The [content URIs](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/ContentUris)<br>     contain the authority, path, and ID for a specific file. You can generate this using [FileProvider](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/core/content/FileProvider)<br>     subclass. [Learn more](https://developer.android.com/training/secure-file-sharing)<br>    <br>*   Share and grant permissions to access the content URI using an Intent. Permissions can only be passed across the profile boundary using Intents. If you grant another app access rights to your file using [`Context.grantUriPermission()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/Context#grantUriPermission(java.lang.String,%20android.net.Uri,%20int))<br>    , it only is granted for that app in the same profile. |
| **Don't use:**  <br>File URI | *   Contains the absolute path of the file on the device’s storage.<br>*   A file path URI that’s valid on one profile isn’t valid on the other.<br>*   If you attach a file URI to an intent, a handler is unable to access the file in another profile. |

**Next steps**: Once your app supports managed profiles, test it in a work profile. See [Test your app](https://developer.android.com/work/guide#testing)
.

Implement managed configurations
--------------------------------

Managed configurations are a set of instructions that IT admins can use to manage their users’ mobile devices in a specific way. These instructions are universal and work across any EMM, allowing admins to remotely configure applications on their users’ phones.

If you’re developing apps for business or government, you may need to satisfy your industry’s specific set of requirements. Using managed configurations, the IT admin can remotely specify settings and enforce policies for their users’ Android apps; for example:

*   Configure if an app can sync data via cellular/3G, or only Wi-Fi
*   Allow or block URLs on a web browser
*   Configure an app's email settings
*   Enable or disable printing
*   Manage bookmarks

### Best practices for implementing managed configurations

The [Set up Managed Configurations](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-configurations)
 guide is the key source for information on how to build and deploy managed configurations. After you’ve reviewed this documentation, see recommendations below for additional guidance.

#### When first launching the app

As soon as you launch an application, you can see if managed configurations are already set for this app in `onStart()` or `onResume()`. Additionally, you can find out if your application is managed or unmanaged. For example, if [`getApplicationRestrictions()`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/RestrictionsManager#getApplicationRestrictions())
 returns:

*   **A set of application-specific restrictions**—You can configure the managed configurations silently (without requiring user input).
*   **An empty bundle**—Your application acts like it’s unmanaged (for example, how the app behaves in a personal profile).
*   **A bundle with a single key value pair with [`KEY_RESTRICTIONS_PENDING`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/os/UserManager#KEY_RESTRICTIONS_PENDING)
     set to true**—your application is being managed, but the DPC isn’t configured correctly. You should block this user from your app, and direct them to their IT admin.

#### Listen for changes to managed configurations

IT admins can change managed configurations and what policies they want to enforce on their users at any time. Because of this, we recommend you ensure that your app can accept new restrictions for your managed configuration as follows:

*   **Fetch restrictions on launch**—Your app should call `getApplicationRestrictions()` in `onStart()` and `onResume()`, and compare against old restrictions to see if changes are required.
*   **Listen while running**—Dynamically register [`ACTION_APPLICATION_RESTRICTIONS_CHANGED`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/content/Intent#ACTION_APPLICATION_RESTRICTIONS_CHANGED)
     in your running activities or services, after you’ve checked for new restrictions. This intent is sent only to listeners that are dynamically registered, and not to listeners declared in the app manifest.
*   **Unregister while not running**—In `onPause()`, you should unregister for the broadcast of `ACTION_APPLICATION_RESTRICTIONS_CHANGED`.

Dedicated devices
-----------------

Dedicated devices are kiosk devices used for a single purpose, such as digital signage displays, ticket printing kiosks, or checkout registers.

When an Android device is configured as a dedicated device, the user sees an application locked to the screen with no Home or Recent Apps buttons to escape the app. Dedicated devices can also be configured to show a set of applications, such as a library kiosk with an app for the library catalog and a web browser.

For instructions, see [Dedicated-device](https://developer.android.com/work/cosu)
.

Set up single sign-on with Chrome Custom Tabs
---------------------------------------------

Enterprise users often have multiple apps on their device, and they prefer to sign in once to access all of their work applications. Typically, users sign in through a [WebView](https://developer.chrome.com/multidevice/webview/overview)
; however, there are a couple reasons why this isn’t ideal:

1.  Users often need to sign in multiple times with the same credentials. The WebView solution often isn’t a true single sign-on (SSO) experience.
2.  There can be security risks, including malicious applications inspecting cookies or injecting JavaScript® to access a user’s credentials. Even trusted developers are at risk if they rely on potentially malicious third-party SDKs.

A solution to both problems is to authenticate users using browser Custom Tabs, instead of WebView. This ensures that authentication:

*   Occurs in a secure context (the system browser) where the host app cannot inspect contents.
*   Has a shared cookie state, ensuring the user has to sign in only once.

### Requirements

[Custom Tabs](https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/support-library/features.html#custom-tabs)
 are supported back to API level 15 (Android 4.0.3). To use Custom Tabs you need a supported browser, such as Chrome. Chrome 45 and later implement this feature as [Chrome Custom Tabs](https://developer.chrome.com/multidevice/android/customtabs)
.

### How do I implement SSO with Custom Tabs?

Google has open sourced an OAuth client library that uses Custom Tabs, contributing it to the OpenID Connect working group of the OpenID Foundation. To set up Custom Tabs for SSO with the AppAuth library, see the [documentation and sample code on GitHub](https://github.com/openid/AppAuth-Android)
.

Test your app
-------------

After you’ve developed your app, you’ll want to test it—both in a work profile and on a fully managed device. See the instructions below.

### Use Test DPC to test your Android app

We provide the Test DPC app to help Android developers test their apps in an enterprise environment. Using Test DPC, you can set EMM policies or managed configuration values on a device—as if an organization managed the device using an EMM. To install Test DPC on a device, choose one of the following methods:

*   Install Test DPC from [GooglePlay](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.afwsamples.testdpc)
    .
*   Build from the source on [GitHub](https://github.com/googlesamples/android-testdpc)
    .

For more information on how to configure Test DPC, see the instructions below and the [Test DPC User Guide](https://github.com/googlesamples/android-testdpc)
.

### Provision a work profile

To test your app in a work profile, you need to first provision a work profile on device using the Test DPC app, as follows:

1.  Install Test DPC on the device.
2.  In the Android launcher, tap the **Set up Test DPC** app icon.
3.  Follow the onscreen instructions.
4.  Install your app on the device and test to see how it runs in the work profile.

Android creates a work profile and installs a copy of Test DPC in the work profile. You use this work-badged instance of Test DPC to set policies and managed configurations in the work profile. To learn more about setting up a work profile for development, read the developer’s guide [Work profiles](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-profiles)
.

### Provision a fully managed device

Organizations use fully managed devices because they can enforce a full range of management policies on the device. To provision a fully managed device, follow these steps:

1.  Install Test DPC on the device.
2.  Confirm that there are no other users or a work profile on the device.
3.  Confirm that there are no accounts on the device.
4.  Run the following [Android Debug Bridge](https://developer.android.com/studio/command-line/adb)
     (adb) command in your terminal:
    
    adb shell dpm set-device-owner com.afwsamples.testdpc/.DeviceAdminReceiver
    
5.  Once you’ve completed provisioning the device owner, you can test your app on that device. You should specifically test how [managed configurations](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-configurations)
     and [intents](https://developer.android.com/work/managed-profiles#prevent_failed_intents)
     work on that device.

You can also use other provisioning methods—see the [Test DPC User Guide](https://github.com/googlesamples/android-testdpc)
. To learn how IT admins typically enroll and provision Android-powered devices, read [Provision devices](https://developers.google.com/android/work/play/emm-api/prov-devices)
.

### End-to-end testing

After you’ve finished testing your app in the environments above, you’ll likely want to test your app in an end-to-end production environment. This process includes the steps a customer needs to take to deploy your app in their organization, including:

*   App distribution through Play
*   Server-side managed configuration
*   Server-side profile policy control

You need to access an EMM console to complete the end-to-end testing. The easiest way to get one is to request a testing console from your EMM. Once you have access, complete these tasks:

1.  Create a test version of your application with a [new ApplicationId](http://tools.android.com/tech-docs/new-build-system/applicationid-vs-packagename)
    .
2.  Claim a [managed Google domain](https://support.google.com/work/android/answer/6174056)
     and bind it to your EMM. If you already have a testing domain that’s bound to an EMM, you may need to unbind it to test it with your preferred EMM. Please consult your EMM for the specific unbinding steps.
3.  [Publish your application to the private channel](https://support.google.com/a/answer/2494992)
     for their managed Google domain.
4.  Use the EMM console and EMM application to:
    1.  Set up work devices.
    2.  Distribute your application.
    3.  Set managed configuration.
    4.  Set device policies.

This process will differ based on your EMM. Please consult your EMM’s documentation for further details. Congrats! You’ve completed these steps and verified that your app works well for enterprise users.

Was this helpful?

. Java and OpenJDK are trademarks or registered trademarks of Oracle and/or its affiliates.

### Aparat i multimedia na Androida

Twoja pierwsza baza na materiałach do tworzenia aplikacji aparatu i multimediów. Zapoznaj się z materiałami na temat tworzenia aplikacji do odtwarzania i edytowania treści w Jetpack Media3. Dowiedz się, jak docierać z atrakcyjnymi treściami multimedialnymi do użytkowników korzystających z różnych urządzeń z Androidem.

[Pierwsze kroki z dokumentami](https://developer.android.com/media/guides?hl=pl)
 [Ćwiczenia z programowania](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/exoplayer-intro?hl=pl)

Wskazówka

### [Jetpack Media3](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3?hl=pl)

Proste, konfigurowalne, niezawodne i wydajne interfejsy API Androida do obsługi głównych multimediów.

Wskazówka

### [Jetpack Compose i WindowManager](https://developer.android.com/large-screens?hl=pl)

Wykorzystaj adaptacyjny interfejs użytkownika w przypadku elastycznych ekranów, takich jak urządzenia składane i obracane.

Wskazówka

### [Kafelki na urządzenia do noszenia](https://developer.android.com/wear?hl=pl)

Zapewnij użytkownikom szybki dostęp do ich multimediów.

Wskazówka

### [Kanał Warte obejrzenia](https://developer.android.com/tv?hl=pl)

Polecaj treści telewizyjne, które są ważne dla Twoich użytkowników.

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/dual-screen-devices.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=pl)

### [Galeria dużych ekranów](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=pl)

Przeglądaj projekty multimediów na tablety i urządzenia składane w galerii z dużymi ekranami

[Otwórz galerię dla dużych ekranów](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/wearable-app.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/wear/gallery/media?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/tv.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv?hl=pl)

Przeglądaj w galerii projekty multimedialne na telewizory
