### Podstawowy przepływ pracy

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/playback.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=pl)

Programowanie

### [Odtwarzanie](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=pl)

Użyj ExoPlayer, domyślnej implementacji odtwarzacza w Media3, lub utwórz własny odtwarzacz, implementując klasę SimpleBasePlayer. Następnie rozszerz możliwości odtwarzania, implementując MediaSession lub MediaLibraryService.

[Twórz z myślą o odtwarzaniu](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/playback-app?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/edit.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=pl)

Programowanie

### [Edytowanie](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=pl)

Media3 wprowadza Transformer – interfejs API do edycji multimediów, w tym konwersji między formatami (transkodowania), stosowania zmian takich jak przycinanie klipu z dłuższego filmu, przycinanie fragmentu filmu, stosowanie efektów niestandardowych i inne operacje edycji.

[Utwórz aplikację do edycji](https://developer.android.com/media/implement/editing-app?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/enhance-media-16-9.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=pl)

Popraw

### [Dodaj wysokiej jakości multimedia](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=pl)

Zachwyć użytkowników funkcjami takimi jak HDR, obraz w obrazie i dźwięk przestrzenny. Poznaj platformę i interfejsy API Jetpack, które wyróżnią Twoją aplikację.

[Poznaj funkcje premium](https://developer.android.com/media/grow?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/grow-your-app-16-9.svg?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=pl)

Powiększać

### [Ulepsz swoją aplikację](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=pl)

Zobacz, jak przejść w swojej aplikacji z podstawowych funkcji multimediów na integrację z wieloma urządzeniami, zwiększenie zaangażowania, generowanie przychodów i nie tylko.

[Rozwijaj aplikację](https://developer.android.com/media/grow/good-better-best?hl=pl)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/cluster-illustrations/sample-app-16-9.svg?hl=pl)](https://github.com/android/uamp)

Przykład

### [Sprawdzanie przykładowej aplikacji](https://github.com/android/uamp)

Zapoznaj się ze sprawdzonymi metodami w naszej przykładowej aplikacji do odtwarzania dźwięku i wideo, m.in. dowiedz się, jak wdrożyć sesję MediaSession i wyróżnić swoją aplikację za pomocą dźwięku przestrzennego.

[Otwórz GitHuba](https://github.com/android/uamp)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/media/overview/migrate-to-media3_2880.png?hl=pl)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=pl)

### [Migracja do Media3](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=pl)

Korzystasz ze starszych interfejsów API, takich jak samodzielna biblioteka ExoPlayer, MediaCompat lub Jetpack Media2? Aby ułatwić sobie migrację do Media3, postępuj zgodnie z naszym przewodnikiem po migracji i skorzystaj z naszego skryptu migracji.

**Dlaczego warto przejść na Jetpack Media3**

*   Zaktualizowane interfejsy API ExoPlayer, MediaSession i MediaController
*   Edytowanie za pomocą nowego interfejsu Transformer API
*   Zgodność wsteczna z interfejsami API MediaCompat

[Zobacz przewodnik po migracji do Media3](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/media/media3/getting-started/migration-guide?hl=pl)

### Skontaktuj się z nami

I/O Connect

### I/O Connect Berlin

Na konferencji I/O Connect Berlin będziemy mieli stoisko z prezentacją **w środę, 25 czerwca**.

Odpowiedz na zaproszenie na stronie [rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-berlin-2025](https://rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-berlin-2025/)

I/O Connect

### I/O Connect w Bengaluru

Na konferencji I/O Connect w Bengaluru **w środę, 23 lipca** będziemy mieć stoisko z prezentacją.

Odpowiedz na zaproszenie na stronie [rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-india-2025](https://rsvp.withgoogle.com/events/ioconnect-india-2025/)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/promotional.svg?hl=pl)](https://github.com/androidx/media/issues)

### [Prześlij opinię lub zgłoś błędy](https://github.com/androidx/media/issues)

Użyj narzędzia do śledzenia problemów z Jetpack Media3, aby pomóc nam je ulepszyć.

[Odwiedź tracker](https://github.com/androidx/media/issues)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/play-integrity-icon.svg?hl=it)

### Play Integrity e servizi di firma

L'integrità e i servizi di firma di Google Play ti consentono di assicurarti che l'esperienza utente delle tue app e dei tuoi giochi sia come previsto.

[Documenti dell'API Play Integrity](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/overview?hl=it)

* * *

Partner che utilizzano l'API Play Integrity

 ![TikTok](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/partner-logos/TikTok.png?hl=it)

 ![Stripe](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/partner-logos/Stripe.png?hl=it)

![FaceApp](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/partner-logos/Faceapp-dark.png?hl=it)

 ![Kabam](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/partner-logos/Kabam.png?hl=it)

 ![Radar](https://developer.android.com/static/images/google/play/integrity/partner-logos/Radar.svg?hl=it)

### [Panoramica dell'API Play Integrity](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/overview?hl=it)

Scopri come funziona l'API Play Integrity, esamina le considerazioni sulla sicurezza e le pratiche consigliate e inizia a utilizzare l'integrazione.

### [Configura l'API Play Integrity](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/setup?hl=it)

Scopri come configurare la tua app o il tuo gioco per usare l'API Play Integrity.

### [Riferimento API](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/reference/com/google/android/play/core/classes?hl=it)

Consulta il riferimento dell'API Play Integrity.

### [Strumenti aggiuntivi](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/additional-tools?hl=it)

Testa la tua integrazione e scopri come generare risposte da qualsiasi dispositivo per il debug e la risoluzione dei problemi.

### [Panoramica della protezione automatica](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/10183279?hl=it)

Per scoprire di più sull'utilizzo della Protezione automatica, consulta la pagina del Centro assistenza.

### [Attiva la protezione automatica](https://play.google.com/console/u/0/developers/app/app-integrity/overview?hl=it)

Puoi attivare la protezione in Play Console.

### [Come firmare l'app](https://developer.android.com/studio/publish/app-signing?hl=it)

Scopri i concetti chiave relativi alla firma dell'app, alla firma dell'app con Android Studio e alla configurazione della firma dell'app di Google Play.

### [Utilizzare la firma dell'app di Google Play](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/9842756?hl=it)

Scopri di più sull'utilizzo della firma dell'app di Google Play nel Centro assistenza Google Play Console.

### [Eseguire l'upgrade della chiave di firma dell'app](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/9842756?hl=it#upgrade)

Scopri come iniziare a utilizzare una nuova chiave di firma con una maggiore crittografia nel Centro assistenza Google Play Console.

### [Android App Bundle](https://developer.android.com/guide/app-bundle?hl=it)

Consulta la documentazione di Android App Bundle.

# Android do samochodu  |  Multidevice  |  Android Developers

[Przejdź do głównej treści](https://developer.android.com/cars?hl=pl#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=pl)
 Zaloguj się

*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=pl)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=pl) Ta strona została przetłumaczona przez [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=pl)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=pl)
    
*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=pl)
    
*   [Android do samochodu](https://developer.android.com/cars?hl=pl)
    

Zadbaj o dobrą organizację dzięki kolekcji Zapisuj i kategoryzuj treści zgodnie ze swoimi preferencjami.

### Android do samochodu

Twórz aplikacje z systemem operacyjnym Android Automotive i Androidem Auto, które pomagają użytkownikom komunikować się podczas jazdy. Użytkownicy, którzy mają pojazd z systemem operacyjnym Android Automotive, mogą zainstalować w nim Twoją aplikację. Android Auto pozwala użytkownikom połączyć telefon z Androidem 9 lub nowszym ze zgodnym pojazdem, aby bezpośrednio na konsoli wyświetlać wersję aplikacji zoptymalizowaną pod kątem kierowcy.

[Rozpocznij](https://developer.android.com/training/cars?hl=pl)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/auto/design-for-cars.svg?hl=pl)](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=pl)

Android do samochodu

### [Projektowanie](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=pl)

Dowiedz się, jak projektować aplikacje zoptymalizowane pod kątem kierowców i pojazdów. Projektuj aplikacje, które zachwycają użytkowników, interfejsami, które są proste, spójne i nie rozpraszają uwagi.

[Więcej informacji](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=pl)

### [Tworzenie aplikacji do multimediów](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/media?hl=pl)

Twórz aplikacje multimedialne, takie jak odtwarzacze muzyki, radia i audiobooków, które użytkownicy mogą zainstalować w swoim pojeździe z Androidem, wyświetlać do niego treści z telefonu lub używać ich na telefonie w podróży.

### [Tworzenie aplikacji do komunikacji](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/communication?hl=pl)

Twórz aplikacje do komunikacji na Androida Auto, które umożliwiają użytkownikom wysyłanie i odbieranie krótkich wiadomości tekstowych oraz nawiązywanie i odbieranie połączeń głosowych na urządzeniu.

### [Tworzenie aplikacji na podstawie szablonów](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/apps?hl=pl)

Twórz aplikacje do wyszukiwania punktów zainteresowania, Internetu rzeczy, pogody i nawigacji na Androida Auto i Androida Automotive, które pomagają użytkownikom znaleźć miejsce docelowe, uzyskać do niego wskazówki i utrzymać łączność oraz być na bieżąco z informacjami.

### [Tworzenie zaparkowanych aplikacji](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/parked?hl=pl)

Przenoś istniejące aplikacje wideo, przeglądarki i gry na Androida na Androida Auto i Androida Automotive, aby użytkownicy mogli z nich korzystać w samochodzie podczas postoju.

### Budowanie ekosystemu

Nawiązaliśmy współpracę z producentami z całego świata, aby udostępnić platformę Androida w samochodach. Od 2020 roku pojazdy z Androidem i systemem operacyjnym Android Automotive umożliwiają użytkownikom korzystanie ze specjalnych funkcji Androida w samochodzie. Android Auto zapewnia milionom użytkowników bezpieczny i wygodny sposób korzystania z aplikacji podczas jazdy dzięki setkom kompatybilnych [samochodów i systemów audio z rynku wtórnego](https://www.android.com/auto/?hl=pl#hit-the-road)
. Użytkownicy mogą też pobrać aplikację Android Auto, aby korzystać z zalet Androida Auto bez zgodnego pojazdu.

[Więcej informacji](https://www.android.com/auto/?hl=pl#hit-the-road)

Sử dụng bộ sưu tập để sắp xếp ngăn nắp các trang Lưu và phân loại nội dung dựa trên lựa chọn ưu tiên của bạn.

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/hero-illustrations/better-together-hero.svg?hl=vi)

### Khả năng kết nối

Kết nối ứng dụng của bạn với thế giới bên ngoài, cho dù là qua Bluetooth, Wi-Fi hay mạng di động, USB hay một giao thức tiêu chuẩn khác.

[Chuyển đến phần hướng dẫn](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/overview?hl=vi)

Hướng dẫn

### [USB](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/usb?hl=vi)

Hỗ trợ phụ kiện USB và chế độ máy chủ.

Hướng dẫn

### [5G](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/5g/enhance-with-5g?hl=vi)

Bổ sung chức năng 5G vào ứng dụng.

Hướng dẫn

### [Giao tiếp phạm vi gần (NFC)](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/nfc?hl=vi)

Cho phép các thiết bị giao tiếp trong phạm vi 4 cm trở xuống.

Hướng dẫn

### [Đo khoảng cách](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/ranging?hl=vi)

Xử lý phạm vi giữa các thiết bị trên nhiều công nghệ.

Hướng dẫn

### [VPN](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/vpn?hl=vi)

Phát triển và kiểm thử ứng dụng VPN.

Hướng dẫn

### [Viễn thông](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/telecom?hl=vi)

Quản lý cuộc gọi thoại và video trên Android.

Hướng dẫn

### [Giao tiếp băng tần siêu rộng (UWB)](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/uwb?hl=vi)

Đo lường phạm vi chính xác giữa các thiết bị.

### [Bluetooth Classic](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/bluetooth/setup?hl=vi)

Trao đổi dữ liệu với các thiết bị khác.

### [Bluetooth năng lượng thấp (BLE)](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/bluetooth/ble/ble-overview?hl=vi)

Trao đổi các phần dữ liệu nhỏ hơn nhưng sử dụng ít năng lượng hơn.

### [Âm thanh BLE](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/bluetooth/ble-audio/overview?hl=vi)

Nhận âm thanh có độ trung thực cao nhưng tiêu thụ ít năng lượng hơn.

### [Truy cập Wi-Fi](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/wifi/wifi-scan?hl=vi)

Quét tìm điểm truy cập Wi-Fi.

### [Wi-Fi Direct (P2P)](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/wifi/wifi-direct?hl=vi)

Cho phép kết nối thiết bị trực tiếp giữa các thiết bị.

### [Wi-Fi Aware](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/wifi/wifi-aware?hl=vi)

Cho phép kết nối trực tiếp giữa các thiết bị Android 8.0 trở lên.

### [Wi-Fi RTT (Thời gian khứ hồi)](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/wifi/wifi-rtt?hl=vi)

Đo lường khoảng cách giữa các thiết bị và điểm truy cập ở gần.

Hướng dẫn

### [Cronet](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/cronet?hl=vi)

Giảm độ trễ và tăng thông lượng yêu cầu mạng.

Hướng dẫn

### [Tiết kiệm năng lượng](https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/preserving-battery?hl=vi)

Duy trì mức sử dụng pin.

*   [Develop](https://developer.android.com/develop?hl=vi)
    
*   [Core areas](https://developer.android.com/develop/core-areas?hl=vi)
    
*   [App data and files](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage?hl=vi)
    

Tổng quan về lưu trữ dữ liệu và tệp

Sử dụng bộ sưu tập để sắp xếp ngăn nắp các trang Lưu và phân loại nội dung dựa trên lựa chọn ưu tiên của bạn.


====================================================================================================================================================

Android sử dụng một hệ thống tệp tương tự như hệ thống tệp dựa trên ổ đĩa trong các nền tảng khác. Hệ thống này cung cấp một số lựa chọn để bạn lưu dữ liệu ứng dụng của mình:

*   **Bộ nhớ dành riêng cho ứng dụng:** Lưu trữ các tệp chỉ dành cho ứng dụng của bạn, trong các thư mục chuyên dụng thuộc ổ bộ nhớ trong hoặc các thư mục chuyên dụng khác trong bộ nhớ ngoài. Hãy dùng các thư mục thuộc bộ nhớ trong để lưu thông tin nhạy cảm mà những ứng dụng khác không được truy cập.
*   **Bộ nhớ dùng chung:** Lưu trữ các tệp mà ứng dụng của bạn định chia sẻ với ứng dụng khác, bao gồm cả nội dung đa phương tiện, tài liệu và các tệp khác.
*   **Lựa chọn ưu tiên:** Lưu trữ dữ liệu gốc và riêng tư trong các cặp khóa-giá trị.
*   **Cơ sở dữ liệu:** Lưu trữ dữ liệu có cấu trúc trong một cơ sở dữ liệu riêng tư bằng cách sử dụng thư viện lưu trữ Room.

Đặc điểm của các tuỳ chọn này được tóm tắt trong bảng sau:

|     | Loại nội dung | Phương thức truy cập | Cần cấp quyền | Các ứng dụng khác có thể truy cập không? | Các tệp bị xoá khi gỡ cài đặt ứng dụng? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Tệp dành riêng cho ứng dụng](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/app-specific?hl=vi) | Tệp chỉ dành cho ứng dụng của bạn | Từ bộ nhớ trong, `getFilesDir()` hoặc `getCacheDir()`  <br>  <br>Từ bộ nhớ ngoài, `getExternalFilesDir()` hoặc `getExternalCacheDir()` | Không cần thiết cho bộ nhớ trong  <br>  <br>Không cần thiết cho bộ nhớ ngoài khi ứng dụng được dùng trên những thiết bị chạy Android 4.4 (API cấp 19) trở lên | Không | Có  |
| [Nội dung đa phương tiện](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/shared/media?hl=vi) | Các tệp đa phương tiện có thể chia sẻ (hình ảnh, tệp âm thanh, video) | API `MediaStore` | `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` khi truy cập vào tệp của ứng dụng khác trên Android 11 (API cấp 30) trở lên  <br>  <br>`READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` hoặc `WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` khi truy cập vào tệp của ứng dụng khác trên Android 10 (API cấp 29)  <br>  <br>Cần có quyền đối với **tất cả** các tệp trên Android 9 (API cấp 28) trở xuống | Có, mặc dù ứng dụng khác cần quyền `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` | Không |
| [Tài liệu và các tệp khác](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/shared/documents-files?hl=vi) | Các loại nội dung khác có thể chia sẻ, bao gồm cả tệp đã tải xuống | Khung truy cập bộ nhớ | Không có | Có, thông qua bộ chọn tệp hệ thống | Không |
| [Lựa chọn ưu tiên về ứng dụng](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/shared-preferences?hl=vi) | Cặp khóa-giá trị | Thư viện [Lựa chọn ưu tiên về Jetpack](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/ui/settings/use-saved-values?hl=vi) | Không có | Không | Có  |
| Cơ sở dữ liệu | Dữ liệu có cấu trúc | Thư viện lưu trữ [Room](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/room?hl=vi) | Không có | Không | Có  |

Giải pháp bạn chọn phụ thuộc vào nhu cầu cụ thể của bạn:

Dữ liệu của bạn cần bao nhiêu dung lượng?

Bộ nhớ trong có dung lượng hạn chế đối với dữ liệu dành riêng cho ứng dụng. Hãy dùng các loại bộ nhớ khác nếu bạn cần tiết kiệm lượng dữ liệu đáng kể.

Quyền truy cập dữ liệu cần có mức độ đáng tin cậy thế nào?

Nếu chức năng cơ bản của ứng dụng yêu cầu các dữ liệu nhất định, chẳng hạn như khi ứng dụng khởi động, hãy đặt dữ liệu vào thư mục bộ nhớ trong hoặc một cơ sở dữ liệu. Các tệp dành riêng cho ứng dụng được lưu trữ trong bộ nhớ ngoài không phải lúc nào cũng truy cập được vì một số thiết bị cho phép người dùng tháo thiết bị thực tế tương ứng với bộ nhớ ngoài.

Bạn cần lưu trữ loại dữ liệu nào?

Nếu bạn có dữ liệu chỉ dành cho ứng dụng của mình, hãy dùng bộ nhớ dành riêng cho ứng dụng. Đối với nội dung đa phương tiện có thể chia sẻ, hãy sử dụng bộ nhớ dùng chung để các ứng dụng khác có thể truy cập vào nội dung đó. Đối với dữ liệu có cấu trúc, hãy sử dụng các lựa chọn ưu tiên (đối với dữ liệu khóa-giá trị) hoặc một cơ sở dữ liệu (đối với dữ liệu chứa nhiều hơn 2 cột).

Dữ liệu có phải ở chế độ riêng tư trong ứng dụng của bạn không?

Khi lưu trữ dữ liệu nhạy cảm – dữ liệu mà các ứng dụng khác không được truy cập, hãy sử dụng bộ nhớ trong, lựa chọn ưu tiên hoặc một cơ sở dữ liệu. Bộ nhớ trong có thêm lợi ích là dữ liệu được ẩn khỏi người dùng.

Danh mục vị trí bộ nhớ
----------------------

Android cung cấp 2 loại vị trí bộ nhớ thực: _bộ nhớ trong_ và _bộ nhớ ngoài_. Trên hầu hết các thiết bị, bộ nhớ trong nhỏ hơn bộ nhớ ngoài. Tuy nhiên, bộ nhớ trong luôn có sẵn trên mọi thiết bị, do đó, đây là nơi đáng tin cậy hơn để lưu dữ liệu mà ứng dụng của bạn dựa vào.

Các ổ đĩa di động, chẳng hạn như thẻ SD, sẽ xuất hiện trong hệ thống tệp như một phần của bộ nhớ ngoài. Android biểu thị các thiết bị này bằng một đường dẫn, chẳng hạn như `/sdcard`.

Các ứng dụng được lưu trữ vào bộ nhớ trong theo mặc định. Tuy nhiên, nếu kích thước APK rất lớn, bạn có thể cho biết lựa chọn ưu tiên trong tệp kê khai của ứng dụng là cài đặt ứng dụng trên bộ nhớ ngoài:

<manifest ...
  **android:installLocation="preferExternal"**\>
  ...
</manifest>

Quyền và quyền truy cập vào bộ nhớ ngoài
----------------------------------------

Android xác định các quyền liên quan đến bộ nhớ sau đây: [`READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/Manifest.permission?hl=vi#READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE)
, [`WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/Manifest.permission?hl=vi#WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE)
 và [`MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/Manifest.permission?hl=vi#MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE)
.

Trong những phiên bản Android trước đây, các ứng dụng cần khai báo quyền `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` để truy cập vào mọi tệp bên ngoài [thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/app-specific?hl=vi#external)
 trong bộ nhớ ngoài. Ngoài ra, các ứng dụng cũng cần phải khai báo quyền `WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` để ghi vào mọi tệp bên ngoài thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng.

Các phiên bản Android mới dựa vào mục đích của một tệp hơn là vị trí của tệp để xác định khả năng ứng dụng truy cập và ghi vào một tệp nhất định. Cụ thể là nếu ứng dụng của bạn nhắm đến Android 11 (API cấp 30) trở lên, thì quyền `WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` sẽ không ảnh hưởng đến quyền truy cập của ứng dụng vào bộ nhớ. Mô hình lưu trữ dựa trên mục đích này giúp cải thiện quyền riêng tư của người dùng vì các ứng dụng chỉ được cấp quyền truy cập vào những phần thực sự cần thiết trong hệ thống tệp của thiết bị.

Android 11 giới thiệu quyền `MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE`, cho phép quyền ghi vào các tệp bên ngoài thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng và `MediaStore`. Để tìm hiểu thêm về quyền này và lý do hầu hết ứng dụng không cần phải khai báo quyền này để thực hiện đầy đủ các trường hợp sử dụng, hãy xem hướng dẫn về cách [quản lý mọi tệp](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/manage-all-files?hl=vi)
 trên thiết bị lưu trữ.

### Bộ nhớ có giới hạn

Để mang lại cho người dùng nhiều quyền kiểm soát hơn đối với tệp của họ và giảm thiểu tình trạng tệp lộn xộn, các ứng dụng nhắm đến Android 10 (API cấp 29) trở lên được cấp quyền truy cập có giới hạn vào bộ nhớ ngoài, hoặc _bộ nhớ có giới hạn_, theo mặc định. Những ứng dụng như vậy chỉ có quyền truy cập vào thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng trong bộ nhớ ngoài, cũng như các loại nội dung đa phương tiện cụ thể mà ứng dụng đó đã tạo.

Hãy dùng bộ nhớ có giới hạn, trừ khi ứng dụng của bạn cần quyền truy cập vào một tệp được lưu trữ bên ngoài [thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/app-specific?hl=vi)
 và bên ngoài thư mục mà [`MediaStore`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/provider/MediaStore?hl=vi)
 API có thể truy cập. Nếu lưu trữ các tệp dành riêng cho ứng dụng trong bộ nhớ ngoài, bạn có thể làm cho việc sử dụng bộ nhớ có giới hạn hơn trở nên dễ dàng hơn bằng cách đặt các tệp này vào một [thư mục dành riêng cho ứng dụng trong bộ nhớ bên ngoài](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/app-specific?hl=vi#external)
. Bằng cách đó, ứng dụng của bạn vẫn duy trì quyền truy cập vào các tệp này khi bộ nhớ có giới hạn được bật.

Để chuẩn bị ứng dụng của bạn cho bộ nhớ có giới hạn, hãy xem hướng dẫn về [các trường hợp sử dụng bộ nhớ và phương pháp hay nhất](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/use-cases?hl=vi)
. Nếu ứng dụng của bạn có trường hợp sử dụng khác không thuộc phạm vi của bộ nhớ có giới hạn, hãy [gửi một yêu cầu về tính năng](https://source.android.com/setup/contribute/report-bugs?hl=vi)
. Bạn có thể [tạm thời chọn không sử dụng bộ nhớ có giới hạn](https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/use-cases?hl=vi#opt-out-scoped-storage)
.

Xem tệp trên thiết bị
---------------------

Để xem các tệp được lưu trữ trên một thiết bị, hãy dùng [Trình khám phá tệp trên thiết bị](https://developer.android.com/studio/debug/device-file-explorer?hl=vi)
 của Android Studio.

Tài nguyên khác
---------------

Để biết thêm thông tin về cách lưu trữ dữ liệu, hãy tham khảo các tài nguyên sau.

### Video

*   [Chuẩn bị cho Bộ nhớ có giới hạn (Hội nghị Nhà phát triển Android năm 2019)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UnJ3amzJM94&hl=vi)
    

Nội dung và mã mẫu trên trang này phải tuân thủ các giấy phép như mô tả trong phần [Giấy phép nội dung](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=vi)
. Java và OpenJDK là nhãn hiệu hoặc nhãn hiệu đã đăng ký của Oracle và/hoặc đơn vị liên kết của Oracle.

Tentang Android App Bundle

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.


=====================================================================================================================

_Android App Bundle_ adalah format publikasi yang menyertakan semua kode dan resource yang dikompilasi oleh aplikasi Anda, serta menangguhkan pembuatan dan penandatanganan APK ke Google Play.

Google Play menggunakan app bundle Anda untuk membuat dan menyediakan APK yang dioptimalkan untuk setiap konfigurasi perangkat, sehingga hanya kode dan resource yang diperlukan untuk perangkat tertentu yang akan didownload untuk menjalankan aplikasi Anda. Anda tidak perlu lagi membuat, menandatangani, dan mengelola beberapa APK guna mengoptimalkan dukungan untuk berbagai perangkat, dan pengguna mendapatkan hasil download yang lebih kecil dan lebih dioptimalkan.

Sebagian besar project aplikasi tidak memerlukan banyak upaya untuk mem-build app bundle yang mendukung penayangan APK yang dioptimalkan. Jika Anda sudah [mengatur kode dan resource aplikasi](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/resources/providing-resources?hl=id#AlternativeResources)
 sesuai dengan konvensi yang ditetapkan, [build Android App Bundles yang ditandatangani](https://developer.android.com/studio/publish/app-signing?hl=id#sign-apk)
 menggunakan Android Studio atau dengan [menggunakan command line](https://developer.android.com/studio/build/building-cmdline?hl=id)
, dan [menguploadnya ke Google Play](https://developer.android.com/studio/publish/upload-bundle?hl=id)
, penayangan APK yang dioptimalkan akan menjadi manfaat otomatis.

Saat menggunakan format app bundle untuk memublikasikan aplikasi, Anda juga dapat secara opsional memanfaatkan [Play Feature Delivery](https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore/feature-delivery?hl=id)
, yang memungkinkan Anda menambahkan _modul fitur_ ke project aplikasi. Modul ini berisi fitur dan resource yang hanya disertakan dengan aplikasi Anda berdasarkan kondisi yang Anda tentukan, atau tersedia di lain waktu saat runtime untuk didownload [Menggunakan Library Play Core](https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore?hl=id)
.

Developer game yang memublikasikan aplikasinya dengan app bundle dapat menggunakan [Play Asset Delivery](https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore/asset-delivery?hl=id)
: Solusi Google Play untuk menayangkan aset game dalam jumlah besar yang menawarkan metode pengiriman fleksibel dan performa tinggi kepada developer.

Tonton video berikut untuk mengetahui ringkasan alasan Anda harus memublikasikan aplikasi menggunakan Android App Bundle.

Batasan ukuran download terkompresi
-----------------------------------

Memublikasikan dengan Android App Bundle membantu pengguna menginstal aplikasi Anda dengan hasil download sekecil mungkin dan meningkatkan **ukuran download terkompresi**. Artinya, saat pengguna mendownload aplikasi Anda, ukuran total APK terkompresi yang diperlukan untuk menginstal aplikasi Anda (misalnya, APK dasar + APK konfigurasi) tidak boleh lebih dari 4 GB. Download berikutnya, seperti mendownload modul fitur (dan APK konfigurasinya) on demand, juga harus memenuhi batasan ukuran download terkompresi ini. Paket aset tidak mengikuti batas ukuran ini, tetapi memiliki [batasan ukuran](https://developer.android.com/guide/app-bundle/asset-delivery?hl=id#size-limits)
 lainnya.

Jika Konsol Play mendapati bahwa salah satu kemungkinan download aplikasi Anda atau fitur on demand-nya melebihi [batas ukuran maksimum](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/9859372?hl=id#size_limits)
, Anda akan menerima error.

Perhatikan bahwa **Android App Bundle tidak mendukung file perluasan APK (`*.obb`)**. Jadi, jika Anda mendapati error ini saat memublikasikan app bundle, gunakan salah satu referensi berikut untuk mengurangi ukuran download APK terkompresi:

*   Pastikan Anda [mengaktifkan semua APK konfigurasi](https://developer.android.com/studio/projects/dynamic-delivery?hl=id#disable_config_apks)
     dengan menetapkan `enableSplit = true` untuk setiap jenis APK konfigurasi. Tindakan ini memastikan bahwa pengguna hanya mendownload kode dan resource yang diperlukan untuk menjalankan aplikasi di perangkat mereka.
*   Pastikan Anda [mengurangi ukuran aplikasi](https://developer.android.com/studio/build/shrink-code?hl=id)
     dengan menghapus kode dan resource yang tidak diperlukan.
*   Ikuti praktik terbaik untuk [mengurangi ukuran aplikasi](https://developer.android.com/topic/performance/reduce-apk-size?hl=id)
     lebih lanjut.
*   Pertimbangkan untuk mengonversi fitur yang digunakan oleh sebagian kecil pengguna Anda menjadi [modul fitur](https://developer.android.com/studio/projects/dynamic-delivery?hl=id#dynamic_feature_modules)
     yang dapat didownload oleh aplikasi Anda nanti, secara on demand. Perlu diingat bahwa hal ini mungkin memerlukan pemfaktoran ulang aplikasi, jadi pastikan untuk mencoba saran lain yang dijelaskan terlebih dahulu.

Pertimbangan lainnya
--------------------

Berikut adalah masalah umum saat membuat atau menayangkan aplikasi dengan Android App Bundle. Jika Anda mengalami masalah yang belum dijelaskan di sini, [laporkan bug](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/new?component=398856&%3Btemplate=1084213&hl=id)
.

*   Penginstalan sebagian aplikasi yang di-sideload—yaitu aplikasi yang tidak diinstal menggunakan Google Play Store dan tidak memiliki satu atau beberapa APK terpisah yang diperlukan—gagal di semua perangkat bersertifikasi Google dan perangkat yang menjalankan Android 10 (API level 29) atau yang lebih tinggi. Saat mendownload aplikasi Anda melalui Google Play Store, Google memastikan bahwa semua komponen aplikasi yang diperlukan telah diinstal.
*   Jika Anda menggunakan alat yang secara dinamis mengubah tabel resource, APK yang dibuat dari app bundle mungkin akan menampilkan perilaku yang tidak terduga. Oleh karena itu, saat membuat app bundle, sebaiknya Anda menonaktifkan alat semacam itu.
    
*   Anda dapat mengonfigurasi properti dalam konfigurasi build modul fitur yang bertentangan dengan properti dari modul dasar (atau yang lainnya). Misalnya, Anda dapat menetapkan `buildTypes.release.debuggable = true` dalam modul dasar dan menetapkannya ke `false` dalam modul fitur. Pertentangan tersebut dapat menyebabkan masalah build dan runtime. Perlu diperhatikan bahwa, secara default, modul fitur mewarisi beberapa konfigurasi build dari modul dasar. Jadi, pastikan Anda memahami konfigurasi yang harus disimpan, dan konfigurasi yang harus dihapus, di [konfigurasi build modul fitur](https://developer.android.com/guide/app-bundle/configure?hl=id#feature_build_config)
    .

# Google Play Install Referrer  |  Other Play guides  |  Android Developers

[Langsung ke konten utama](https://developer.android.com/google/play/installreferrer?hl=id#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

*   English

*   中文 – 繁體

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=id)
 Masuk

*   [Google Play](https://developer.android.com/distribute?hl=id)
    
*   [Other Play guides](https://developer.android.com/guide/app-bundle?hl=id)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=id) Halaman ini diterjemahkan oleh [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=id)
.

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=id)
    
*   [Google Play](https://developer.android.com/distribute?hl=id)
    
*   [Other Play guides](https://developer.android.com/guide/app-bundle?hl=id)
    

Google Play Install Referrer

Tetap teratur dengan koleksi Simpan dan kategorikan konten berdasarkan preferensi Anda.


=======================================================================================================================

Anda dapat menggunakan Install Referrer API Google Play Store untuk mengambil konten perujuk dari Google Play dengan aman, seperti:

*   URL perujuk paket yang diinstal.
*   Stempel waktu, dalam detik, saat klik perujuk terjadi (sisi klien dan sisi server).
*   Stempel waktu, dalam detik, saat penginstalan dimulai (sisi klien dan sisi server).
*   Versi aplikasi pada saat aplikasi pertama kali diinstal.
*   Apakah pengguna telah berinteraksi dengan [pengalaman instan](https://developer.android.com/topic/google-play-instant/overview?hl=id)
     aplikasi Anda dalam 7 hari terakhir.

Persyaratan
-----------

Install Referrer API ditampilkan oleh aplikasi Google Play Store di perangkat. Perangkat yang memiliki aplikasi Google Play versi 8.3.73 atau lebih baru otomatis telah memiliki akses ke API tersebut.

Anda juga harus memiliki akun Konsol Google Play untuk menggunakan Install Referrer API.

Menggunakan API
---------------

Install Referrer API diimplementasikan sebagai antarmuka [Android Interface Definition Language (AIDL)](https://developer.android.com/guide/components/aidl?hl=id)
.

*   Jika Anda menggunakan bahasa pemrograman Kotlin atau bahasa pemrograman Java, gunakan [Library Klien Play Install Referrer](https://developer.android.com/google/play/installreferrer/library?hl=id)
     untuk menyederhanakan coding Anda.
*   Jika Anda menggunakan bahasa pemrograman lain, gunakan [Play Install Referrer API](https://developer.android.com/google/play/installreferrer/igetinstallreferrerservice?hl=id)
    .

Konten dan contoh kode di halaman ini tunduk kepada lisensi yang dijelaskan dalam [Lisensi Konten](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=id)
. Java dan OpenJDK adalah merek dagang atau merek dagang terdaftar dari Oracle dan/atau afiliasinya.

Terakhir diperbarui pada 2025-07-27 UTC.

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

Apps barrierefrei gestalten

Mit Sammlungen den Überblick behalten Sie können Inhalte basierend auf Ihren Einstellungen speichern und kategorisieren.


=======================================================================================================================================================

Achte darauf, dass deine Android-App für alle Nutzer nutzbar ist, auch für Personen mit Anforderungen an die Barrierefreiheit.

Menschen mit eingeschränkter Sehfähigkeit, Farbenblindheit, Beeinträchtigung des Hörvermögens Feinmotorik, kognitive Behinderungen und viele andere Behinderungen nutzen Android Geräte. Wenn Sie Apps mit im Hinterkopf, verbessern Sie die User Experience für Personen mit Anforderungen an die Barrierefreiheit.

Auf dieser Seite finden Sie Richtlinien zur Implementierung zentraler Elemente der Barrierefreiheit. damit alle Nutzer deine App leichter nutzen können. Detailliertere Informationen zur Weitere Informationen dazu, wie Sie Ihre App barrierefreier gestalten können, erhalten Sie unter [Prinzipien zur Verbesserung von Apps Barrierefreiheit](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/ui/accessibility/principles?hl=de)
.

Sichtbarkeit von Text erhöhen
-----------------------------

Wir empfehlen für jeden Textsatz in Ihrer App den _Farbkontrast_ oder Helligkeitsunterschied zwischen der Textfarbe und der Farbe des Hintergrunds des Textes, sodass er über einem bestimmten Grenzwert liegt. Die hängt von der Schriftgröße des Textes und davon ab, ob der Text Fett:

*   Ist der Text kleiner als 18 pt oder ist er fett und kleiner als 14 pt, setzen Sie das Farbkontrastverhältnis auf mindestens 4,5:1.
*   Legen Sie für den restlichen Text das Farbkontrastverhältnis auf mindestens 3:1 fest.

Die folgende Abbildung zeigt zwei Beispiele für den Farbkontrast zwischen Text und Hintergrundfarbe:

<ph type="x-smartling-placeholder">

</ph> ![Bilder mit Text](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/ui/accessibility/color-contrast.svg?hl=de)

<ph type="x-smartling-placeholder">

</ph> **Abbildung 1**: Niedriger als empfohlen (links) und ausreichende Farbe (rechts) Kontrast.

Verwende eine Onlinefarbe, um den Farbkontrast von Text zu Hintergrundfarbe in deiner App zu prüfen oder die [Bedienungshilfen Scanner](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.accessibility.auditor&hl=de)

Große, einfache Steuerelemente verwenden
----------------------------------------

Die Benutzeroberfläche deiner App ist nutzerfreundlicher, wenn die Steuerelemente besser zu sehen sind und tippe darauf. Wir empfehlen, dass jedes interaktive UI-Element einen fokussierbaren Bereich oder _Größe des Berührungszielbereichs_ von mindestens 48 dpx und 48 dp Je größer der Wert, desto besser.

Damit ein Berührungszielbereich für ein bestimmtes UI-Element groß genug ist, gilt Folgendes: müssen **beide** Bedingungen erfüllt sein:

*   Die Summe der Werte von [`android:paddingLeft`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:paddingLeft)
    , [`android:minWidth`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:minWidth)
     und [`android:paddingRight`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:paddingRight)
     größer oder gleich 48 dp ist.
*   Die Summe der Werte von [`android:paddingTop`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:paddingTop)
    , [`android:minHeight`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:minHeight)
     und [`android:paddingBottom`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:paddingBottom)
     größer oder gleich 48 dp ist.

Aufgrund der Padding-Werte darf die _sichtbare_ Größe eines Objekts kleiner als 48 dpx 48 dp sein die empfohlene Größe des Berührungszielbereichs hat.

Im folgenden Code-Snippet sehen Sie ein Element mit der empfohlenen Touch-Geste „Touch“. Zielgröße:

<ImageButton ...
    **android:paddingLeft="4dp"
    android:minWidth="40dp"
    android:paddingRight="4dp"

    android:paddingTop="8dp"
    android:minHeight="32dp"
    android:paddingBottom="8dp"** />

Jedes UI-Element beschreiben
----------------------------

Geben Sie für jedes UI-Element in Ihrer App eine Beschreibung an, beschreibt den Zweck des Elements. Meistens fügen Sie diese Beschreibung Das Attribut `contentDescription` des Elements, wie im folgenden Code dargestellt snippet:

<!-- Use [string resources](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/resources/string-resource?hl=de)
 for easier localization. \-->
<!-- The en-US value for the following string is "Inspect". \-->
<ImageView
    ...
    **android:contentDescription="@string/inspect"** />

Wenn Sie Beschreibungen zu den UI-Elementen Ihrer App hinzufügen, sollten Sie Folgendes beachten: zu beachten:

*   Geben Sie in der Inhaltsbeschreibung nicht den Typ des UI-Elements an. Bildschirm geben Leser automatisch den Typ und die Beschreibung des Elements an. Für Wenn z. B. die Auswahl einer Schaltfläche zu einem die in Ihrer App ausgeführt werden soll, die Beschreibung der Schaltfläche auf `"Submit"` setzen, nicht auf `"Submit button"`.
    
*   Jede Beschreibung muss eindeutig sein. Wenn Nutzer von Screenreadern sich wiederholende Elementbeschreibungen erkennen, dass das Element liegt der Fokus auf einem Element, das bereits zuvor im Fokus war. Insbesondere hat jedes Element innerhalb einer Datenansichtsgruppe wie [`RecyclerView`](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/recyclerview/widget/RecyclerView?hl=de)
     muss eine andere Beschreibung. Jede Beschreibung muss sich auf individuelle Inhalte beziehen. zu einem bestimmten Element hinzugefügt, z. B. dem Namen einer Stadt in einer Liste von Standorten.
    
*   Wenn die `minSdkVersion` deiner App `16` oder höher ist, kannst du die [`android:importantForAccessibility`](https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/View?hl=de#attr_android:importantForAccessibility)
     `"no"` für grafische Elemente, die nur für dekorative Effekts.
    

Weitere Informationen
---------------------

Weitere Informationen zur Verbesserung der Barrierefreiheit Ihrer App finden Sie hier: Weitere Informationen:

### Codelabs

*   [Android wird gestartet Barrierefreiheit](https://codelabs.developers.google.com/codelabs/starting-android-accessibility?hl=de)
    

### Blogposts

*   [Zugänglichkeit: Bieten Sie allen Ihren Nutzer?](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2012/04/accessibility-are-you-serving-all-your.html)
    

Alle Inhalte und Codebeispiele auf dieser Seite unterliegen den Lizenzen wie im Abschnitt [Inhaltslizenz](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=de)
 beschrieben. Java und OpenJDK sind Marken oder eingetragene Marken von Oracle und/oder seinen Tochtergesellschaften.

Zuletzt aktualisiert: 2025-07-27 (UTC).

# 出色的核心價值是什麼？  |  App quality  |  Android Developers

[跳至主要內容](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value?hl=zh-tw#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=zh-tw)
 登入

*   [App quality](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=zh-tw)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [設計和規劃](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [App quality](https://developer.android.com/quality?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [核心價值](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value?hl=zh-tw)
    

出色的核心價值是什麼？

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。


=========================================

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/quality/hero-images/core_value_highlighted.svg?hl=zh-tw)

任何應用程式或遊戲的最終用途是讓使用者享有實用或有趣的內容，無論是首次使用或長期下來，都能為使用者帶來價值。如果應用程式或遊戲無法達成這個目標，無論其他方面表現如何，都算是優質內容。

應用程式或遊戲的用途應配合目標對象的需求。滿足使用者獨特需求或以原始方式解決問題的應用程式和遊戲，能夠提升使用者的潛在價值。

打造優質的應用程式或遊戲時，請遵守以下規範。

### 內容與功能深度

應用程式中的內容和功能數量會直接影響您為使用者提供價值的能力。確定您瞭解目標對象的需求，支援其核心用途，並考量他們的偏好和能力。舉例來說，小學學童的計算機應用程式不應使用結構工程師計算機應用程式的功能集。

增加應用程式中的內容或功能量或許能提升使用者價值，但這不應導致選單過於雜亂、內容過舊或功能異常。

### 板型規格

Android 為[行動裝置以外的使用者提供更多選擇](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=zh-tw)
。如果應用程式適合您的應用程式，請支援多種板型規格，讓使用者能取得更多應用程式或遊戲。舉例來說，假設有一款健身追蹤器可以透過手錶同步處理使用者心率，或是想像使用者亦可在電腦上玩的手機遊戲。

### 行銷素材資源

應用程式或遊戲的行銷方式會影響使用者對功能的期望，並告知他們是否要安裝。行銷素材資源應如實反映您的應用程式或遊戲，並代表您的目標對象和用途。承諾及交付的內容若有任何差異，都會損害您的核心價值，並對使用者指標造成負面影響。

### 使用者指標

評分、參與度和留存率指標等使用者指標，可讓您直接評估是否為使用者提供價值。將這些指標與其他應用程式進行比較，您就可以評估自家應用程式/遊戲的核心價值，與其他鎖定類似或相關使用者需求的應用程式相比有何差異。

獲客指標通常無法視為衡量核心價值的指標，因為這些指標可能會受到行銷支出和其他與應用程式功能無關的其他因素影響。

Google Play 規範
--------------

如果您在 Google Play 上發行應用程式，請遵守下列有關核心價值的額外規範。

### 監控及改善核心價值的工具

使用 [Play 管理中心](https://play.google.com/console/about/?hl=zh-tw)
對[商店資產](https://play.google.com/console/about/storelistings/?hl=zh-tw)
進行最佳化調整及本地化、監控[使用者指標](https://play.google.com/console/about/stats/?hl=zh-tw)
，以及與[同業](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/10771707?hl=zh-tw)
比較。

改進應用程式對於[評分和評論](https://play.google.com/console/about/ratings/?hl=zh-tw)
，是提高核心價值的好方法，也更能吸引使用者。

### 探索與精選

Google Play 在評估要宣傳的名稱和位置時，會考量[核心價值的所有層面](https://g.co/play/featuring)
，包括 Play 行銷資產和使用者指標。

Google Play 也會參考使用者指標來評估應用程式的品質。我們會考量許多[使用者參與度指標](https://developer.android.com/quality/core-value/user-metrics?hl=zh-tw)
，包括解除安裝次數和活躍使用者人數。

這個頁面中的內容和程式碼範例均受《[內容授權](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=zh-tw)
》中的授權所規範。Java 與 OpenJDK 是 Oracle 和/或其關係企業的商標或註冊商標。

上次更新時間：2025-07-26 (世界標準時間)。

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/security/fraud-prevention/fraud.svg?hl=zh-tw)

### 保護使用者不受詐欺行為侵擾

安全性方面，沒有任何解決方案或策略可以完全防止詐欺和遭竊。一旦裝置遭竊，使用者就會和攻擊者競賽，這些攻擊者會嘗試濫用應用程式，並在遠端鎖定裝置前擷取個人資料。

您的使用者是否有詐欺風險？Google 能否減少手機遭竊的濫用行為？

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/permissions.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/environment?hl=zh-tw)

### [應用程式執行環境是否可信？](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/environment?hl=zh-tw)

確認裝置可經過加密驗證。確認已發布的應用程式真實存在且未遭竄改。調查裝置上是否有會增加風險的設定或應用程式。檢查裝置上的其他應用程式是否有可能控制您的應用程式？請確認您的伺服器能夠針對所收到要求的真實性和完整性進行驗證。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/environment?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/handle-data.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/activities?hl=zh-tw)

### [機密內容是否受到保護？](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/activities?hl=zh-tw)

確保不受信任的應用程式不會公開或監控使用者的敏感作業。避免在螢幕鎖定畫面顯示敏感內容通知。設計密碼重設機制，有效抵禦本機攻擊。採取相關措施，防止有心人士實際存取使用者的裝置，並防止他人未經授權重設帳戶並存取資料。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/activities?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/spot-icons/engagement.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/authentication?hl=zh-tw)

### [這是預期的使用者和使用者行為嗎？](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/authentication?hl=zh-tw)

導入完善的驗證機制，確保目前登入的使用者為帳戶的合法擁有者。向使用者說明網路釣魚攻擊，以及如何辨識及防範這類攻擊。採用裝置安全防護措施，防止未經授權的存取和使用行為。要求使用者必須明確確認關鍵動作，才能降低未經授權操作的風險。

金融應用程式是詐欺的主要目標，因為這類交易具有價值且易於執行。若是手機遭竊，金融應用程式可以為想利用竊盜手法營利的攻擊者提供有價值的目標。本文件會概略介紹可用的工具和資源，協助您識別、處理及降低手機遭竊和詐欺事件。這套系統彙整了建議應用程式開發人員使用的各種產品、API、程式碼範例和最佳做法，有助於降低應用程式的財務詐欺行為。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/security/fraud-prevention/authentication?hl=zh-tw)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/security/fraud-prevention/play-protect_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/security/fraud-prevention/safe-screen-sharing_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/security/fraud-prevention/smart-masking_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/security/fraud-prevention/theft-protections_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/security.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=zh-tw)

### [Android 說明文件：安全性](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=zh-tw)

瞭解 Android 的安全性最佳做法，在設計時預設將安全性納入考量，同時兼顧隱私保護。設計、實作及發布安全、私人和私人的應用程式。

[閱讀完整內容](https://developer.android.com/security?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/google-play.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity?hl=zh-tw)

### [Play 完整性說明文件](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity?hl=zh-tw)

Play Integrity API 可協助防範應用程式詐欺與濫用行為。驗證應用程式的互動行為源自授權裝置和應用程式。

[閱讀完整內容](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/logos/android.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/about/versions/15/behavior-changes-15?hl=zh-tw)

### [Android 15 變更](https://developer.android.com/about/versions/15/behavior-changes-15?hl=zh-tw)

這類異動包括限制背景活動啟動、提高意圖安全性，以及保護使用者不受企圖修改「零打擾」狀態的惡意應用程式侵擾。

[閱讀完整內容](https://developer.android.com/about/versions/15/behavior-changes-15?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/picto-icons/chat-bubbles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/03/battling-impersonation-scams-monzo-innovative-approach.html)

### [防範來自 Monzo 詐騙電話的最佳做法](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/03/battling-impersonation-scams-monzo-innovative-approach.html)

Monzo 使用新的通話狀態功能來打擊模擬詐騙，藉此驗證真實代表。

[閱讀完整內容](https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2024/03/battling-impersonation-scams-monzo-innovative-approach.html)

這個頁面中的內容和程式碼範例均受《[內容授權](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=zh-tw)
》中的授權所規範。Java 與 OpenJDK 是 Oracle 和/或其關係企業的商標或註冊商標。

# Consignes concernant l'interface utilisateur de Santé Connect  |  Android health & fitness  |  Android Developers

[Passer au contenu principal](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

.

Consignes concernant l'interface utilisateur de Santé Connect

Restez organisé à l'aide des collections Enregistrez et classez les contenus selon vos préférences.


====================================================================================================================================================================

L'interface utilisateur de votre application doit mettre en avant une description des avantages de Santé Connect, et expliquer les concepts clés de manière à mieux renseigner les utilisateurs sur ce qu'implique une intégration.

L'expérience utilisateur doit respecter trois principes directeurs :

1.  **Cohérence** : assurez-vous que les flux sont alignés tout au long du processus d'intégration.
2.  **Transparence** : expliquez clairement comment fonctionne Santé Connect conjointement à votre application.
3.  **Clarté**: aidez les utilisateurs à accéder à Santé Connect via votre application.

De manière générale, le parcours UX peut être divisé en plusieurs étapes:

![Parcours de l&#39;expérience utilisateur de Santé Connect](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_ux_flow_stages.png?hl=fr)

Promouvoir Santé Connect
------------------------

La présentation de Santé Connect dans votre application dépend des modèles et des conventions d'expérience utilisateur établis dans votre UI.

### Concentrez-vous sur l'utilisateur

La première fois que vous présentez Santé Connect aux utilisateurs, essayez de leur donner une bonne raison d'utiliser votre intégration.

Plutôt que de décrire les fonctionnalités de Santé Connect, adaptez votre message en fonction des avantages qu'il peut leur apporter.

![Avantages pour les utilisateurs de Santé Connect](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_user_benefits.png?hl=fr)

### Employer un langage clair

Ne demandez pas aux utilisateurs de se "connecter à Santé Connect". Il s'agit d'une phrase discordante, qui peut également entraver la compréhension de la relation entre les applications de l'écosystème Santé Connect.

Votre expérience utilisateur doit aider les utilisateurs à se faire une idée de la façon dont Santé Connect interagit avec votre application. Il est donc important de réfléchir aux libellés des boutons les plus efficaces pour atteindre cet objectif.

Utilisez des expressions verbales telles que "configurer" ou "commencer" pour les libellés de vos boutons. Si vous lancez la vue des autorisations, utilisez un texte de bouton plus spécifique, tel que "Sélectionner les données à partager".

![Santé Connect : langage clair](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_use_clear_language.png?hl=fr)

### Promouvoir Santé Connect

Voici quelques façons de promouvoir Santé Connect dans votre application:

*   Dans le cadre du [flux de configuration de votre application](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#app-setup-flow)
    
*   Via une [fiche](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#card)
     sur l'écran d'accueil de votre application
*   Via un point d'entrée sur un écran [Paramètres](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#settings)
    
*   Avec un bouton de [téléchargement de l'APK Android 13](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#android-13-download)
     pour les versions Android 13 et antérieures
*   Lorsque vous promouvez de [nouveaux types de données](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#new-data-types)
    
*   Avec une fenêtre modale ou une boîte de dialogue lors de la mise à jour de l'application, semblable au flux de configuration de l'application

#### Flux de configuration de l'application et de demande d'autorisations

![Configuration de l&#39;application et demande d&#39;autorisations](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_app_setup_request_permissions.png?hl=fr)

#### Parcours de la fiche promotionnelle sur l'écran d'accueil

![Flux promotionnel de l&#39;écran d&#39;accueil](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_home_screen_promo.png?hl=fr)

#### Paramètres

![Paramètres avec point d&#39;entrée](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_settings.png?hl=fr)

#### Téléchargement de l'APK Android 13

![Téléchargement de l&#39;APK Android 13](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_android_13_apk.png?hl=fr)

### Intégrer un ou plusieurs types de données et demander des autorisations

Les applications qui ont déjà intégré Santé Connect peuvent demander de nouveaux types de données en plus de ceux déjà accordés.

Seuls les nouveaux types de données demandés doivent s'afficher sur l'écran des autorisations, afin d'éviter de créer de la confusion chez les utilisateurs.

Voici quelques exemples de promotion de nouveaux types de données :

*   [Réutiliser les conventions existantes](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#reuse)
    
*   [Mettre en avant la proposition de valeur](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#value)
    
*   [Contextualiser les autorisations](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#contextualize)
    

#### Réutiliser les conventions existantes

Si votre application promeut déjà de nouvelles données dans d'autres écosystèmes, nous vous recommandons de faire de même pour Santé Connect sur Android et d'adapter le texte si nécessaire.

#### Mettre en avant la proposition de valeur

Pourquoi les utilisateurs voudraient-ils utiliser ces données dans votre application ?

*   Exemples: lire les données
    *   Fournit aux utilisateurs des insights plus précis dans votre application
    *   Les utilisateurs peuvent voir toutes les données au même endroit dans votre application
*   Exemple: Écrire les données
    *   Les utilisateurs peuvent partager ces nouvelles données à partir de votre application avec d'autres applications de santé et de remise en forme compatibles sur leur téléphone.

#### Contextualiser les autorisations

Demandez de nouvelles autorisations lorsque cela a du sens pour les utilisateurs, afin qu'ils sachent ce qu'ils sont invités à faire.

Exemples :

*   Demandez l'autorisation d'utiliser des parcours d'exercice une fois que les utilisateurs ont terminé un entraînement dans votre application.
*   Si votre application implémente de nouvelles autorisations, affichez-les ensemble dans une promotion sur l'écran d'accueil.
*   Si votre application comporte une section dédiée, par exemple **Sleep** (Dormir), promouvez l'autorisation correspondante.

![Demander un nouveau type de données](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_requesting_new_data_type.png?hl=fr)

Autorisations révoquées et annulées
-----------------------------------

L'écran "Settings" (Paramètres) de votre application doit indiquer aux utilisateurs comment révoquer les autorisations associées aux types de données Santé Connect:

![Autorisations révoquées et annulées](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_revoked_cancelled_permissions.png?hl=fr)

### Niveau d'accès insuffisant

Si votre application n'a pas accès à Santé Connect de manière suffisante, l'écran suivant doit s'afficher sur tous les points d'entrée:

![Application avec droits d&#39;accès insuffisants](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_insufficient_access.png?hl=fr)

### Autorisations annulées deux fois

Si l'utilisateur sélectionne **Cancel** (Annuler) sur l'écran de demande d'autorisations deux fois de suite, votre application doit lui présenter un écran semblable à celui-ci:

![Autorisations annulées deux fois par l&#39;utilisateur](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_permissions_cancelled_twice.png?hl=fr)

Lire et afficher des données
----------------------------

Pour gagner la confiance des utilisateurs et les rassurer sur la façon dont leurs données sont lues, il est important de leur montrer comment votre application les obtient, à partir de la [propriété `packageName` de la classe `DataOrigin`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/health/connect/client/records/metadata/DataOrigin?hl=fr#packageName())
.

Pour cela, deux méthodes sont possibles :

1.  [Attribution de base](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#basic)
    
2.  [Attribution avec information](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/design/ui-guidelines?hl=fr#education)
    

### Attribution de base

L'interface utilisateur (UI) doit au minimum afficher l'icône et le nom de la source de l'application (ou uniquement le nom de l'application si l'icône ne peut pas être affichée). L'attribution de base convient aux écrans suivants : "Accueil", "Journal des activités" et "Détails de l'activité".

Pour faciliter l'attribution, votre application peut afficher le nom et l'icône de l'application qui a enregistré les données à l'origine. Cela renforce la confiance des utilisateurs et clarifie l'origine des informations sur la santé.

Vous n'avez pas besoin de demander d'autorisation sensible, comme `QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES`, pour récupérer ces informations. L'exemple suivant montre comment récupérer le libellé et l'icône de l'application pour un package donné à partir de `PackageManager`:

fun getAppLabelAndIcon(context: Context, packageName: String): Pair<CharSequence?, Drawable?>{
        return try {
          val pm = context.pacageManager
          val appInfo = pm.getApplicationInfo(packageName, 0)
          val label = pm.getApplicationLabel(appInfo)
          val icon = pm.getApplicationIcon(appInfo)
          label to icon
        } catch (e: PackageManager.NameNotFoundException){
          null to null
        }
    }

Cet utilitaire garantit une attribution appropriée en affichant le nom et l'icône de l'application à côté des données. Consultez l'implémentation dans l'[exemple HealthConnectManager.kt](https://github.com/android/health-samples/blob/main/health-connect/HealthConnectSample/app/src/main/java/com/example/healthconnectsample/data/HealthConnectManager.kt#L89)
.

![Attribution de base pour la lecture des données](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_basic_attribution.png?hl=fr)

### Attribution avec information

Votre application doit aider les utilisateurs à obtenir des informations sur la source des données, en ajoutant un lien direct vers l'écran "App permissions" (Autorisations de l'application) dans Santé Connect. Ce type d'attribution convient aux écrans suivants : "Détails de l'activité", "Rapports et insights".

![](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_education_variation.png?hl=fr) ![](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_education_variation.png?hl=fr) ![](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_education_variation_3.png?hl=fr) ![](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_education_variation_3.png?hl=fr)

### Synchronisation des données

Si la latence est suffisante lors de la synchronisation de votre application avec Santé Connect, nous vous recommandons de l'afficher pendant la synchronisation des données. Cela informe l'utilisateur qu'une opération est en cours et qu'elle peut prendre un certain temps.

![État de la synchronisation des données affiché](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/hc_data_sync.png?hl=fr)

Éléments
--------

Les icônes de produit doivent être utilisées sur un fond blanc ou gris très clair. Si nécessaire, vous pouvez également utiliser l'icône sur un arrière-plan noir.

![Directives concernant les icônes](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/health_connect_logo_guidelines.png?hl=fr)

Téléchargez les icônes suivantes:

*   Logo Santé Connect
    
    [Télécharger](https://developer.android.com/static/downloads/assets/health_connect_logo.png?hl=fr)
    
*   Logo Santé Connect blanc
    
    [Télécharger](https://developer.android.com/static/downloads/assets/health_connect_logo_white.png?hl=fr)
    

Le contenu et les exemples de code de cette page sont soumis aux licences décrites dans la [Licence de contenu](https://developer.android.com/license?hl=fr)
. Java et OpenJDK sont des marques ou des marques déposées d'Oracle et/ou de ses sociétés affiliées.

Dernière mise à jour le 2025/07/27 (UTC).

---

XR Runtime
==========

[User Guide](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/jetpack-xr-sdk/work-with-arcore)

API Reference  
[androidx.xr.runtime](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/xr/runtime/package-summary)
  
[androidx.xr.runtime.java](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/xr/runtime/java/package-summary)
  
[androidx.xr.runtime.math](https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/xr/runtime/math/package-summary)
  

Start your custom AR or 3D session with our native runtime.

| Latest Update | Stable Release | Release Candidate | Beta Release | Alpha Release |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| July 30, 2025 | \-  | \-  | \-  | [1.0.0-alpha05](https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/xr-runtime#1.0.0-alpha05) |

Declaring dependencies
----------------------

To add a dependency on XR runtime, you must add the Google Maven repository to your project. Read [Google's Maven repository](https://developer.android.com/studio/build/dependencies#google-maven)
 for more information.

Add the dependencies for the artifacts you need in the `build.gradle` file for your app or module:

### Groovy

dependencies {
    implementation "androidx.xr.runtime:runtime:1.0.0-alpha05"

    // Use in environments that do not support OpenXR
    testImplementation "androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-testing:1.0.0-alpha05"
}

### Kotlin

dependencies {
    implementation("androidx.xr.runtime:runtime:1.0.0-alpha05")

    // Use in environments that do not support OpenXR
    testImplementation("androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-testing:1.0.0-alpha05")
}

For more information about dependencies, see [Add build dependencies](https://developer.android.com/studio/build/dependencies)
.

Feedback
--------

Your feedback helps make Jetpack better. Let us know if you discover new issues or have ideas for improving this library. Please take a look at the [existing issues](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues?q=componentid:1689664%20status:open)
 in this library before you create a new one. You can add your vote to an existing issue by clicking the star button.

[Create a new issue](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/new?component=1689664&template=2070825)

See the [Issue Tracker documentation](https://developers.google.com/issue-tracker)
 for more information.

Version 1.0
-----------

### Version 1.0.0-alpha05

July 30, 2025

`androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-*:1.0.0-alpha05` is released. Version 1.0.0-alpha05 contains [these commits](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/support/+log/b6c541571b9fb5471f965fc52612cb280713e5e4..8fe87e902b8acd3de17bd55d6ec0ef4b5188212e/xr/runtime)
.

**New Features**

*   Add `HandJointType` and `TrackingState`. ([I55880](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I558802d9a78449829990c0792e5a1d1bf97ca69b)
    , [b/334645808](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/334645808)
    )
*   Make Config implementation public. ([I95860](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I9586042b11a9340a80deffa2f92e391bf59f6a58)
    , [b/334645808](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/334645808)
    )
*   Introduced new `SessionCreateResult` and `SessionConfigureResult` types. ([Icb8cb](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Icb8cba8fcd89822929ff845d6d2e0408cef632af)
    , [b/334645808](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/334645808)
    )
*   Add a new `BoundingBox` class that represents an axis-aligned bounding box in 3D space, defined by its minimum and maximum corner points. ([Ic68c5](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Ic68c5e60f6443e12d4142cf8c69ecfc3d7d99844)
    , [b/423073468](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/423073468)
    )

**API Changes**

*   Renamed and moved `androidx.xr.scenecore.PixelDimensions` to `androidx.xr.runtime.math.IntSize2d`. Renamed and moved `androidx.xr.scenecore.Dimensions` to `androidx.xr.runtime.math.FloatSize3d`. Renamed `androidx.xr.scenecore.PlaneType` to `androidx.xr.scenecore.PlaneOrientation`. Renamed `androidx.xr.scenecore.PlaneSemantic` to `androidx.xr.scenecore.PlaneSemanticType`. ([Ifd405](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Ifd40559bd3ffaccfc1782c81af39be1c5e7922a1)
    , [b/416456228](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/416456228)
    )
*   Removed `androidx.xr.runtime.FoV` class. Use `androidx.xr.runtime.FieldOfView` instead. ([I9ae27](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I9ae27bc07ce8b2fad5371be283b7dad3f70296e6)
    )
*   Added an additional overload for `Session.create` which can provide a `LifecycleOwner` for the Session to attach to. Note that an Activity will still need to be provided for resource ownership and the `LifecycleOwner` must be scoped within the Activity. ([I1690b](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I1690b7d8b5935492fde2940615e87e0ed592ca82)
    )
*   Renamed `FakeRuntimeAnchor.anchorsCreated` to `anchorsCreatedCount` ([I96df9](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I96df9bd731f3e859d473d3dd95ce08e06554c89f)
    , [b/424441218](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/424441218)
    )
*   Config `*Mode` vals have been renamed to reflect their behavior. ([I6d247](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I6d24772f4456d4a2409adbaf6162fabb4f5756ef)
    , [b/414648065](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/414648065)
    )
*   Projects released with Kotlin 2.0 require KGP 2.0.0 or newer to be consumed ([Idb6b5](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Idb6b5d6ae1625ab870ffe74f9790ffabc82a63b4)
    , [b/344563182](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/344563182)
    )
*   APIs related to manifest strings have been moved from `:xr:runtime:runtime` to `:xr:runtime:runtime-manifest`. The package name has changed from `androidx.xr.runtime` to `androidx.xr.runtime.manifest`. ([I610ad](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I610ad63853c8223ee0352b719eb5991047f71e84)
    , [b/418800249](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/418800249)
    )
*   `Session.resume()`, `Session.pause()`, and `Session.destroy()` have been removed from the API surface. Session is no longer a `LifecycleOwner`. The Session's lifecycle will now be attached to the lifecycle of the Activity passed in `Session.create()`. ([I28a03](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I28a0392c9e1a5bb1a02cc12b392442125f1d8cac)
    )
*   This library now uses [JSpecify nullness annotations](https://jspecify.dev/)
    , which are type-use. Kotlin developers should use the following compiler argument to enforce correct usage: `-Xjspecify-annotations=strict` (this is the default starting with version 2.1.0 of the Kotlin compiler) ([Ia8420](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Ia84200c477b50c79761005fffb0d44c001009cca)
    , [b/326456246](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/326456246)
    )
*   The main Runtime artifact (`:xr:runtime:runtime`) will only contain Kolin-style async APIs. Java developers can depend on `:xr:runtime:runtime-guava` to access compatible APIs. ([I05d4a](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I05d4a527394b5666eb2da7e52968354fd605c393)
    , [b/426639315](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/426639315)
    )
*   The main Runtime artifact (`:xr:runtime:runtime`) will only contain Kotlin-style async APIs. Java developers can depend on the `xr:runtime:runtime-rxjava3` library to access compatible APIs. ([I64122](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I64122394dba159947b344aefebe741df3129e9c0)
    , [b/426639775](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/426639775)
    )
*   Move Coroutines to `:xr:runtime:runtime-guava` and Flows to `:xr:runtime:runtime-rxjava3`. ([I60ae9](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I60ae9d8bbe1de2ae5b08a2227028c80cb4fd3772)
    )
*   `Session.create` and `Session.configure` now throw `SecurityException` when sufficient permissions have not been granted instead of returning `SessionCreatePermissionsNotGranted` or `SessionConfigurePermissionsNotGranted`. ([I7c488](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I7c48826f858c9934949093ed8b52446153967761)
    , [b/430651879](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/430651879)
    )

### Version 1.0.0-alpha04

May 7, 2025

`androidx.xr.runtime:runtime:1.0.0-alpha04`, `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-openxr:1.0.0-alpha04`, and `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-testing:1.0.0-alpha04` are released. Version 1.0.0-alpha04 contains [these commits](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/support/+log/043342a8810f3356110a0afce48c662e841c428f..b6c541571b9fb5471f965fc52612cb280713e5e4/xr/runtime)
.

**New Features**

*   Session now implements `androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner` for more interoperability with existing Android lifecycle paradigms.
*   Manifest strings for Android XR are specified and documented here.
*   Spatial Visibility Callback extension methods added to monitor when the scene content moves inside or outside the user's field of view.
*   Added a stub version of the `JxrPlatformAdapter` (and all its related classes).
*   Session will be used in both `SceneCore` and Runtime instead of the Session in `SceneCore`.
*   `ActivityPose.hitTest` was added, enabling a `hitTest` against virtual content.
*   Specifying multiple Runtime implementations at compile time is now supported. Only one will be loaded at execution time based on the current device's feature set.
*   Added new Component type `SpatialPointerComponent`, allowing clients to specify the icon rendered for the pointer, or to disable the icon. This Component can currently be attached to `PanelEntity` instances only.

**API Changes**

*   Make Config implementation public. ([I95860](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I9586042b11a9340a80deffa2f92e391bf59f6a58)
    )
*   Add `HandJointType` and `TrackingState`. ([I55880](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/I558802d9a78449829990c0792e5a1d1bf97ca69b)
    )
*   Projects released with Kotlin 2.0 require KGP 2.0.0 or newer to be consumed ([Idb6b5](https://android-review.googlesource.com/#/q/Idb6b5d6ae1625ab870ffe74f9790ffabc82a63b4)
    )
*   `Hand.isActive (boolean)` has been changed to `Hand.trackingState`. The `OpenXR` implementation has been modified accordingly.
*   `android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING` permission requirement in `Session.configure` has been changed to `android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_COARSE`.
*   `LifecycleManager.configure` is implemented and now passes in a `Config` object which contains a property for each configurable runtime feature.
*   `Session.configure` can now be called with a `Config` in order to configure the available runtime features.
*   `Session.create` now supports passing a `CoroutineContext` instead of a `CoroutineDispatcher`.
*   `Session.create` supports loading `ARCore` for Jetpack XR and/or `SceneCore`. At least one must be provided (testing versions are available).
*   `FakePerceptionManager` throws an `AnchorInvalidUuidException` when an invalid UUID is passed to `Anchor.load` and `Anchor.unpersist`.
*   `CoreState` is no longer a data class.

**Bug Fixes**

*   Fixed Runtime proguard configurations.

### Version 1.0.0-alpha03

February 26, 2025

`androidx.xr.runtime:runtime:1.0.0-alpha03`, `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-openxr:1.0.0-alpha03`, and `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-testing:1.0.0-alpha03` are released with no notable changes since the last alpha. Version 1.0.0-alpha03 contains [these commits](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/support/+log/a96c4899cab90642c7b1d722dc1f3b45f56e7b82..043342a8810f3356110a0afce48c662e841c428f/xr/runtime)
.

### Version 1.0.0-alpha02

February 12, 2025

`androidx.xr.runtime:runtime:1.0.0-alpha02`, `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-openxr:1.0.0-alpha02`, and `androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-testing:1.0.0-alpha02` are released. Version 1.0.0-alpha02 contains [these commits](https://android.googlesource.com/platform/frameworks/support/+log/e2e2729abc59df52d40af80a8bbfe010c02455c6..a96c4899cab90642c7b1d722dc1f3b45f56e7b82/xr/runtime)
.

**Breaking & behavioral changes**

*   `OpenXR` runtime functions that return an Anchor now throw `AnchorResourcesExhaustedException` if they encounter an error code notifying that the `OpenXR` resource limit has been reached.
*   Permission `android.permission.HAND_TRACKING` is now required for `Session.create` and `Session.resume`.

**New features**

*   Added hand tracking support.

**Bug fixes**

*   Creating anchors is more stable when running on an emulator

### Version 1.0.0-alpha01

December 12, 2024

`androidx.xr.runtime:runtime-* 1.0.0-alpha01` is released.

**Features of Initial Release**

Initial release of Jetpack XR Runtime. This library contains fundamental pieces of functionality for the Jetpack XR suite of libraries. This includes capability discovery, lifecycle management, configuration, and more. The Runtime library provides different variations (e.g. `runtime-openxr` or `runtime-testing`) depending on the execution platform. Additionally, this library offers fundamental math abstractions such as [`Vector3`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/math/Vector3)
 and [`Matrix4`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/math/Matrix4)
 that are used across the entire Jetpack XR API surface.

*   [`Session`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/Session)
    : Provides you with fine-grained controls over the XR system, including deciding when processing is and is not being executed and the overall configuration. It is also the handle that you will use across all other APIs to unlock the underlying system capabilities.
    
*   [`Pose`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/math/Pose)
    : A location in an arbitrary coordinate system that has a position and orientation associated with it. You will use this class to communicate the location of objects with ARCore for Jetpack XR and Jetpack SceneCore.
    

**Known Issues**

*   [`configure`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/Session#configure())
     is currently a no-op. Future releases will add new settings that you can use to control the behavior of the [`Session`](https://developer.android.com/reference/kotlin/androidx/xr/runtime/Session)
    .
