透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。

![](https://developer.android.com/static/wear/images/design/landing-hero_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

### 設計 Wear OS 應用程式

使用者可以藉由手錶快速瞭解資訊，再採取行動。這些頻繁互動能夠協助使用者回到日常生活中。

在 Wear OS 上打造引人入勝的沉浸式使用者體驗，以提高應用程式使用率和品牌忠誠度。

[入門指南](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/getting-started.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

### [Material 3 Expressive](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

瞭解 Material 3 Expressive，這是最新的設計系統，可跨越手機、手錶和平板電腦的板型規格。

[進一步瞭解 Material 3 Expressive](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/design-principles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started/apply?hl=zh-tw)

### [設計 Wear OS 應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started/apply?hl=zh-tw)

瞭解在 Wear OS 上設計的基礎知識。

[進一步瞭解如何為 Wear OS 設計應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/get-started/apply?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/screen-sizes.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/quality-tiers?hl=zh-tw)

### [回應式和自動調整式版面配置](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/quality-tiers?hl=zh-tw)

針對各種螢幕大小進行高品質最佳化。

[進一步瞭解如何設計更具適應性的應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/quality-tiers?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/wear/images/design/landing-apps_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/apps?hl=zh-tw)

### [應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/apps?hl=zh-tw)

建立 Wear OS 應用程式，讓使用者直接透過手錶執行實用動作。

[進一步瞭解如何設計應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/apps?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/wear/images/design/landing-tiles_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/tiles?hl=zh-tw)

### [資訊方塊](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/tiles?hl=zh-tw)

使用資訊方塊，協助使用者快速有效地存取應用程式中的實用內容。

[進一步瞭解如何設計資訊方塊](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/surfaces/tiles?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/components.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/common-layouts?hl=zh-tw)

### [常見的設計版面配置](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/common-layouts?hl=zh-tw)

經過實證、功能多元的應用程式版面配置，可提供最佳使用者體驗。

[進一步瞭解常見的設計版面配置](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/foundations/common-layouts?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/styles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/styles/color?hl=zh-tw)

### [樣式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/styles/color?hl=zh-tw)

運用最新的 Material 3 表情符號樣式，讓設計栩栩如生。

[進一步瞭解樣式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/styles/color?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/design-principles_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/m2-5/foundations/wear-os-for-kids?hl=zh-tw)

### [Wear OS for Kids 設計原則](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/m2-5/foundations/wear-os-for-kids?hl=zh-tw)

設計應用程式時，請確保孩子能持續專注、安全無虞，並能隨時使用應用程式。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/wear/guides/m2-5/foundations/wear-os-for-kids?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/developing-kids-experiences_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/kids/develop?hl=zh-tw)

### [開發兒童專屬體驗](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/kids/develop?hl=zh-tw)

為兒童打造最佳的 Wear OS 應用程式體驗。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/kids/develop?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/wear/images/design/design-kit-apps.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1506418396052412186)

### [應用程式設計套件](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1506418396052412186)

使用應用程式設計套件套用預先建構的樣式和元件。下載檔案並在 Figma 中開啟。

[下載應用程式套件](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1506418396052412186)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/wear/images/design/design-kit-tiles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1507852095734722321)

### [資訊方塊設計套件](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1507852095734722321)

使用資訊方塊設計套件套用預先建構的樣式和元件。下載檔案並在 Figma 中開啟。

[下載資訊方塊套件](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1507852095734722321)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/mobile/guides-developer_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=zh-tw)

### [開發人員指南](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=zh-tw)

請參閱我們的開發人員指南和 API 參考資料，瞭解如何建構 Wear OS 應用程式。

[查看開發人員指南](https://developer.android.com/training/wearables/principles?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/mobile/guides-quality_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/wear-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

### [品質指南](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/wear-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

使用檢查清單來評估應用程式的品質。

[查看應用程式品質](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/wear-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/wear/ux-research-yt_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=puGn72d86qw&%3Bhl=zh-tw&hl=zh-tw)

### 專為電視設計

歡迎探索我們的指南、圖案和其他資源，瞭解如何打造適合 Android TV 的應用程式。立即開始設計電視！

指南

### [基礎課程](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=zh-tw)

Android 設計的基本概念和原則，例如無障礙設計和系統列。

[前往基金會](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/foundations/design-for-tv?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/styles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/color-system?hl=zh-tw)

指南

瞭解如何運用顏色、類型、動作和主題設定，為應用程式打造精美的視覺設計。

[前往「樣式」頁面](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/color-system?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/layouts.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/layouts?hl=zh-tw)

[前往版面配置](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/styles/layouts?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/components.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components?hl=zh-tw)

[![按鈕](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/buttons.svg?hl=zh-tw)\

### 按鈕\
\
按鈕可協助使用者啟動動作或流程。提供各種按鈕類型，做為強調效果。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/buttons?hl=zh-tw)
[![資訊卡](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/cards.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 資訊卡\
\
資訊卡包含與單一主題相關的內容和動作。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/cards?hl=zh-tw)
[![精選輪轉介面](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/featured-carousel.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 精選輪轉介面\
\
精選輪轉介面會醒目顯示全寬度容器中的一組媒體，引導使用者找到精選內容。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/featured-carousel?hl=zh-tw)
[![沉浸式清單](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/immersive-list.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 沉浸式清單\
\
沉浸式清單會醒目顯示所選項目，以顯示沉浸式內容。藉此強調內容。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/immersive-list?hl=zh-tw)
[![清單](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/lists.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 清單\
\
文字或圖片的連續垂直索引。使用清單協助使用者選取集合。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/lists?hl=zh-tw)
[![導覽匣](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/navigation-drawer.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 導覽匣\
\
導覽匣可讓使用者存取應用程式中的目的地。導覽匣可隨時在螢幕邊緣使用](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/navigation-drawer?hl=zh-tw)
[![分頁](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/tabs.svg?hl=zh-tw)\
\
### 分頁\
\
分頁可讓使用者輕鬆在應用程式中切換主要目的地。分頁固定至螢幕頂端。](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/tv/guides/components/tabs?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/develop.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=zh-tw)

### [開發人員指南](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=zh-tw)

使用開發人員指南和參考資料建構應用程式設計。

[查看開發人員指南](https://developer.android.com/training/tv?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/design/ui/tv/images/landing/publish.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

### [品質指南](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

按照 Android 最佳做法設計應用程式。

[查看應用程式品質](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/tv-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

# 開始使用大螢幕裝置  |  Large screens  |  Android Developers

[跳至主要內容](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens?hl=zh-tw#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

大螢幕說明文件。

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Develop](https://developer.android.com/develop?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Devices](https://developer.android.com/develop/devices?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Large screens](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens?hl=zh-tw)
    

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。

![採用不同設定的各種大螢幕裝置。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/get-started/get_started_header_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

### 開始使用大螢幕裝置

憑藉大螢幕拓展應用程式開發商機。平板電腦、折疊式裝置和 ChromeOS 裝置的大螢幕可以大方展示內容，進行多工處理，並可讓使用者使用小螢幕無法使用的使用者介面。

[![開啟文件和含有編輯工具的面板文件編輯器。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/get-started/gallery_productivity_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/productivity?hl=zh-tw)

### [效率提升](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/productivity?hl=zh-tw)

提供充裕的工作空間顯示工具、文字，以及簡潔有力的互動方式，讓應用程式更有效率。

[![影片編輯器應用程式搭配觸控筆拖曳顯示影片的時間軸。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/get-started/gallery_creativity_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/creativity?hl=zh-tw)

### [創意](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/creativity?hl=zh-tw)

在大螢幕上實現精彩構想。使用者可以透過手指或觸控筆輕鬆使用調色盤、挑選器和麵板，盡情發揮創意。

[![畫面上的電影，旁邊有相似影視內容清單。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/get-started/gallery_media_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=zh-tw)

### [媒體](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery/media?hl=zh-tw)

運用類似標題、作者傳記、播放清單或歌詞等相關內容，拓展觀看或聆聽體驗。

若想進一步瞭解大螢幕設計，請造訪大螢幕圖片庫。

[大型螢幕圖片庫](https://developer.android.com/large-screens/gallery?hl=zh-tw)

[![說明大螢幕應用程式品質指南的三個層級。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/quality_guidelines_header_small_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/large-screen-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

如要開始開發大螢幕，請遵循_大螢幕應用程式品質指南_。這套指南完整說明瞭應遵守的必要條件，能幫助您設計最適合大螢幕使用的應用程式。

[品質指南](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/large-screen-app-quality?hl=zh-tw)

### 應用程式品質等級

品質指南內容分為三個層級：_可供大螢幕使用_、_大螢幕最佳化_，以及_大螢幕差異化_。您可以按照層級逐步為應用程式加入大螢幕功能，首先先從可供大螢幕使用開始。如果您目前已經有應用程式，請使用[品質指南測試](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/large-screen-app-quality?hl=zh-tw#large_screen_compatibility_tests)
判斷應用程式支援的階層，然後按階層實作功能，直到應用程式已針對大螢幕進行獨特差異化為止。

[![描繪大螢幕應用程式品質指南的第 3 級內容。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-3/tier_3_icon.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-3-overview?hl=zh-tw)

階層 3

### [大螢幕  \
準備就緒](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-3-overview?hl=zh-tw)

在大螢幕上拓展應用程式的可能性。支援直向和橫向裝置螢幕方向，以及多視窗模式。建立可填滿可用應用程式空間的版面配置。

[開始學習](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-3-overview?hl=zh-tw)

[![描繪大螢幕應用程式品質指南的第 2 級內容。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-2/tier_2_icon.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-2-overview?hl=zh-tw)

級別 2

### [大螢幕  \
最佳化](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-2-overview?hl=zh-tw)

提高使用者參與度。透過回應式/自動調整版面配置，呈現各種尺寸的螢幕。支援鍵盤、滑鼠、觸控板和觸控筆。

[開始學習](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-2-overview?hl=zh-tw)

[![描繪大螢幕應用程式品質指南的第 1 級內容。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-1/tier_1_icon.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-1-overview?hl=zh-tw)

級別 1

### [大螢幕差異化](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-1-overview?hl=zh-tw)

讓應用程式在應用程式商店中脫穎而出。加入差異化功能，例如折疊式裝置的桌面型態，以便提供標準手機無法媲美的使用者體驗。

[開始學習](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier-1-overview?hl=zh-tw)

[![表示大螢幕標準版面配置。](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/canonical-layouts/canonical_layouts_header_small_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/large-screen-canonical-layouts?hl=zh-tw)

大螢幕標準化版面配置—list‑detail、動態饋給和輔助窗格&mdash 是多功能常用的使用者介面設計。在應用程式中實作版面配置，提供使用者喜愛的最佳化大螢幕體驗。

[標準化版面配置](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/large-screen-canonical-layouts?hl=zh-tw)

立即開始

請選取品質等級，立即開始打造適合大螢幕及「所有」螢幕的體驗！

*    [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-3/tier_3_icon.png?hl=zh-tw) 可供大螢幕使用](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier_3_overview?hl=zh-tw)
    
*    [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-2/tier_2_icon.svg?hl=zh-tw) 大螢幕最佳化](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier_2_overview?hl=zh-tw)
    
*    [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/guide/topics/large-screens/quality-guidelines/tier-1/tier_1_icon.svg?hl=zh-tw) 大螢幕差異化](https://developer.android.com/guide/topics/large-screens/tier_1_overview?hl=zh-tw)

》中的授權所規範。Java 與 OpenJDK 是 Oracle 和/或其關係企業的商標或註冊商標。

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Develop](https://developer.android.com/develop?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Core areas](https://developer.android.com/develop/core-areas?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Background work](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work?hl=zh-tw)
    

關於背景工作

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。


====================================

Android 應用程式應在適當情況下使用背景工作，並避免在應用程式的主執行緒上執行所有工作。為了讓應用程式既能回應使用者，又能成為 Android 平台上的優質公民，請將任何封鎖或長時間執行的工作從主 (UI) 執行緒移除，改為在背景執行。這包括解碼位圖、存取儲存空間、處理機器學習 (ML) 模型或執行網路要求等工作。

開始使用文件
------

如要建構穩定的應用程式，您必須瞭解下列重要概念：

*   [非同步工作](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work/background-tasks/asynchronous?hl=zh-tw)
    選項，例如 Kotlin 協同程式和 Java 執行緒，以及非同步工作和持續性工作之間的差異。
    
*   [持續性工作](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work/background-tasks/persistent?hl=zh-tw)
    ，這是在應用程式重新啟動和系統重新啟動時，仍會排定的背景工作。
    
*   有效使用[廣播](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work/background-tasks/broadcasts?hl=zh-tw)
    。與發布/訂閱設計模式類似，Android 應用程式可以向 Android 系統和其他 Android 應用程式傳送或接收廣播訊息。
    
*   如何使用[測試非同步工作](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/coroutines/test?hl=zh-tw)
    和[測試持續性工作](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work/background-tasks/testing/persistent/debug?hl=zh-tw)
    所需的不同技巧。
    

如要全面瞭解這些概念，以及如何為您的用途選擇正確的 API，請參閱[背景工作總覽](https://developer.android.com/develop/background-work/background-tasks?hl=zh-tw)
指南。

影片
--

網誌
--

》中的授權所規範。Java 與 OpenJDK 是 Oracle 和/或其關係企業的商標或註冊商標。

# XR | UI 設計  |  Android XR  |  Android Developers

[跳至主要內容](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr?hl=zh-tw#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=zh-tw)
 登入

*   [UI Design](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Android XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr?hl=zh-tw)

Android XR SDK 現已在開發人員預覽版中推出。敬請提供意見回饋！請前往[支援頁面](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/support?hl=zh-tw)
與我們聯絡。

![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [設計和規劃](https://developer.android.com/design?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [UI Design](https://developer.android.com/design/ui?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Android XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr?hl=zh-tw)
    

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。

![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/xr-parallax-hero_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

### 專為 Android XR 設計

延展實境為您開啟無限空間的世界。使用者可以在不離開現實世界情況下進行多工處理，或完全沉浸在虛擬世界中。

傳統的 UI 設計僅限於平面螢幕，但 XR 可創造無限的可能性，提供直覺、沉浸式和自然的互動體驗。

[設計 XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides?hl=zh-tw)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/start_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)

### 從現況開始

Android XR 是一個彈性的平台，可讓您設計沉浸式體驗，並將應用程式帶入延展實境。只要是相容的 Android 行動裝置和大螢幕應用程式，就會自動顯示在 Play 商店中。

從頭開始打造全新體驗，或是使用 Android Jetpack XR、Unity、OpenXR 或 WebXR，為現有應用程式新增沉浸式元素。

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/differentiated-apps_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides?hl=zh-tw)

### [設計 Android XR 的差異化應用程式](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides?hl=zh-tw)

透過空間面板、實體 3D 內容、動態環境和空間音效，打造讓使用者愛不釋手的場景。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/immersive-tools_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/openxr?hl=zh-tw)

### [設計 Unity、OpenXR 或 WebXR 體驗](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/openxr?hl=zh-tw)

運用進階沉浸式工具，建構可在各平台上相容的應用程式。

[瞭解詳情](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/openxr?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/getting-started.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [開始使用](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

瞭解 Android XR 的基本概念，包括空間、環境和自然輸入。

[開始學習](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/design-principles.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [設計原則](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

從現有情況著手，讓使用者感到舒適，加入重要的 XR 時刻，並讓應用程式更易於存取。

[設計 XR](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/visual-design.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/visual-design?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [視覺設計](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/visual-design?hl=zh-tw)

採用 Material Design 樣式，包括尺寸、縮放、大型目標尺寸、顏色和字體排版。

[查看視覺設計](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/visual-design?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/multimodal-inputs.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations?hl=zh-tw#design-multimodal)

指南

### [多模態輸入](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations?hl=zh-tw#design-multimodal)

設計讓使用者能自然互動的體驗。

[瞭解輸入內容](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/foundations?hl=zh-tw#design-multimodal)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/spatial-ui.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/spatial-ui?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [空間 UI](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/spatial-ui?hl=zh-tw)

您可以將應用程式分割成空間面板、加入軌道器，以及新增空間高度。

[查看空間 UI](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/spatial-ui?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/3d-content.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/3d-content?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [3D 模型](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/3d-content?hl=zh-tw)

新增 3D 元素，為應用程式增添深度、比例和真實感。

[查看 3D 模型](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/3d-content?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/environments.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [環境](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

讓使用者成為應用程式體驗的核心，提供身歷其境的體驗。

[查看環境](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/environments?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/motion.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/motion?hl=zh-tw)

指南

### [動作](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/motion?hl=zh-tw)

動態效果可將 XR 應用程式從靜態場景轉換為互動體驗。

[查看動作](https://developer.android.com/design/ui/xr/guides/motion?hl=zh-tw)

 [![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/xr/material-3_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1035203688168086460)

### [自動調整式設計](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1035203688168086460)

Material Design for XR 提供可配合 XR 調整的元件和版面配置。如果大螢幕應用程式符合 Material Design 設計指南，其字體排版、目標大小和元件就會與 Android XR 相容。

[開始使用 Material 3 Design Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1035203688168086460)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/mobile/guides-developer_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

請參閱開發人員指南和 API，建構 Android XR 應用程式。

[使用 Jetpack XR SDK、Unity、OpenXR 或 WebXR 進行開發](https://developer.android.com/develop/xr/get-started?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/design/ui/mobile/guides-quality_2880.png?hl=zh-tw)](https://developer.android.com/docs/quality-guidelines/android-xr?hl=zh-tw)

# 車輛專用 Android  |  Multidevice  |  Android Developers

[跳至主要內容](https://developer.android.com/cars?hl=zh-tw#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

*   中文 – 繁體

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio?hl=zh-tw)
 登入

*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=zh-tw)

 ![](https://developer.android.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=zh-tw) 本頁面由 [Cloud Translation API](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=zh-tw)
 翻譯而成。

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [Multidevice](https://developer.android.com/multidevice?hl=zh-tw)
    
*   [車輛專用 Android](https://developer.android.com/cars?hl=zh-tw)
    

透過集合功能整理內容 你可以依據偏好儲存及分類內容。

### 車輛專用 Android

打造應用程式，協助使用者透過 Android Automotive OS 和 Android Auto 在行車期間使用應用程式。持有搭載 Android Automotive OS 的車輛使用者可將應用程式安裝到車輛的資訊娛樂系統上。Android Auto 可讓使用者將手機 (Android 9 以上版本) 連線至相容的車輛，直接在主控台顯示專為駕駛人設計的應用程式版本。

[開始使用](https://developer.android.com/training/cars?hl=zh-tw)

[![](https://developer.android.com/static/images/auto/design-for-cars.svg?hl=zh-tw)](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=zh-tw)

車用 Android

### [設計](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=zh-tw)

瞭解如何設計專為駕駛人和車輛設計的應用程式。設計簡單、一致且不受干擾的體驗，讓使用者滿意。

[瞭解詳情](https://developers.google.com/cars/design/create-apps?hl=zh-tw)

### [建構媒體應用程式](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/media?hl=zh-tw)

打造音樂、廣播和有聲書播放器等媒體應用程式，以便使用者安裝到 Android 技術的車輛中、透過手機投影到車內，或是在路上使用手機。

### [建構通訊應用程式](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/communication?hl=zh-tw)

為 Android Auto 建構通訊應用程式，讓使用者在車用主機上傳送和接收簡短訊息，以及撥打及接聽語音通話。

### [建構制式應用程式](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/apps?hl=zh-tw)

建構適合 Android Auto 和 Android Automotive OS 使用的搜尋點、物聯網、天氣和導航應用程式，協助使用者找到想去的地點、取得路線指引，並在行車途中保持連線及掌握最新資訊。

### [建構可在車輛停妥時使用的應用程式](https://developer.android.com/training/cars/parked?hl=zh-tw)

將現有的 Android 影片應用程式、瀏覽器和遊戲移植至 Android Auto 和 Android Automotive OS，讓使用者在車輛停妥時盡情享受。

### 打造生態系統

我們與世界各地的製造商合作，將 Android 平台納入汽車上。自 2020 年起，使用者可透過搭載 Android Automotive OS 的 Android 系統，在車上享有專屬的 Android 體驗。此外，Android Auto 還提供數百種相容的[汽車和副廠音響系統](https://www.android.com/auto/?hl=zh-tw#hit-the-road)
，讓數百萬名使用者在開車時享有安全又便利的應用程式體驗。使用者也可以下載 Android Auto 應用程式，以便在沒有相容的車輛的情況下體驗 Android Auto 的強大之處。

[瞭解詳情](https://www.android.com/auto/?hl=zh-tw#hit-the-road)

# Declare access to Health Connect data types  |  Android health & fitness  |  Android Developers

[Skip to main content](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/publish/declare-access#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Italiano
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt

*   Русский
*   עברית
*   العربيّة
*   فارسی

*   ภาษาไทย

*   中文 – 繁體

*   한국어

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

*   [Health & fitness dev center](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness)

*   [Android Developers](https://developer.android.com/)
    
*   [Essentials](https://developer.android.com/get-started)
    
*   [Health & fitness dev center](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness)
    
*   [Guides](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides)
    

Declare access to Health Connect data types

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.


=====================================================================================================================================

When your app is ready for release, the next step is to declare uses of the data types you [reviewed](https://developer.android.com/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/data-and-data-types/data-types)
 earlier. You complete this declaration process while preparing your app for publishing on Google Play.

This process must be completed for all publishing requests, both for a new app that has not been published yet, or when updating an existing, already published app that now uses a different set of data types.

To ensure this process goes smoothly:

*   Use only the data types that are necessary for your app. Provide as much detail as possible when documenting the reason for using a particular data type.
*   [Post your app's privacy policies](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/9859455)
     on its Play store page.

If you previously filled out the Google Health Connect API Request form
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

In the past, to request access to Health Connect data types, developers were required to [fill out the Google Health Connect API Request form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1LFjbq1MOCZySpP5eIVkoyzXTanpcGTYQH26lKcrQUJo/viewform?edit_requested=true)
. If you used this form, **you must declare uses of these data types in the Play Console by January 22, 2025.**

Follow the process in this guide to update your app registration in the Play Console and declare access to the data types you are already using.

Explain why your app uses Health Connect data types
---------------------------------------------------

To use Health Connect data types in your app, go to the Play Console and fill out the **Health apps** form on the **App content** page:

1.  Indicate which health features your app supports from the following list, based on the Health Connect data types that your app accesses, as shown in figure 1.
    
    ![A checkbox appears next to each health feature](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/health-features-play-console.png)
    
    **Figure 1.** Declare health features used in your app in the Play Console.
    
    ![Each explanation is a text area where you enter an\
    explanation](https://developer.android.com/static/images/health-and-fitness/health-apps-permissions-play-console.png)
    
    **Figure 2.** Explain how your app uses each Health Connect data type in the Play Console.
    
    The Play Console page includes these health features:
    
    *   Health and fitness
        *   Activity and fitness
        *   Nutrition and weight management
        *   Period tracking
        *   Sleep management
        *   Stress management, relaxation, mental acuity
        *   Diseases and conditions management
    *   Medical
        *   Clinical decision support
        *   Disease prevention and public health
        *   Emergency and first aid
        *   Healthcare services and management
        *   Medical device apps
        *   Mental and behavioral health
        *   Medical reference and education
        *   Medication and pain management
        *   Physical therapy and rehabilitation
        *   Reproductive and sexual health
    *   Human subjects research: Research studies, clinical trials, and patient communities
2.  On the following screen, provide an explanation of how your app uses each listed Health Connect data type. The data types appear in the following categories, as shown in figure 2:
    
    *   Activity and fitness
    *   Body composition
    *   Energy
    *   Nutrition
    *   Reproductive and sexual health
    *   Respiratory system
    *   Sleep management

Learn more about how to [provide information for the Health apps declaration form](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/14738291)
.

Reapply for updates
-------------------

If your app has a new data type requirement, or if your app no longer supports a data type, fill out the **Health apps** form again. Take note of the following:

*   Include all of the existing health features the app still uses.
*   Include all of the new health features the app requires.
*   Exclude all of the health features that the app no longer needs.
*   Make sure you justify every requested access.

If you have requested before and you have a new app version, you don't have to file a new request just to change the app version. The data type accesses are allow-listed for a package name regardless of app version.

Keep in mind of any unintentional typos in your package name when reapplying, as every submission is treated as a request for a **new** app.

Unable to access Health Connect
-------------------------------

If your health app is published in the Play store and released to the public, but you didn't request for data type accesses, your end users receive the following dialog when attempting to link with Health Connect:

![A dialog showing users that the app can't access Health Connect.](https://developer.android.com/static/health-and-fitness/guides/health-connect/images/cant-access-hc.png)

Further questions
-----------------

If you have any questions or encounter issues in your access, submit a ticket to [Health Connect Developer Support](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/new?component=1676744&template=2072671)
.

Content and code samples on this page are subject to the licenses described in the [Content License](https://developer.android.com/license)
. Java and OpenJDK are trademarks or registered trademarks of Oracle and/or its affiliates.

Last updated 2025-02-07 UTC.

# Create and use functions in Kotlin  |  Android Developers

[Skip to main content](https://developer.android.com/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions#main-content)

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/

*   English
*   Deutsch
*   Español – América Latina
*   Français
*   Indonesia
*   Polski
*   Português – Brasil
*   Tiếng Việt
*   中文 – 简体
*   中文 – 繁體
*   日本語
*   한국어

[Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)
 Sign in

Create and use functions in Kotlin

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.


============================================================================================================================

1\. Before you begin
--------------------

In an earlier codelab, you saw a simple program that printed `Hello, world!`. In the programs you've written so far, you've seen two functions:

*   a `main()` function, which is required in every Kotlin program. It is the entry point, or starting point, of the program.
*   a `println()` function, which you called from `main()` to output text.

In this codelab, you will learn more about functions.

Functions let you break up your code into reusable pieces, rather than include everything in `main()`. Functions are an essential building block of Android apps and learning how to define and use them is a major step on your journey to become an Android developer.

Prerequisites
-------------

*   Knowledge of Kotlin programming basics, including variables, and the `println()` and `main()` functions

What you'll learn
-----------------

*   How to define and call your own functions.
*   How to return values from a function that you can store in a variable.
*   How to define and call functions with multiple parameters.
*   How to call functions with named arguments.
*   How to set default values for function parameters.

What you'll need
----------------

*   A web browser with access to Kotlin Playground

2\. Define and call a function
------------------------------

Before exploring functions in-depth, let's review some basic terminology.

*   Declaring (or defining) a function uses the `fun` keyword and includes code within the curly braces which contains the instructions needed to execute a task.
*   Calling a function causes all the code contained in that function to execute.

So far, you've written all your code in the `main()` function. The `main()` function doesn't actually get called anywhere in your code; the Kotlin compiler uses it as a starting point. The `main()` function is intended only to include other code you want to execute, such as calls to the `println()` function.

The `println()` function is part of the Kotlin language. However, you can define your own functions. This allows your code to be reused if you need to call it more than once. Take the following program as an example.

fun main() {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

The `main()` function consists of two `println()` statements—one to wish Rover a happy birthday, and another stating Rover's age.

While Kotlin allows you to put all your code in the `main()` function, you might not always want to. For example, if you also want your program to contain a New Year's greeting, the main function would have to include those calls to `println()` as well. Or perhaps you want to greet Rover multiple times. You could simply copy and paste the code, or you could create a separate function for the birthday greeting. You'll do the latter. Creating separate functions for specific tasks has a number of benefits.

*   Reusable code: Rather than copying and pasting code that you need to use more than once, you can simply call a function wherever needed.
*   Readability: Ensuring functions do one and only one specific task helps other developers and teammates, as well as your future self to know exactly what a piece of code does.

The syntax for defining a function is shown in the following diagram.

![Syntax for defining a function](https://developer.android.com/static/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions/img/7b20f70d7a68c790_2880.png "Syntax for defining a function")

A function definition starts with the `fun` keyword, followed by the name of the function, a set of opening and closing parentheses, and a set of opening and closing curly braces. Contained in curly braces is the code that will run when the function is called.

You'll create a new function to move the two `println()` statements out of the `main()` function.

1.  In your browser, open the [Kotlin Playground](https://developer.android.com/training/kotlinplayground)
     and replace the contents with the following code.

fun main() {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

2.  After the `main()` function, define a new function named `birthdayGreeting()`. This function is declared with the same syntax as the `main()` function.

fun main() {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }
    
    fun birthdayGreeting() {
        
    }

3.  Move the two `println()` statements from `main()` into the curly braces of the `birthdayGreeting()` function.

fun main() {
        
    }
    
    fun birthdayGreeting() {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

4.  In the `main()` function, call the `birthdayGreeting()` function. Your finished code should look as follows:

fun main() {
        birthdayGreeting()
    }
    
    fun birthdayGreeting() {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

5.  Run your code. You should see the following output:

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
3\. Return a value from a function
----------------------------------

In more complex apps, functions do more than print text.

Kotlin functions can also generate data called a _return value_ which is stored in a variable that you can use elsewhere in your code.

When defining a function, you can specify the data type of the value you want it to return. The return type is specified by placing a colon (`:`) after the parentheses, a single blank space, and then the name of the type (`Int`, `String`, etc). A single space is then placed between the return type and the opening curly brace. Within the function body, after all the statements, you use a return statement to specify the value you want the function to return. A return statement consists of the `return` keyword followed by the value, such as a variable, you want the function to return as an output.

The syntax for declaring a function with a return type is as follows.

![Syntax for declaring a function with a return type](https://developer.android.com/static/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions/img/dfbfe5ad5495870a_2880.png "Syntax for declaring a function with a return type")

The `Unit` type
---------------

By default, if you don't specify a return type, the default return type is `Unit`. `Unit` means the function doesn't return a value. `Unit` is equivalent to void return types in other languages (`void` in Java and C; `Void`/empty tuple `()` in Swift; `None` in Python, etc.). Any function that doesn't return a value implicitly returns `Unit`. You can observe this by modifying your code to return `Unit`.

1.  In the function declaration for `birthdayGreeting()`, add a colon after the closing parenthesis and specify the return type as `Unit`.

fun main() {
        birthdayGreeting()
    }
    
    fun birthdayGreeting(): Unit {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

2.  Run the code and observe that everything still works.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!

It's optional to specify the `Unit` return type in Kotlin. For functions that don't return anything, or returning `Unit`, you don't need a return statement.

Return a `String` from `birthdayGreeting()`
-------------------------------------------

To demonstrate how a function can return a value, you'll modify the `birthdayGreeting()` function to return a string, rather than simply print the result.

1.  Replace the `Unit` return type with `String`.

fun birthdayGreeting(): String {
        println("Happy Birthday, Rover!")
        println("You are now 5 years old!")
    }

2.  Run your code. You'll get an error. If you declare a return type for a function (e.g., `String`), that function must include a `return` statement.

A 'return' expression required in a function with a block body ('{...}')

3.  You can only return one string from a function, not two. Replace the `println()` statements with two variables, `nameGreeting` and `ageGreeting,` using the `val` keyword. Because you removed the calls to `println()` from `birthdayGreeting()`, calling `birthdayGreeting()` won't print anything.

fun birthdayGreeting(): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, Rover!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now 5 years old!"
    }

4.  Using the string formatting syntax you learned in an earlier codelab, add a `return` statement to return a string from the function consisting of both greetings.

In order to format the greetings on a separate line, you also need to use the `\n` escape character. This is just like the `\"` escape character you learned about in a previous codelab. The `\n` character is replaced for a newline so that the two greetings are each on a separate line.

fun birthdayGreeting(): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, Rover!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now 5 years old!"
        return "$nameGreeting\n$ageGreeting"
    }

5.  In `main()`, because `birthdayGreeting()` returns a value, you can store the result in a string variable. Declare a `greeting` variable using `val` to store the result of calling `birthdayGreeting()`.

fun main() {
        val greeting = birthdayGreeting()
    }

6.  In `main()`, call `println()` to print the `greeting` string. The `main()` function should now look as follows.

fun main() {
        val greeting = birthdayGreeting()
        println(greeting)
    }

7.  Run your code and then observe that the result is the same as before. Returning a value lets you store the result in a variable, but what do you think happens if you call the `birthdayGreeting()` function inside the `println()` function?

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!

8.  Remove the variable and then pass the result of calling the `birthdayGreeting()` function into the `println()` function:

fun main() {
        println(birthdayGreeting())
    }

9.  Run your code and observe the output. The return value of calling `birthdayGreeting()` is passed directly into `println()`.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
4\. Add a parameter to the birthdayGreeting() function
------------------------------------------------------

As you've seen, when you call `println()`, you can include a string within the parentheses or _pass a value_ to the function. You can do the same with your `birthdayGreeting()` function. However, you first need to add a _parameter_ to `birthdayGreeting()`.

A parameter specifies the name of a variable and a data type that you can pass into a function as data to be accessed inside the function. Parameters are declared within the parentheses after the function name.

![Syntax for declaring a function with parameters and a return type](https://developer.android.com/static/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions/img/8c4435bda86c8a67_2880.png "SyntåSyntax for declaring a function with parameters and a return typeax for declaring a function with parameters and aa return type")

Each parameter consists of a variable name and data type, separated by a colon and a space. Multiple parameters are separated by a comma.

Right now, the `birthdayGreeting()` function can only be used to greet Rover. You'll add a parameter to the `birthdayGreeting()` function so that you can greet any name that you pass into the function.

1.  Within the parentheses of the `birthdayGreeting()` function, add a `name` parameter of type `String`, using the syntax `name: String`.

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, Rover!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now 5 years old!"
        return "$nameGreeting\n$ageGreeting"
    }

The parameter defined in the previous step works like a variable declared with the `val` keyword. Its value can be used anywhere in the `birthdayGreeting()` function. In an earlier codelab, you learned about how you can insert the value of a variable into a string.

2.  Replace `Rover` in the `nameGreeting` string with the `$` symbol followed by the `name` parameter.

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, $name!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now 5 years old!"
        return "$nameGreeting\n$ageGreeting"
    }

3.  Run your code and observe the error. Now that you declared the `name` parameter, you need to pass in a `String` when you call `birthdayGreeting()`. When you call a function that takes a parameter, you pass an argument to the function. The argument is the value that you pass, such as `"Rover"`.

No value passed for parameter 'name'

4.  Pass `"Rover"` into the `birthdayGreeting()` call in `main()`.

fun main() {
        println(birthdayGreeting("Rover"))
    }

5.  Run your code and observe the output. The name Rover comes from the `name` parameter.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!

6.  Because `birthdayGreeting()` takes a parameter, you can call it with a name other than Rover. Add another call to `birthdayGreeting()` inside the call to `println()`, passing in the argument `"Rex"`.

println(birthdayGreeting("Rover"))
    println(birthdayGreeting("Rex"))

7.  Run the code again and then observe that the output differs based on the argument passed into `birthdayGreeting()`.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rex!
You are now 5 years old!

5\. Functions with multiple parameters
--------------------------------------

Previously, you added a parameter to change the greeting based on the name. However, you can also define more than one parameter for a function, even parameters of different data types. In this section, you'll modify the greeting so that it also changes based on the dog's age.

![Function with multiple parameters](https://developer.android.com/static/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions/img/d9a6c34b9e8c4c05_2880.png "Function with multiple parameters")

Parameter definitions are separated by commas. Similarly, when you call a function with multiple parameters, you separate the arguments passed in with commas as well. Let's see this in action.

1.  After the `name` parameter, add an `age` parameter of type `Int`, to the `birthdayGreeting()` function. The new function declaration should have the two parameters, `name` and `age`, separated by a comma:

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String, age: Int): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, $name!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now 5 years old!"
        return "$nameGreeting\n$ageGreeting"
    }

2.  The new greeting string should use the `age` parameter. Update the `birthdayGreeting()` function to use the value of the `age` parameter in the `ageGreeting` string.

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String, age: Int): String {
        val nameGreeting = "Happy Birthday, $name!"
        val ageGreeting = "You are now $age years old!"
        return "$nameGreeting\n$ageGreeting"
    }

3.  Run the function and then notice the errors in the output:

No value passed for parameter 'age'
No value passed for parameter 'age'

4.  Modify the two calls to the `birthdayGreeting()` function in `main()` to pass in a different age for each dog. Pass in `5` for Rover's age and `2` for Rex's age.

fun main() {
        println(birthdayGreeting("Rover", 5))
        println(birthdayGreeting("Rex", 2))
    }

5.  Run your code. Now that you passed in values for both parameters, the output should reflect the name and age of each dog when you call the function.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rex!
You are now 2 years old!

Function Signature
------------------

So far you've seen how to define the function name, inputs (parameters), and outputs. The function name with its inputs (parameters) are collectively known as the _function signature_. The function signature consists of everything before the return type and is shown in the following code snippet.

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String, age: Int)

The parameters, separated by commas, are sometimes called the parameter list.

You'll often see these terms in documentation for code written by other developers. The function signature tells you the name of the function and what data types can be passed in.

You've learned a lot of new syntax around defining functions. Take a look at the following diagram for a recap of function syntax.

![Diagram for a recap of function syntax](https://developer.android.com/static/codelabs/basic-android-kotlin-compose-functions/img/3e0381d36be5415c_2880.png "Diagram for a recap of function syntax")

6\. Named arguments
-------------------

In the previous examples, you didn't need to specify the parameter names, `name` or `age`, when you called a function. However, you're able to do so if you choose. For example, you may call a function with many parameters or you may want to pass your arguments in a different order, such as putting the `age` parameter before the `name` parameter. When you include the parameter name when you call a function, it's called a [_named argument_](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/functions.html#named-arguments)
. Try using a named argument with the `birthdayGreeting()` function.

1.  Modify the call for Rex to use named arguments as shown in this code snippet. You can do this by including the parameter name followed by an equal sign, and then the value (e.g. `name = "Rex"`).

println(birthdayGreeting(name = "Rex", age = 2))

2.  Run the code and then observe that the output is unchanged:

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rex!
You are now 2 years old!

3.  Reorder the named arguments. For example, put the `age` named argument before the `name` named argument.

println(birthdayGreeting(age = 2, name = "Rex"))

4.  Run the code and observe that the output remains the same. Even though you changed the order of the arguments, the same values are passed in for the same parameters.

Happy Birthday, Rover!
You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rex!
You are now 2 years old!
7\. Default arguments
---------------------

Function parameters can also specify default arguments. Maybe Rover is your favorite dog, or you expect a function to be called with specific arguments in most cases. When you call a function, you can choose to omit arguments for which there is a default, in which case, the default is used.

To add a default argument, you add the assignment operator (`=`) after the data type for the parameter and set it equal to a value. Modify your code to use a default argument.

1.  In the `birthdayGreeting()` function, set the `name` parameter to the default value `"Rover"`.

fun birthdayGreeting(name: String = "Rover", age: Int): String {
        return "Happy Birthday, $name! You are now $age years old!"
    }

2.  In the first call to `birthdayGreeting()` for Rover in `main()`, set the `age` named argument to `5`. Because the `age` parameter is defined after the `name`, you need to use the named argument `age`. Without named arguments, Kotlin assumes the order of arguments is the same order in which parameters are defined. The named argument is used to ensure Kotlin is expecting an `Int` for the `age` parameter.

println(birthdayGreeting(age = 5))
    println(birthdayGreeting("Rex", 2))

3.  Run your code. The first call to the `birthdayGreeting()` function prints "Rover" as the name because you never specified the name. The second call to `birthdayGreeting()` still uses the `Rex` value, which you passed in for the `name`.

Happy Birthday, Rover! You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rex! You are now 2 years old!

4.  Remove the name from the second call to the `birthdayGreeting()` function. Again, because `name` is omitted, you need to use a named argument for the age.

println(birthdayGreeting(age = 5))
    println(birthdayGreeting(age = 2))

5.  Run your code and then observe that now both calls to `birthdayGreeting()` print "Rover" as the name because no name argument is passed in.

Happy Birthday, Rover! You are now 5 years old!
Happy Birthday, Rover! You are now 2 years old!

8\. Conclusion
--------------

Congratulations! You learned how to define and call functions in Kotlin.

Summary
-------

*   Functions are defined with the `fun` keyword and contain reusable pieces of code.
*   Functions help make larger programs easier to maintain and prevent the unnecessary repetition of code.
*   Functions can return a value that you can store in a variable for later use.
*   Functions can take parameters, which are variables available inside a function body.
*   Arguments are the values that you pass in when you call a function.
*   You can name arguments when you call a function. When you use named arguments, you can reorder the arguments without affecting the output.
*   You can specify a default argument that lets you omit the argument when you call a function.

 [![Android Developers](https://www.gstatic.com/devrel-devsite/prod/v34fe5d0a1df120a3c24e6d73e25d1d8607836b03710a3ad508fa501ece2bdcb3/android/images/lockup.png)](https://developer.android.com/)

/
